Traditional frame-based optical sensors often struggle with motion blur, high power consumption, and extreme data redundancy in challenging orbital environments. In contrast, event-based sensors, also known as neuromorphic cameras, offer a bio-inspired asynchronous approach. By capturing only local illumination changes, they provide microsecond temporal resolution, an extremely high dynamic range, and exceptional energy efficiency. Although the use of these sensors is rapidly expanding from terrestrial systems to orbital platforms, the scientific literature surrounding their space-based applications remains heavily fragmented. To bridge this gap, this article presents a comprehensive review of the state-of-the-art in event-based vision in the space domain. Based on the retrieved literature, we introduce a taxonomy structured around four primary domains: 1) atmospheric and high-speed observation; 2) environmental monitoring and change detection; 3) operational support and onboard processing; and 4) geospatial modeling and predictive analysis. As a result, this survey highlights that neuromorphic engineering is far more than a supplementary imaging technique; it is a paradigm shift that can be used to directly address critical bottlenecks in modern remote sensing and sustainable space exploration.

</details>


### [146] [KG-FairDiff: Knowledge Graph-Guided Prompt Refinement for Demographically Fair Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01282)
*Farbod Davoodi,Seyed Reza Tavakoli Shiyadeh,Pooria Safaei,Sana Harighi,Parsa Gholami,Amirali Amini,Kimia Vanaei,Emad Firoozi,Parham Abed Azad,Babak Khalaj,Siavash Ahmadi,Amir Hossein Payberah,Mohammad Hossein Rohban,Soheil Kolouri,Ali Diba*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出KG-FairDiff，一个基于知识图谱和LLM的推理时框架，通过约束优化对文本到图像系统的提示进行公平性修正，在不重新训练模型的情况下减少性别、种族、年龄等刻板印象偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像系统在部署规模上产生了人口层面的刻板印象伤害（如女性、有色人种、老年人、非西方文化被低估或 caricatured），而现有缓解方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练（对闭源模型不可行），要么依赖忽略文化背景的固定模板。

Method: 提出KG-FairDiff，一个模型无关的推理时框架。将公平感知的提示精炼形式化为约束优化问题，并实现为闭环流水线：一个包含约1200个文化与偏见相关三元组的知识图谱检索结构化上下文，LLM重写器提出改进方案，验证器仅接受降低基于散度的公平性损失且保留语义保真度的提示。证明了精炼循环的有限终止界，并构建了数学一致的评估套件。

Result: 在八个广泛部署的生成器上评估，KG-FairDiff显著减少了性别、种族、年龄和交叉性差异，同时保留了提示语义。

Conclusion: 提供了一种实用、可部署的路径，以实现更公平的生成式AI，无需重新训练模型。

Abstract: Text-to-Image (TTI) systems are now everyday infrastructure for journalism, education, advertising, and public communication, and the demographic and cultural stereotypes they inherit from training data (rendering women, people of colour, older adults, and non-Western cultures as under-represented or caricatured) become a population-level harm at deployment scale. Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [147] [DraDDP: A Multimodal Multi-Party Dialogue Discourse Parsing Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00012)
*Shannan Liu,Peifeng Li,Yaxin Fan,Qiaoming Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了首个公开的英文多模态多对话人话语解析数据集DraDDP，并验证了多模态信息在对话结构理解中的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多局限于文本模态或双人对话，未能满足多模态和多对话人场景的需求。

Method: 基于美国电视剧构建DraDDP数据集，包含495个对话片段、6,374条话语和9.1小时并行视频内容，覆盖丰富的多对话人交互场景；并在该数据集上进行基准评测和跨模态影响分析。

Result: 实验结果表明多模态信息在捕捉对话结构和关系类型方面具有重要价值。

Conclusion: 将公开数据集、标注指南和代码，推动多模态对话理解领域的未来发展。

Abstract: Multi-party dialogue discourse parsing aims to identify dependency structures and relation types between utterances in conversations. Previous studies are mostly limited to textual modality or two-party dialogue, failing to meet the multimodal and multi-party settings. In this paper, we construct the first publicly available English multimodal dataset DraDDP for multi-party dialogue discourse parsing, based on American TV dramas. DraDDP contains 495 dialogue segments with 6,374 utterances and 9.1 hours of parallel video content, covering rich multi-party interaction scenarios. Moreover, we establish comprehensive benchmarks by evaluating this task on DraDDP and conducting in-depth analysis on the impact of different modalities. Experimental results demonstrate the value of multimodal information in capturing dialogue structures and relation types. We will publicly release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and code to promote future research in multimodal dialogue understanding.

</details>


### [148] [Toward Robust In-Context Learning: Leveraging Out-of-distribution Proxies for Target Inaccessible Demonstration Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00014)
*Hao Xu,Rite Bo,Fausto Giunchiglia,Yingji Li,Rui Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DOPA框架，通过OOD代理和全局多样性约束来检索分布相似且多样化的示例，提升大语言模型在分布外场景下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目标域不可访问时，评估未知分布存在困难，影响检索示例的质量，导致LLM在严重分布偏移下优势减弱。

Method: 提出DOPA框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) OOD代理机制，用于近似不可访问的目标域并引导检索；(2) 基于马氏距离的全局多样性约束，确保检索示例的充分多样性。

Result: 在多个LLM和任务上的实验结果表明，DOPA有效增强了OOD场景下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DOPA通过代理评估和多样性约束，成功解决了目标域不可访问时检索质量下降的问题，提升了LLM在分布外场景的性能。

Abstract: Although studies have demonstrated that Large Language Models (LLMs) can perform well on Out-of-Distribution (OOD) tasks, their advantage tends to diminish as the distribution shift becomes more severe. Consequently, researchers aim to retrieve distributionally similar and informative demonstrations from the available source domain to boost the inference capabilities of LLMs. However, in practical scenarios where the target domain is inaccessible, evaluating the unknown distribution is challenging, which indirectly impacts the quality of the selected demonstrations. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{DOPA}, a demonstration search framework that incorporates an OOD proxy to approximate the inaccessible target domain and guide the retrieval process. Building on proxy-based evaluation, DOPA further introduces a Mahalanobis distance-based global diversity constraint to ensure sufficient diversity among the retrieved demonstrations. Experimental results on multiple LLMs and tasks demonstrate that DOPA effectively enhances robustness in OOD settings\footnote{https://github.com/bort64/ood\_code}.

</details>


### [149] [AEyeDE: An Attention-Based Attribution Framework for AI-Generated Text Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00016)
*Aria Nourbakhsh,Adelaide Danilov,Christoph Schommer,Salima Lamsiyah*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AEyeDE方法，利用Transformer注意力矩阵作为判别信号，通过CNN学习注意力表征来检测AI生成文本，在多种场景下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI文本检测方法依赖表层统计或似然信号，难以应对越来越流畅的生成模型，需要更鲁棒且可解释的检测信号。

Method: 使用白盒代理Transformer模型提取人类和AI文本的注意力归因矩阵，训练轻量级CNN学习注意力图表示，进行文本来源判别。

Result: 在编码器-解码器翻译设置中持续优于纯文本基线；解码器设置下在生成器特定检测中表现强劲，在标准基准上具有竞争力，且对跨数据集迁移和拼写扰动具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 注意力归因图提供了一种互补且可解释的AI文本检测信号，注意力图中存在可区分人机文本的局部结构模式。

Abstract: Detecting AI-generated text is becoming increasingly challenging as modern language models approach human-level fluency and can evade detectors that rely on surface statistics or likelihood-based signals. We propose \textsc{AEyeDE}, an attribution-driven approach to human-AI authorship detection that leverages model attention as a discriminative signal. Specifically, we extract attention-based attribution matrices for both human- and AI-generated text using a \emph{proxy} Transformer model with white-box access and train a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network to learn representations from these attribution maps. Across encoder-decoder translation settings, our method consistently outperforms a text-only baseline. In decoder-only settings, it performs strongly in generator-specific detection, remains competitive on standard benchmarks, and shows robustness under cross-dataset transfer and alternative-spelling perturbations. We further show that attention maps exhibit recurring local structures whose relative frequencies differ consistently between human- and AI-generated text across datasets and proxy models. These findings suggest that attention-based attribution maps provide a complementary and interpretable signal for AI-generated text detection. We will make the code publicly available to support future research.

</details>


### [150] [CSRP: Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Chinese Text Correction via Reinforcement Learning with Efficiency-Aware Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00020)
*Wei Tian,Yuhao Zhou,Man Lan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出CSRP三阶段框架（CPT+CoT-SFT+RL），在中文语法纠错任务上达到SOTA，F0.5=50.99，有效缓解过纠正问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用大模型缺乏中文语法领域的专业先验知识，且基于MLE的SFT训练无法优化精度导向的评估指标，导致系统性过纠正问题。

Method: 三阶段框架：(1) 在590万平衡样本上进行Continual Pre-training内化领域知识；(2) Chain-of-Thought SFT进行显式错误推理；(3) 引入效率感知奖励的Group Relative Policy Optimization强化学习，显式惩罚不必要编辑。

Result: NACGEG基准上F0.5=50.99，Precision=57.17，超越此前最优结果；CSCD拼写校正F1=59.61，超GPT-4达5.20点。RL阶段较SFT基线带来8%相对增益。

Conclusion: 显式优化编辑效率对高质量语法纠错至关重要，RL对齐与大规模CPT的增益正交可叠加。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based Chinese Grammatical Error Correction (CGEC) systems face two critical challenges: general-purpose models lack specialized linguistic priors for subtle grammatical distinctions, and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Maximum Likelihood Estimation fails to optimize for precision-focused metrics, leading to systematic over-correction. We propose CSRP, a three-stage framework that progressively builds correction capability through Continual Pre-training (CPT) on 5.9M balanced samples to internalize domain knowledge, Chain-of-Thought SFT with explicit error reasoning for diagnostic transparency, and Group Relative Policy Optimization with a novel Efficiency-Aware Reward that explicitly penalizes unnecessary edits. On the NACGEC benchmark, CSRP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 50.99 $F_{0.5}$ and 57.17 precision, substantially outperforming previous best results while effectively mitigating the over-correction bias inherent in MLE-trained models. Our method also advances CSCD spelling correction to 59.61 F1, surpassing GPT-4 by 5.20 points. Comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate that the RL alignment stage contributes a 8\% relative gain over the SFT baseline, and that this gain is orthogonal to the contribution of large-scale CPT, validating that explicit optimization for edit efficiency is essential for high-quality grammatical error correction. Our code is available at https://github.com/TW-NLP/ChineseErrorCorrector.

</details>


### [151] [SENSE: Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation for Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00021)
*Shaowen Chen,Zhicheng Liao,Hongwei Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SENSE方法，通过语义嵌入导航和软门控评估改进检索式推测解码，在LLaMA和Qwen模型上实现最高4.09的平均接受长度和3.26倍加速，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索式推测解码(RSD)受限于刚性词汇依赖，检索和验证过程对表层形式变化敏感，性能受限。

Method: SENSE包含两个核心模块：1) 语义嵌入导航——基于目标模型隐藏状态进行语义级检索；2) 软门控评估——验证语义等价性而非表面形式匹配。

Result: 在LLaMA和Qwen系列模型上，SENSE达到最高4.09的平均接受长度和3.26倍加速比，优于多个基线方法。

Conclusion: SENSE通过语义级对齐有效克服了检索式推测解码的词汇依赖问题，显著提升推理效率，且不牺牲生成质量。

Abstract: Speculative Decoding (SD) accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are verified in parallel by the target model, without compromising generation quality. While Retrieval-based Speculative Decoding (RSD) is favored for its plug-and-play versatility, its potential is impeded by rigid lexical dependencies, rendering both retrieval and verification brittle to surface-level variations. To address this, we propose SENSE (Semantic Embedding Navigation with Soft-gated Evaluation). By anchoring retrieval on the hidden states of the target model, SENSE establishes robust semantic alignment, which empowers the Soft-gated Evaluation module to validate semantic equivalence rather than surface forms. To ensure rigorous benchmarking, we deconstruct existing methods into atomic primitives within a unified framework, facilitating granular, component-level comparison. Extensive experiments across diverse domains demonstrate that SENSE outperforms multiple baselines on the LLaMA and Qwen families, attaining up to 4.09 mean acceptance length and 3.26x speedup, while preserving generation quality. Our code will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [152] [lmfaoooo at SemEval-2026 Task 1: Humor Is an Audience. Preference Modeling for Constrained Humor Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00022)
*Alexey Tikhonov,Alexey Ivanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种“先生成大量候选，再通过偏好模型选择最佳”的幽默生成系统，在SemEval-2026 MWAHAHA任务中，英文和中文子任务排名第一，西班牙语子任务排名第二。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 幽默生成面临两大挑战：一是生成流畅新颖的笑话本身就很难；二是“有趣”高度依赖受众、语境和文化，人工标注一致性低，监督信号嘈杂。

Method: 采用“生成大量候选→选择最佳”策略。生成阶段通过多步提示、模型集成和多样性解码生成多样化候选集；选择阶段使用从人工成对比较中学习的偏好模型（而非绝对趣味性评分）来排序候选。同时发布了2.5K人工成对偏好判断数据。

Result: 在三个偏好数据集上持续优于基线，展现出更强的跨域迁移能力。在MWAHAHA任务中，英文和中文子任务排名第一，西班牙语子任务排名第二。

Conclusion: 基于成对比较学习的偏好模型能够有效替代绝对评分监督，提升幽默生成的受众适配性，且该方法具有良好的跨语言和跨领域泛化能力。

Abstract: Humor generation remains difficult not only because producing fluent, novel jokes is hard, but because "funny" is audience-dependent and supervision is noisy -- preferences vary with audience, context, and culture, and annotator agreement is often low. In this paper, we describe our system for the SemEval-2026 Task-1 (MWAHAHA), which focuses on humor generation under explicit constraints. The task evaluates submitted systems via human preference judgments in 1-on-1 arena-style comparisons.
  We adopt a "generate-many -> select-best" strategy. First, we generate a diverse pool of candidates per instance using multi-step prompting, model ensembling, and diversity-oriented decoding. Second, we select outputs using a preference model that approximates a "reader" by learning from human comparisons rather than absolute funniness scores. To support this approach, we release 2.5K human pairwise judgments collected through the Humor Arena prototype. We further propose an interpretable pipeline that converts labeled comparisons into a preference model. Across three preference datasets, our models consistently outperform baselines and show stronger cross-domain transfer. Finally, we apply the learned preference model to rank candidates for the MWAHAHA setting and release intermediate artifacts (candidate pools and rankings) to facilitate follow-up work.
  Our system ranked 1st in the English and Chinese subtasks of MWAHAHA and 2nd in the Spanish subtask.

</details>


### [153] [TrustLDM: Benchmarking Trustworthiness in Language Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00023)
*Yichuan Mo,Yukun Jiang,Yanbo Shi,Mingjie Li,Michael Backes,Yang Zhang,Yisen Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了 TrustLDM，一个针对语言扩散模型（LDMs）的全面可信度基准，评估其安全性、隐私性和公平性。实验发现 LDMs 在仅有用户提示时表现良好，但恶意上下文会显著降低其对齐行为，且解码顺序和生成长度会影响评估结果。同时提出了自动评估框架 TrustLDM-Auto 用于系统识别脆弱配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言扩散模型（LDMs）正在快速发展并挑战自回归模型的地位，但其灵活的多顺序解码策略可能带来新的可信度（安全性、隐私性、公平性）风险，目前缺乏针对 LDMs 的全面可信度评估基准。

Method: 1）构建 TrustLDM 基准，评估不同 LDM 架构在多种恶意上下文下的安全性、隐私性和公平性；2）设计 TrustLDM-Auto 自动评估框架，利用 LDM 的解码灵活性系统性地识别脆弱配置。

Result: LDMs 在仅有用户提示时表现良好，但附加恶意上下文后对齐行为显著下降；较长上下文并不一定带来更强影响；解码顺序和生成长度会影响评估结果；所有评估模型在多个维度均存在显著可信度弱点。

Conclusion: 该工作有助于社区构建更可信的语言扩散模型，并为 LDMs 的信任评估提供了基准和方法。

Abstract: The rapid development of Language Diffusion Models (LDMs) challenges the dominant position of auto-regressive competitors in language processing. However, their flexible, any-order decoding strategies not only enable fast decoding speed but also potentially bring new trustworthiness challenges. To better understand the risks behind their pipelines, we introduce a comprehensive trustworthiness benchmark tailored to LDMs (TrustLDM), evaluating safety, privacy, and fairness across different LDM architectures with multiple categories of static post contexts. Our empirical results show that although LDMs generally exhibit strong trustworthiness with only the user prompts, their alignment behavior degrades noticeably when the malicious post contexts are attached to the masked responses. We further observe that longer contexts do not necessarily induce stronger effects, and both decoding order and generation length affect the evaluation outcomes. Finally, we propose TrustLDM-Auto, an automatic evaluation framework that leverages LDM decoding flexibility to systematically identify vulnerable configurations, revealing substantial trustworthiness weaknesses across all evaluated models and dimensions. Our work may potentially help the community build more trustworthy LDMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/TrustLDM.

</details>


### [154] [ART: Attention Run-time Termination for Efficient Large Language Model Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00024)
*Chen Qiu,Guozhong Li,Panos Kalnis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Attention Run-time Termination (ART)，一种运行时注意力终止机制，在解码过程中动态停止对无关KV块的访问，以提升长上下文LLM的生成吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存管理方法大多在解码前仅基于键(key)进行剪枝，忽略了注意力输出同时依赖于键和值(value)的事实，而引入值又会带来巨大额外开销。

Method: ART是一种轻量级运行时机制，在核函数执行期间跟踪累积的注意力输出，当后续KV块的贡献变得可忽略时提前终止访问。ART与现有基于键的KV缓存管理方法正交，可无缝集成。

Result: 在LongBench基准上，ART在大批量场景下比当前最优基线方法实现20%更高的生成吞吐量，同时保持可比的准确性。

Conclusion: ART通过运行时动态终止机制，在不牺牲精度的前提下显著提升了长上下文解码的效率，且可兼容现有KV缓存管理方法。

Abstract: Long-context decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is severely constrained by the memory bandwidth required to fetch the extensive Key-Value (KV) cache. Most existing KV management methods rely on key-only pruning before decoding, despite the evidence that attention outputs depend jointly on keys and values, as incorporating values in their methods incurs prohibitive additional overhead. In this paper, we propose Attention Run-time Termination (ART), a lightweight run-time mechanism that tracks accumulated attention outputs during kernel execution and terminates subsequent KV block accesses once further contributions become negligible. This design makes ART orthogonal to existing key-based KV cache management methods, enabling seamless integration with them. Experiments on LongBench benchmarks show that ART achieves 20% higher generation throughput in large batch size than state-of-the-art baseline while maintaining comparable accuracy.

</details>


### [155] [Cognitive-Linguistic Indicators of Depression in Online Communities: Analysed by DistilBERT and Holographic Reduced Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00026)
*Brian Van Steen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出一种融合认知语言特征（认知扭曲）与DistilBERT嵌入的混合模型（DistilBERT+HRR），用于检测Reddit文本中的抑郁症，相比TF-IDF基线，宏F1从0.80提升至0.94。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统抑郁症检测方法要么依赖纯语言特征（如TF-IDF）缺乏语义理解，要么仅用深度学习嵌入忽略认知理论。作者希望结合Beck认知理论中可测量的认知扭曲特征与Transformer语义表示，提升检测效果。

Method: 1) 从Reddit帖子中提取认知扭曲特征：第一人称代词密度、绝对化词语、负面情绪词。2) 构建两个管道：TF-IDF+朴素贝叶斯作为基线；DistilBERT句子嵌入 + HRR向量编码认知特征，拼接后接逻辑回归分类器。

Result: 混合DistilBERT-HRR模型宏F1=0.94，TF-IDF基线宏F1=0.80；5折交叉验证F1从0.83提升至0.92，AUC从0.958提升至0.981。

Conclusion: 融合认知理论驱动的语言特征与Transformer嵌入能显著提升抑郁症文本检测的准确性，提示认知语言学线索对心理健康自动评估具有重要价值。

Abstract: This paper investigates whether combining cognitively grounded linguistic features with transformer-based embeddings improves automated detection of depression in online text. Using Beck's Cognitive Theory of Depression, the study extracts cognitive distortions as measurable features, including first-person pronoun density, absolutist words, and negative emotion in Reddit posts from depression-related and control communities. Using a subset of the Kaggle Reddit Suicide and Depression Detection dataset, two classification pipelines are compared, a TF-IDF embedding with Naive Bayes as a baseline, and a hybrid model that concatenates DistilBERT sentence embeddings with Holographic Reduced Representation (HRR) vectors encoding the cognitive-linguistic features, followed by Logistic Regression. The hybrid DistilBERT HRR model achieves a macro F1 score of 0.94 versus 0.80 for the TD-IDF baseline, with 5-fold cross validation F1 improving from 0.83 to 0.92, and AUC from 0.958 to 0.981.

</details>


### [156] [A Multi-Domain Red Teaming Framework for Safety, Robustness, and Fairness Evaluation of Medical Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00027)
*Andrei Marian Feier,Veysel Kocaman,Yigit Gul,Ahmet Korkmaz,Alexander Thomas,Aleksei Zakharov,Jay Gil,Mehmet Butgul,David Talby*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个多领域红队测试框架，评估了11个LLM在690个临床场景中的表现。结果表明，平均准确率掩盖了临床关键风险，高性能模型在个别安全场景中仍会出现完全失败。混合评估（自动化+临床医生监督）对可信安全评估至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉LLM在临床实践中常见的对抗性或伦理复杂条件下的行为，缺乏对模型在安全关键场景下真实风险的评估。

Method: 构建多领域红队测试框架，涵盖9个领域、150多个子类别、690个临床场景，采用对抗性变换，使用七维度评分标准，结合LLM辅助评分和人机验证。

Result: 模型平均得分0.791-0.984，高性能系统在个别安全关键场景出现完全失败；公平性任务中人口统计修改导致10-20%错误放大；人工评审发现自动评估遗漏的临床相关失败。

Conclusion: 性能方差和最坏情况失败比平均准确率更能提供临床有意义的可靠性指标；混合评估方法（自动化+临床医生监督）是可信安全评估的必要条件。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed across healthcare, yet existing benchmarks fail to capture model behavior under adversarial or ethically complex conditions common in clinical practice. We developed a multi-domain red teaming framework evaluating eleven contemporary LLMs across 690 clinically grounded scenarios spanning nine domains and over 150 subcategories. Scenarios incorporated adversarial transformations, and responses were assessed using a seven-dimension rubric with LLM-assisted scoring and human-in-the-loop validation. Results revealed substantial performance variance, with mean scores ranging from 0.791 to 0.984. Critically, several high-performing systems produced complete failures in individual safety-critical scenarios, demonstrating that aggregate accuracy masks clinically meaningful risk. The highest-performing systems (X-BAI, GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.1) achieved scores above 0.97 with low variance, while performance varied significantly across domains. Equity-related tasks showed 10-20% error amplification with demographic modifications, and human reviewers identified clinically relevant failures missed by automated evaluation. Our findings demonstrate that performance variance and worst-case failures provide more clinically meaningful reliability indicators than mean accuracy alone, and that hybrid evaluation approaches combining automation with clinician oversight are essential for credible safety assessment.

</details>


### [157] [TCAR-Gen: Temporal Graph Retrieval with Evidence Fusion for Knowledge-Grounded Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00029)
*Sidra Nasir,Muhammad Noman Zahid,Rizwan Ahmed Khan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出TCAR-Gen框架，结合图神经网络、时序证据融合和链树推理，在历史犯罪叙事问答任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统在历史犯罪案件叙事问答中缺乏时序推理和多证据融合能力，检索与查询语义脱节，多源证据整合不连贯。

Method: TCAR-Gen框架由三部分组成：查询条件图神经网络、时序证据融合机制、链树推理（chain-of-trees reasoning），用于将检索证据接地到答案生成中。

Result: 在Victorian Crime Diaries基准上Recall@5达0.3738，优于Vanilla RAG、Temporal RAG、GraphRAG-C和GraphRAG-T；消融实验验证了上下文图、时序惩罚机制和查询条件的关键作用；跨模型评估显示小规模模型仍保持检索覆盖但生成质量下降。

Conclusion: 显式时序建模和多分支证据融合对于知识密集型语料上忠实且推理密集的问答任务至关重要。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation systems struggle with temporal reasoning and evidence fusion when answering complex questions over historical criminal case narratives. Existing approaches either retrieve independently of query semantics or fail to integrate multiple evidence sources coherently. We propose Temporal Context Augmented Retrieval Generation (TCAR-Gen), a framework that combines query-conditioned graph neural networks, temporal evidence fusion, and chain-of-trees reasoning to ground answer generation in retrieved evidence. On the Victorian Crime Diaries benchmark, TCAR-Gen achieves 0.3738 Recall@5, outperforming Vanilla RAG, Temporal RAG, GraphRAG-C, and GraphRAG-T across seven query types including multi-hop reasoning and counterfactual questions. Ablation studies reveal that the context graph, temporal penalty mechanism, and query conditioning are critical components. Cross-model evaluation across five language model (GPT-OSS 20B to TinyLlama 1.1B) demonstrates that TCAR-Gen maintains robust retrieval coverage at smaller model scales, though generation quality degrades substantially with reduced model capacity. Our work shows that explicit temporal modelling and multi-branch evidence fusion are essential for faithful, reasoning-intensive question answering over knowledge-grounded corpora.

</details>


### [158] [LLMs for Cardiovascular Risk Prediction from Structured Clinical Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00031)
*Jeba Maliha,Md Rafiul Kabir*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合结构化临床数据和LLM生成的自然语言叙述的混合框架用于冠心病预测，实验表明随机森林在准确率上最高，但LLM分类在保护患者隐私方面具有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冠心病是全球主要死亡原因之一，需要可靠的预测系统支持早期诊断和风险评估。传统的机器学习模型在结构化数据上表现良好，但LLM为解释自然语言形式的医疗信息提供了新的可能性。

Method: 使用包含1190名患者记录和11个临床属性的公开数据集，将结构化变量转换为可解释的特征表示，并利用LLM生成合成临床叙述。通过验证管道进行反向提取并计算一致性得分（平均保真度94.61%）。比较四种传统机器学习模型与LLM（GPT和Gemini）在零样本和少样本提示下的分类性能。

Result: 随机森林在准确率上表现最高。LLM分类在真实临床环境中仍然有益，因为其直接操作自然语言描述，患者的敏感数值数据（如实验室数值、血压读数和诊断代码）得以保密。

Conclusion: 将结构化临床数据与LLM生成的叙述相结合可以为混合临床预测系统开辟新的方向。

Abstract: Coronary artery disease (CAD) remains one of the leading causes of death globally, highlighting the need for reliable predictive systems to support early diagnosis and risk assessment. While traditional machine learning models perform well on structured clinical data, large language models (LLMs) present new possibilities to interpret medical information expressed in natural language. In this work, we develop a hybrid framework that bridges structured clinical data and natural-language representations for CAD prediction. Using a publicly available dataset of 1,190 patient records with 11 clinical attributes, structured variables are converted into interpretable feature representations and synthetic clinical narratives using LLMs. A validation pipeline performs reverse extraction of clinical variables and computes a consistency score with the original records, achieving an average fidelity of 94.61%. We then evaluate four conventional machine learning models and compare their performance with LLM-based classification under zero-shot and few-shot prompting settings. We use two LLMs here, GPT and Gemini. Experimental results show that Random Forest achieves the highest accuracy. Despite this advantage, LLM-based classification remains beneficial in real-world clinical settings. This is because LLMs operate directly on natural language patient descriptions, meaning that sensitive numerical patient data such as exact lab values, blood pressure readings, and diagnostic codes are kept private. Findings suggest that combining structured clinical data with LLM-generated narratives can enable new directions for hybrid clinical prediction systems.

</details>


### [159] [Graph-Augmented Retrieval for Cross-Entity Financial Sentiment Analysis: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00062)
*Rajan Bastakoti,Sagar Bhetwal,Nirajan Acharya,Gaurav Kumar Gupta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两跳图检索增强生成（Graph-RAG）架构，用于跨实体金融情感分析。相比传统向量RAG，该方法通过构建情感加权知识图谱和强度过滤图遍历，在100条查询测试中实现了实体召回率提升6.4%、复杂多实体问答相关性提升11.7%，且不牺牲答案质量，同时揭示了图遍历阈值与答案质量之间的倒U型关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于向量的RAG系统难以捕捉金融分析中结构化、多实体之间的关系信息，限制了其在金融情感分析等复杂任务中的表现。

Method: 构建59个股票实体的情感加权知识图谱（基于255篇新闻文章），采用两跳图遍历增强密集检索，通过强度过滤的INFLUENCES边访问向量搜索无法获取的关系证据。

Result: Graph-RAG实体召回率提升6.4%（p<0.001），多实体问答相关性提升11.7%（关系型问题提升16.1%），答案质量无明显损失（语义相似度差值为+0.001），平均延迟增加22.6%但延迟方差降低80%。遍历强度阈值与答案质量呈倒U型关系，最优值为τ=0.5。

Conclusion: 图增强检索存在精度-覆盖率的权衡，研究结果为构建多实体金融分析的RAG系统提供了可操作的架构指导。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become foundational for grounding large language models in domain-specific corpora, yet conventional vector-based RAG systems are fundamentally limited in their ability to capture the structured, multi-entity relationships that underpin financial market analysis. This paper presents a comprehensive comparative study of a novel two-hop Graph-RAG architecture versus a standard vector-only baseline for cross-entity financial sentiment analysis. Our system constructs a sentiment-weighted knowledge graph of 59 equity entities from 255 news articles covering 10 major technology stocks, then augments dense retrieval with intensity-filtered graph traversal over INFLUENCES edges to surface relational evidence inaccessible to vector search alone.
  We evaluate both architectures on 100 grounded queries (30 Direct, 70 Relational) using semantic similarity, entity recall, RAGAS metrics, latency benchmarks, and ablation studies. Graph-RAG achieves a statistically significant improvement in entity recall (+6.4%, p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank) and delivers substantially more relevant answers for complex multi-entity queries (+11.7% Answer Relevancy), with gains concentrating in relational question types (+16.1%). Critically, these improvements come at no measurable cost to answer quality (delta = +0.001 semantic similarity, Cohen's d = 0.078), with a modest 22.6% increase in mean latency offset by an 80% reduction in latency variance.
  An ablation study on the graph traversal intensity threshold reveals an inverted-U relationship with answer quality, identifying tau = 0.5 as optimal over the production default of tau = 0.7. These findings characterize a precision-for-coverage trade-off inherent to graph-augmented retrieval and provide actionable architectural guidance for practitioners building RAG systems for multi-entity financial analysis.

</details>


### [160] [DLLM-JEPA: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures for Masked Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00091)
*Sangdae Nam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DLLM-JEPA将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型结合，消除了LLM-JEPA需要显式多视图数据和两次梯度前向传播的成本，训练FLOPs减少33%，在多项任务上取得显著提升，并发现了一种几何-功能漂移解离的机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-JEPA虽然将JEPA引入自回归语言模型，但继承了因果注意力机制的两大缺陷：需要显式的多视图数据（如文本-代码对）以及每步需要两次携带梯度的前向传播，训练成本高。

Method: 提出DLLM-JEPA，将JEPA与掩码扩散语言模型配对。利用扩散模型的双向注意力，通过不同的掩码率从同一输入产生两个语义不同的视图，无需显式数据对；同时只进行一次梯度前向传播。

Result: 相比扩散模型微调基线，DLLM-JEPA在所有任务和架构组合上均有提升：LLaDA-8B GSM8K提升18.7个百分点，Dream-7B GSM8K提升11.4个百分点，Spider、NL-RX-SYNTH和Django上也持续正向增益。训练FLOPs相比LLM-JEPA减少33%。

Conclusion: DLLM-JEPA展现了双重优势：同时提升任务准确率、降低困惑度并保持基础MMLU水平。层探分析揭示了中层Transformer层的几何-功能漂移解离机制，该现象在多个骨干网络上一致出现。

Abstract: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have reshaped self-supervised representation learning in vision. The recent LLM-JEPA ported JEPA to autoregressive language models but inherited two steep costs from the causal-attention substrate: it demands explicit multi-view data (e.g., text-code pairs), and it requires two gradient-carrying forward passes per step. We introduce DLLM-JEPA, which pairs JEPA with masked-diffusion language models to eliminate both costs at once. The bidirectional attention of diffusion models yields two semantically distinct views of the same input via different masking rates -- no explicit pairs needed -- and supports a single gradient-carrying forward pass, cutting training FLOPs by 33% relative to LLM-JEPA. DLLM-JEPA improves over diffusion-only fine-tuning in every (task, architecture) combination we evaluate: up to +18.7 pp on LLaDA-8B GSM8K and +11.4 pp on Dream-7B GSM8K, with consistent positive gains on Spider, NL-RX-SYNTH, and Django. Beyond accuracy, DLLM-JEPA exhibits a dual-win property: on LLaDA-8B with the Wide-t configuration, it simultaneously raises GSM8K accuracy (67.1 vs. 65.2, +1.8 pp), drives held-out Wikitext loss below the pre-trained base, and preserves MMLU accuracy at base level across three fine-tuning seeds -- whereas an L2-to-base parameter anchor matches baseline accuracy with no task gain. Layer-wise probing reveals the mechanism: a geometric-functional drift dissociation in which the fine-tuned backbone moves further from the pre-trained weights than the baseline yet forgets less on held-out Wikitext, with the amplification concentrated in middle transformer layers. The pattern appears on Dream-7B as well, indicating the phenomenon is not specific to a single backbone.

</details>


### [161] [Agreement Metrics for LLM-as-Judge Evaluation: What to Report and Why](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00093)
*Delip Rao,Chris Callison-Burch*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文指出在LLM作为评估者的验证中，许多常用一致性指标（如Pearson's r, Spearman's ρ等）在二分类数据上是冗余的，只有Cohen's κ能提供额外信息。同时，弃权处理方式选择会破坏这些等价关系。最后提出了一个报告清单。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估领域在报告评估者一致性时存在指标选择混乱、冗余报告、处理方法不透明等问题，导致"虚假的佐证"现象。

Method: 通过调查24篇LLM-as-judge论文，分析常用一致性指标在二分类数据上的数学关系，并研究弃权（CANNOT_ASSESS）处理方式的影响。

Result: 发现Pearson's r、Spearman's ρ、Kendall's τ_b、phi系数、MCC在非退化二分类数据上本质是同一个数；Cohen's κ是唯一提供额外信息的指标，其与φ的差距衡量了评估者正例率与人类的偏移。

Conclusion: 提出了一个包含判断尺度、弃权处理模式、覆盖率、混淆矩阵和聚合级别等要素的报告清单，以提高评估报告的透明度和规范性。

Abstract: Validating an LLM judge against human annotations usually means reporting several agreement statistics: accuracy, precision, recall, $F_1$, Cohen's $κ$, and one or more rank correlations. A survey of 24 recent LLM-as-judge papers finds metric choice entangled with the judgment scale, tie handling, invalid outputs, and abstention handling, and those choices rarely stated. For binary criteria -- the common case in rubric-based evaluation, where each criterion is graded MET or UNMET -- most of the reported numbers are redundant: Pearson's $r$, Spearman's $ρ$, Kendall's $τ_b$, the phi coefficient $φ$, and the Matthews Correlation Coefficient all reduce to a single number on non-degenerate binary data, so reporting several of them only creates an illusion of corroborating evidence. Cohen's $κ$ is the one agreement coefficient that adds information: it shares $φ$'s numerator but normalizes differently, and the gap between them measures how far the judge's positive-label rate has drifted from the human's. We then trace what changes when a judge may abstain with a CANNOT_ASSESS verdict: the three common ways of handling abstentions are not interchangeable preprocessing choices but answer different questions, and they break the binary equivalences. The same equivalences reappear, up to a negligible finite-sample correction, for multi-judge ensembles scored with Fleiss' $κ$ or Krippendorff's $α$. We close with a reporting checklist that names the judgment scale, the abstention and tie handling mode, coverage, the confusion matrix, and the aggregation level alongside any scalar agreement coefficient.

</details>


### [162] [Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00116)
*Ahmed Faizul Haque Dhrubo,Souvik Pramanik,Most. Aysha Siddika Sumona,Shahnewaz Siddique,Mohammad Ashrafuzzaman Khan,Mohammad Abdul Qayum,Mohsin Sajjad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于KAN的BiGRU模型，用于低资源多语言法律文档的分类与摘要任务，在孟加拉国法律数据集上取得了优于传统方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决低资源多语言环境下法律文档处理中存在的领域语言复杂性、多语言混用、长距离上下文依赖以及类别不平衡等问题。

Method: 分类任务采用BiGRU模型结合KAN模块；摘要任务采用注意力GRU结合KAN模型头。数据集来自孟加拉国法律文档（包含孟加拉语、英语及音译孟加拉语）。

Result: 分类准确率67.96%，F1分数0.65；摘要ROUGE-1/2/L的F1分别为0.38、0.23、0.31。消融实验表明KAN模块使分类准确率从57.34%提升至67.96%。

Conclusion: 提出的KAN-BiGRU架构在低资源多语言法律文档处理中有效，尤其KAN模块显著提升了分类性能。

Abstract: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) module, while the summarization part utilizes attention-based GRU, combined with a KAN model head. Classification model yields 67.96% of accuracy and 0.65 F1 score; while ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2, and ROUGE-L measures for summarization yield 0.38, 0.23, and 0.31 F1 scores, correspondingly. Ablation study shows that the use of KAN increases classification accuracy from 57.34% to 67.96%. Moreover, our proposed technique is compared to several baselines, including classical ML algorithms and pretrained language models.

</details>


### [163] [RealityTest: How People Probe AI Identity and Whether Models Disclose It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00168)
*Anna Gausen,Sarenne Wallbridge,Bessie O'Dell,Christopher Summerfield,Hannah Rose Kirk*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了RealityTest基准测试，用于全面评估AI系统在被询问时是否主动披露其AI身份。研究发现，仅31%的人会直接询问身份，且人类提问方式比机器生成的更加多样。对17个文本模型和6个语音模型的测试显示，一个问题抑制指令就能使披露率降至30%以下。问题的措辞和对话背景比模型本身对披露行为影响更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI身份披露评估通常仅限英文、基于机器生成问题且仅限文本，缺乏对真实世界中人类如何遇到和询问AI身份的多语言、多模态评估。

Method: 从49个国家约750名参与者收集了3,152个身份探测查询，涵盖五种语言、文本和语音场景，构建多模态多语言基准测试，并评估17个文本和6个语音模型。

Result: 仅31%的人在模糊场景中直接询问身份；人类提问远比机器生成问题多样；一个抑制指令使最佳模型的披露率降至30%以下；问题的措辞和对话背景比模型本身对披露行为影响更大。

Conclusion: 基于狭窄或合成查询集的安全评估可能误判模型在真实部署中的行为，需要基于人类数据的多样化、多模态评估来准确衡量AI身份披露安全风险。

Abstract: AI systems are increasingly deployed in conversational settings where users may be uncertain whether they are speaking with a human or an AI. Despite mounting regulatory attention to this known safety risk, existing evaluations of AI disclosure are typically English-only, based on machine-generated questions, and restricted to text. We present RealityTest to comprehensively test whether AI systems disclose their identity when asked. The benchmark is the first large-scale multimodal and multilingual evaluation, grounded in human data on how people actually encounter and question AI identity in the real-world. Alongside the benchmark, we release the underlying dataset of 3,152 identity-probing queries collected from ~750 participants across 49 countries and five languages, in text and speech scenarios. We find that only 31% of people ask about identity directly in ambiguous scenarios, and that the questions people ask are far more diverse than machine-generated queries. We test 17 text and 6 speech models, and find substantial variation in disclosure behaviour. However, a single suppression instruction reduces disclosure rates to below 30%, even in the best-performing models. Validating our investment in diverse, human-grounded evaluation data, we find that how the question is phrased and the context of the conversation matter more for disclosure than which model is being tested. Safety evaluations built on narrow or synthetic query sets risk mischaracterising how models behave in realistic deployment settings.

</details>


### [164] [BOUTEF: A Multilingual Corpus for FakeNews in North Africa -- Language as a Weapon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00193)
*Kamel Smaili,Yassine Toughrai,Amina Laggoun,David Langlois*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了大规模多语种假新闻语料库BOUTEF，涵盖阿尔及利亚和突尼斯的多种语言变体，通过定量与定性分析揭示了假新闻的情感操控、煽情框架和混合语言策略，以及与用户参与度的强相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 假新闻在多语言、低资源环境（如北非）的传播日益严重，但缺乏大规模、多语种的系统性研究资源，现有研究多集中于英语等主流语言。

Method: 构建包含假叙事、真叙事及用户评论的三组件语料库BOUTEF，覆盖MSA、阿尔及利亚/突尼斯方言、Arabizi、法语、英语及代码混合语言；采用定量统计与定性分析相结合的方法，分析主题分布、语言修辞策略、情感模式和社会参与动态。

Result: 假新闻依赖情感化叙事、煽情框架和混合语言实践以增强病毒式传播；辟谣内容则更偏向事实核查风格；用户参与度与假内容可见性显著相关；阿尔及利亚与突尼斯存在共性但也有社会政治塑造的差异。

Conclusion: 该研究通过提供公开可用的多语种标注语料库，推进了假新闻检测、低资源语言处理及复杂语言环境中信息紊乱的理解。

Abstract: The rapid spread of fake news on social media has become a major challenge, particularly in multilingual and under-resourced contexts such as North Africa. In this paper, we introduce BOUTEF, a large-scale multilingual corpus designed to study the propagation, characteristics, and impact of fake news in Algeria and Tunisia. The corpus integrates three complementary components: fake narratives, genuine narratives, and associated user-generated comments, along with verified debunking information. It covers a wide range of languages and linguistic varieties, including MSA, Algerian and Tunisian dialects, Arabizi, French, English, and code-switched language. Building on this resource, we conduct a comprehensive empirical analysis combining quantitative and qualitative approaches. We examine thematic distributions, linguistic and rhetorical strategies, sentiment patterns, and social engagement dynamics. Statistical analyses reveal significant associations between thematic categories and message veracity, as well as strong correlations between user engagement and the visibility of fake content. Our findings show that fake news relies heavily on emotionally charged narratives, sensational framing, and hybrid linguistic practices that enhance virality and audience engagement. In contrast, debunking content adopts a more factual and verification-oriented style. Furthermore, a comparative analysis between Algeria and Tunisia highlights both shared dynamics and country-specific characteristics shaped by sociopolitical contexts. The results emphasize the role of informal language practices in the diffusion and reception of misinformation. By providing a rich, annotated, and publicly available dataset, this work contributes to advancing research on fake news detection, low-resource language processing, and the understanding of information disorders in complex linguistic environments.

</details>


### [165] [DeSQ: Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00203)
*Papa Abdou Karim Karou Diallo,Aditya Sharma,Neshat Elhami Fard,Amal Zouaq*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出DeSQ框架，通过将复杂问题分解为原子约束并生成SPARQL片段，再组装为完整查询，在五个基准测试中的四个上超越了现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KBQA方法中，形式化查询生成脆弱且可解释性差，而直接答案检索计算成本高且易产生幻觉，需要一种结合两者优势的方法。

Method: DeSQ框架分为三个阶段：1)将复杂问题分解为与KB关系结构对应的原子约束(ACs)；2)为每个AC生成SPARQL片段及URI占位符映射；3)将片段组装为完整SPARQL查询。

Result: 在五个主要基准测试中的四个上超越现有方法，对词汇变化具有更强的鲁棒性，且无需实时KB端点即可评估。

Conclusion: DeSQ框架不仅提升了性能，还通过结构化输出简化了评估过程并支持细粒度错误分析，便于针对性改进。

Abstract: Dominant approaches to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA) fall into two categories. First is the generation of a formal query that suffers from brittleness and limited explainability, and the second is direct answer retrieval through KB exploration that is computationally costly and prone to hallucination. To combine the strengths of both paradigms while mitigating their respective weaknesses, we introduce DeSQ (Decomposition-based SPARQL Query Generation), a KB-agnostic framework that operates in three stages. First, it decomposes complex questions into Atomic Constraints (ACs) that mirror the relational structure of the underlying KB. Second, it generates a two-part structured output: (a) Mapping of each AC to its corresponding SPARQL Fragment, using standardized variable and URIs placeholders, and (b) URIs Grounding block describing each placeholder. Third, it assembles these fragments into a complete SPARQL query. DeSQ surpasses state-of-the-art approaches on four out of five major benchmarks and demonstrates superior robustness to lexical variation. Beyond performance gains, our framework greatly simplifies evaluation by eliminating the need for a live KB endpoint, and its structured output enables fine-grained error analysis, allowing more targeted interventions for improvement.

</details>


### [166] [SkillAdaptor: Self-Adapting Skills for LLM Agents from Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01311)
*Zhuoyun Yu,Xin Xie,Wuguannan Yao,Chenxi Wang,Lei Liang,Xiang Qi,Shumin Deng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SkillAdaptor，一种无需训练、可在步骤级进行失败归因的技能适配框架，在WebShop、PinchBench和Claw-Eval三个评测集上相较无技能和已有技能适配基线均取得提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有训练无关的技能适配方法依赖完整轨迹或会话级反馈进行更新，导致失败归因粗糙、修订不稳定或过于宽泛，亟需更细粒度的步骤级归因机制。

Method: SkillAdaptor：在失败轨迹中定位首个可行动的错误步骤，将责任链接到候选技能，在显式接受检查下执行针对性更新，保持主干模型冻结。

Result: 在PinchBench Avg Score%提升+1.5，Claw-Eval Avg Score提升+1.8，WebShop成功率提升+1.7。

Conclusion: 步骤级归因能够支持更稳定、可审计的无需训练的技能维护。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable external skills to solve long-horizon interactive tasks. Existing training-free skill adaptation pipelines usually update skills from full trajectories or session-level feedback, which makes failure attribution coarse and often produces unstable or overly broad revisions. We propose SkillAdaptor, a training-free step-level skill adaptation framework with explicit failure attribution, and it can plug into OpenClaw-class agent harnesses. Given a failed trajectory, SkillAdaptor identifies a first actionable fault step, links responsibility to candidate skills, and applies targeted updates under explicit acceptance checks while keeping the backbone frozen. We evaluate on WebShop, PinchBench, and Claw-Eval with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and GPT-5.2. SkillAdaptor improves over no-skill and skill-adaptation baselines on all three suites, with the largest single-metric improvements of +1.5 points on PinchBench Avg Score%, +1.8 on Claw-Eval Avg Score, and +1.7 on WebShop success rate. These results indicate that step-level attribution supports more stable and auditable training-free skill maintenance\footnote{The code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/SkillAdaptor.}.

</details>


### [167] [Effects of Varying LLM Access on Essay Writing Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00250)
*Julia Christenson,Karin de Langis,Shirley Anugrah Hayati,Dongyeop Kang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究通过24名大学生的写作实验发现，有限制地使用LLM（≤3次提示，回复≤100词）能保持学生的 authorship 信心和组织收益，而无限制使用则降低创作表达和所有权感，但各组论文质量无显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM对大学教学的影响程度，以制定既能支持学生学习成果又不削弱学生能力的AI整合策略。

Method: 24名大学生随机分为三组（无LLM访问、有限访问≤3次提示且回复≤100词、无限访问），撰写短论文，比较写作表现、参与度和感知 authorship。

Result: 各组论文质量无统计差异；有限访问组62.5%愿将论文作为独立作业提交（无限组仅25%），组织收益更强，提示更具策略性和修订导向；无限组写作时间更长，论文与LLM输出更相似，创造性表达降低。

Conclusion: 限制而非完全禁止LLM访问，可以在保留AI脚手架收益的同时维护学生的 authorship 信心。

Abstract: Investigating the degree to which large language models (LLMs) affect teaching and learning in universities can help identify strategies for integrating LLMs in a way that supports, rather than undermines, student learning outcomes. This study examined how varying levels of LLM assistance affect writing performance, engagement, and perceived authorship. We report a pilot study in which 24 college students were randomly assigned to write a short essay with no LLM access, limited access (<=3 prompts, responses capped at 100 words), or unlimited access. Overall essay quality was statistically indistinguishable across groups. Yet writing behavior and perceived authorship diverged sharply: students with limited access reported higher ownership (62.5% would submit the essay as independent work, vs. 25% in the unlimited group), stronger organizational gains, and more strategic, revision-focused prompting. The unlimited group spent more time writing, produced essays more similar to LLM output, and reported reduced creative expression. Our findings suggest that constraining, rather than banning, LLM access may preserve authorship confidence while retaining the scaffolding benefits of AI assistance.

</details>


### [168] [Parameter Alignment Mitigates Catastrophic Forgetting in Multilingual Expert Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00284)
*Sanchit Ahuja,Terra Blevins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出五种层感知参数对齐策略（层冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退、模型融合）来解决多语言持续预训练中的灾难性遗忘问题，在32种语言、四个评估维度上系统比较后发现：参数对齐能在最小化语言获取损失的前提下大幅减少遗忘，不同策略对不同任务各有优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言持续预训练中，简单微调会导致灾难性遗忘，破坏已有能力；仅按语系组织训练不能完全防止通用知识的遗忘。

Method: 提出五种层感知参数对齐策略：硬层冻结、软正则化、事后权重回退和模型融合，在32种训练语言和留出语言上系统比较。

Result: 参数对齐大幅减少遗忘且语言获取损失极小；层冻结和正则化最佳保留理解能力，事后回退带来最强翻译提升。

Conclusion: 本研究绘制了语系专家CPT的获取-遗忘边界，并为不同策略匹配最适合的任务提供了实践部署指南。

Abstract: While continual pretraining~(CPT) is a practical way to extend large language models to new languages, naïve finetuning on targeted data erodes existing capabilities through catastrophic forgetting. Organizing training around language families reduces cross-language interference but cannot alone prevent forgetting of the general knowledge needed for downstream tasks. We link this forgetting to parameter drift in multilingual CPT and present a suite of five layer-aware parameter alignment strategies: hard layer freezing, soft regularization, post-hoc weight reversion, and model merging. We systematically compare our alignment strategies against two unregularized CPT baselines on benchmarks spanning 32 training languages from five language families, plus held-out languages, across four evaluation axes: perplexity, reading comprehension, physical reasoning, and translation. Parameter alignment substantially reduces forgetting at minimal cost to language acquisition: layer freezing and regularization best preserve comprehension, whereas post-hoc reversion yields the strongest translation gains. Together, these results map the acquisition--forgetting frontier for family-expert CPT and offer practical deployment guidelines pairing each strategy to the tasks it best serves.

</details>


### [169] [Model-Based Quality Assessment for Massively Multilingual Parallel Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00285)
*Abdelaziz M. A. Ibrahim,Zihao Li,Jörg Tiedemann,Shaoxiong Ji*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大规模多语言平行语料中存在的非平行句对和低质量翻译问题，将模型评估分解为平行性评估（多语言嵌入）和参考无关质量估计两个独立组件。在FLORES-200和BOUQuET检索任务上对4种嵌入模型进行了平行性基准测试，覆盖6,654个源-目标方向；在FLORES-200专业翻译上评估了9种参考无关评估器，覆盖41,412个有序源-目标方向。结果表明没有模型在所有翻译方向上普遍可靠，朴素的质量估计集成会稀释强模型信号，而目标语言的文档覆盖率与高质量估计分数密切相关。结论是：多语言平行数据评估应视为方向感知的路由和校准问题，不存在适用于所有语言的单一通用指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模多语言平行语料面临非平行句对和低质量翻译两大问题，需要有效的评估方法。

Method: 将模型评估分解为平行性评估（多语言嵌入模型）和参考无关质量估计（QE）两个独立组件，在多个翻译方向上对多种模型进行大规模基准测试。

Result: 没有模型在所有翻译方向上普遍可靠；朴素QE集成会稀释强模型信号；目标语言文档覆盖率与高质量估计分数强相关。

Conclusion: 多语言平行数据评估应视为方向感知的路由和校准问题，不存在适用于所有语言的单一通用指标。

Abstract: Large-scale multilingual bitext often contains two distinct problems: non-parallel sentence pairs and low-quality translations. We decompose model-based assessment for such data into two independent components: parallelism assessment with multilingual embeddings and reference-free quality estimation (QE). For parallelism, we benchmark four embedding models on FLORES-200 and BOUQuET retrieval tasks, covering 6,654 source--target directions in our target language-pair inventory. For QE, we evaluate nine reference-free evaluators on professional FLORES-200 translations across 41,412 ordered source--target directions. Results show that no model is universally reliable across translation directions. Naive QE ensembles dilute strong model signals, while documented target-language coverage is strongly associated with higher QE scores. Overall, these findings suggest that multilingual parallel-data assessment is best approached as a direction-aware routing and calibration problem, where no single universal metric is expected to suffice across all languages.

</details>


### [170] [Uncovering Temporal Framing in the News](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00294)
*Tarek Mahmoud,Veronika Solopova,Premtim Sahitaj,Ariana Sahitaj,Max Upravitelev,Mervat Abassy,Hana Fatima Shaikh,Neda Foroutan,Vera Schmitt,Preslav Nakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个时间框架（temporal framing）的分类体系，包含8种类型，并通过专家标注构建了一个包含458篇英德新闻文章（2000+时间框架句子、3000+标注）的多语种语料库。实验表明，时间框架检测在句子级别是可学习的，监督模型显著优于零样本方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间性语言不仅用于描述事件的时间顺序，在新闻话语中还可作为修辞手段影响读者对信息的解读和说服效果。现有研究缺乏对时间框架（temporal framing）的系统定义、分类体系和标注数据集。

Method: （1）提出基于时间性和框架理论的8类时间框架分类体系；（2）通过专家标注构建英德双语新闻语料库（458篇文章，20K+句子，2K+时间框架句子，3K+标注）；（3）使用监督微调和零样本分类评估时间框架检测性能。

Result: 构建了包含458篇英德新闻文章、超过2K个时间框架句子和约3K个时间框架标注的数据集；实验表明时间框架检测在句子级别是可学习的，监督模型显著优于零样本方法。

Conclusion: 时间框架检测在句子级别是可行的，监督模型效果远好于零样本方法；论文公开了语料库以推动时间框架领域的研究。

Abstract: Temporal language does more than place events on a timeline. In news discourse, references to the past, present, and future can function as rhetorical devices that shape interpretation and persuasion. Here, we study temporal framing, defined as the persuasive use of time-related language to structure meaning rather than to report chronology. We propose a taxonomy of eight temporal frames grounded in prior work on temporality and framing, and we realize it through expert annotation of a multilingual news corpus. The resulting dataset includes 458 English and German news articles, with over 2K temporally framed sentences and approximately 3K temporal framing annotations identified from a corpus of more than 20K sentences. We analyze frame prevalence, co-occurrence patterns, and lexical cues, and evaluate temporal framing detection using supervised fine-tuning and zero-shot classification. Our experiments show that temporal framing is learnable at the sentence level, with supervised models substantially outperforming zero-shot approaches. We publicly release the corpus to support future research on temporal framing: https://mbzuai-nlp.github.io/temporal-framing/.

</details>


### [171] [Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00305)
*Yuxuan Jiang,Francis Ferraro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文指出现有的同策略蒸馏（OPD）方法虽然基于轨迹采样，但学习信号仍是token级别的，这导致其无法有效弥合学生与教师轨迹之间的差距。作者提出轨迹感知的TOPD方法，利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正的发散状态并跨多个未来token分配指导，在多项数学推理基准上取得了显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OPD方法存在"轨迹采样但token学习"的矛盾：约30%的高损失token处于低散度区域（表面形式不匹配而非真正的推理分叉），且即使真正的发散token也难以通过孤立的token级监督修复，因为推理失败往往表现为短视的分布漂移。

Method: 提出Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD)：利用近未来轨迹信息识别真正的发散状态，并跨多个未来token分布指导，而非仅对单个高损失token进行局部反向KL修正。

Result: 抑制非发散的高损失token将OPD从47.8%提升至48.2%，TOPD进一步提升至52.2%。AIME24从60.0%提升至63.3%，AIME25从46.7%提升至53.3%。

Conclusion: TOPD通过引入轨迹级别的感知能力，有效解决了OPD中token级监督的局限性，显著提升了大语言模型在复杂推理任务上的性能。

Abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

</details>


### [172] [Which Institutional Frameworks Do Chatbots Assume? Auditing Jurisdictional Defaults in Multilingual LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00333)
*Zhizhi Wang,Harini Suresh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，当用户未明确指定管辖区时，LLM会默认根据输入语言选择法律行政框架：中文输入倾向生成中国相关答案，英文输入倾向生成美国相关答案。这种模式在七个模型中一致出现，可能导致用户获得不适用于其意图管辖区的回答，构成"制度框架误选风险"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言用户可能用自己最熟悉的语言提问，但该语言不一定对应其想咨询的司法管辖区。现有审计显示输入语言会影响模型输出，但尚未系统研究语言如何影响模型对法律行政管辖区的默认选择，特别是当提示中未指定国家或地区时。

Method: 选取7个中美开发的LLM，使用60个未指定管辖权的法律行政类提示（中英文各半），在三种系统提示条件下测试，共收集2,520条人工标注的回答。

Result: 中文输入更常产生中国特有答案，英文输入更常产生美国特有、对比性或通用答案。在需要单一答案的场景下，74.5%的英文输入回答采用美国框架，53.3%的中文输入回答采用中国框架。该方向性模式在所有七个模型中一致出现。

Conclusion: LLM不应仅凭输入语言推断司法管辖区；当用户未提供位置信息时，系统应主动询问或明确说明回答的管辖范围，以避免制度框架误选风险。

Abstract: LLMs increasingly answer questions about taxes, labor protections, healthcare, education, pensions, and administrative procedures, where usefulness often depends on the applicable jurisdiction. Multilingual users may write in their most comfortable language rather than one associated with the country or region whose rules apply. We ask whether deployed LLMs use input language as a default jurisdictional signal when prompts omit any country or region. Prior multilingual audits show that prompt language can shift cultural, political, or normative outputs; we examine which legal-administrative framework models supply when jurisdiction is underspecified. We evaluate seven LLMs developed in the United States or China on 60 underspecified legal-administrative prompts in English and Mandarin Chinese under three system-prompt conditions, yielding 2,520 manually annotated responses. Across models and conditions, Chinese input more often produces China-specific answers, while English input more often produces U.S.-specific, comparative, or generic answers. Prompts requiring a single answer further increase jurisdiction selection: pooled across models, 74.5% of English-input responses adopt a U.S. framework, while 53.3% of Chinese-input responses adopt a China framework. This directional pattern appears in all seven models. We describe this deployment-level pattern as institutional-framework misselection risk: a fluent answer may rely on a legal-administrative context the user did not intend, especially when their preferred language differs from the relevant jurisdiction. LLM interfaces should not route institutional advice by input language alone; when location is absent, they should request it or state the jurisdictional scope of the answer.

</details>


### [173] [Isolating LLM Lexical Bias: A Curation-Free Triangulated Metric for Preference-Stage Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00334)
*Xiaoyang Ming,Jose Hernandez,Thomas Stephan Juzek*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无需人工标注的三角测量偏好偏移分数（TPS），用于量化大语言模型在偏好学习阶段（如RLHF）中产生的词法偏移，并通过六个模型系列验证了该方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究依赖人工标注来检测偏好训练引发的词法偏差，缺乏自动化、可量化的评估方法。

Method: 提出Triangulated Preference Shift（TPS）分数，通过三角测量人类金标准、基础模型和指令变体之间的差异，隔离偏好学习引入的词汇偏移。

Result: 在六个模型系列上提供了数据，验证了TPS指标的有效性，并分析了偏好学习是否使模型趋向“语言威望”现象。

Conclusion: TPS提供了一种自动量化偏好调优行为偏移的方法，有助于模型对齐和可信AI的开发。

Abstract: Various language domains have undergone remarkable changes in recent years; these shifts are largely attributed to the advent of Large Language Models and their misalignment with natural language usage. These misalignments are thought to partly originate in the preference-learning stage, e.g. Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, which generally makes models more useful but simultaneously may introduce systematic lexical bias. In terms of lexical behavior, this is visible in a model's preference for certain formats or the overuse of words (delve, furthermore), even when such patterns are not present in base model outputs. Research on lexical misalignment induced during preference training is constrained by reliance on manual curation. We address this, by introducing the Triangulated Preference Shift score, a metric that triangulates between human gold standards, base models, and instruct variants to isolate shifts induced specifically by preference learning, without manual curation. We provide data across six model families, anchor the results in the literature, and illustrate the general approach's utility by analyzing whether preference learning shifts models toward what could be interpreted as a "language of prestige". The metric provides an initial automated method to quantify behavioral shifts attributable to preference tuning, and thus, may help inform model alignment and development of trustworthy AI.

</details>


### [174] [How Far Do Auto-Interpretation Labels Generalize: A Controlled Study Across Languages, Scripts, and Rewordings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00356)
*Sripad Karne*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 自动解释标签不能很好地泛化到不同语言和文字上，即使在塞尔维亚语的双字母系统中，标签也会遗漏相同语义，且错误率随网络深度增加，但标签本身并未提示其失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估稀疏自编码器特征的自动解释标签是否能够跨语言和文字泛化，即标签是否真正反映了特征所代表的概念。

Method: 利用塞尔维亚语双字母系统（拉丁字母和西里尔字母可通过确定性音译转换）作为受控测试平台，比较不同语言、文字和措辞下激活的SAE特征集的重叠程度，并测试自动解释标签的泛化能力。

Result: SAE特征集在不同语言/文字/措辞下存在显著重叠（峰值Jaccard相似度0.57 vs 随机基线0.13），但自动解释标签经常无法泛化：标签描述语义内容的特征在塞尔维亚语中遗漏相同含义的频率比英语高4倍，且塞尔维亚西里尔字母的遗漏率高于拉丁字母；遗漏率随网络深度增加。

Conclusion: 自动解释标签可能反映的是特征在训练充分输入上的行为，而非概念本身；标签未提供其失败的任何指示。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features are increasingly used to interpret language models, with auto-generated natural-language labels serving as the primary interface for understanding what each feature represents. We ask whether these labels generalize: does a feature labeled for a concept actually track that concept across languages and scripts? Using Serbian digraphia as a controlled testbed -- the same language written in both Latin and Cyrillic via deterministic transliteration -- we first find that SAE feature sets activated by the same content in different languages, scripts, and wordings share substantial overlap (peak Jaccard similarity 0.57 vs.\ 0.13 random baseline), suggesting genuine cross-lingual semantic features. We then test whether auto-interpretation labels keep pace. They often do not: features whose labels describe semantic content miss the same meaning in Serbian up to $4\times$ more often than within English, and miss Serbian Cyrillic more than Serbian Latin -- two scripts that are deterministic transliterations of each other -- suggesting the failures track how well each form is represented in training. The gap grows with network depth, yet the labels give no indication that they fail. These results suggest that auto-interpretation labels may reflect a feature's behavior on well-represented inputs rather than the concept itself.

</details>


### [175] [Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00408)
*Haoxiang Zhang,Qixin Xu,Zhuofeng Li,Lei Zhang,Pengcheng Jiang,Yu Zhang,Julian McAuley*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了长程搜索智能体中的观察掩蔽（observation masking）技术，发现其效果呈现非对称倒U型曲线：在弱检索器下效果平缓，强检索器配合中等容量模型时达到峰值，模型饱和时则急剧下降。掩蔽机制通过删除模型不再关注的旧观察结果来换取更多交互轮次，但可能误删关键证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长程搜索智能体在多次工具调用中积累大量检索内容，上下文预算效率日益重要。观察掩蔽作为一种最小干预手段，其何时有效以及为何有效尚不明确，亟需系统研究。

Method: 在多种智能体骨干模型（4B到284B参数）和三种检索器上，对离线及在线网页搜索基准进行系统实验，通过消融实验和注意力机制分析揭示掩蔽的底层机制。

Result: 掩蔽的准确率增益呈现非对称倒U型曲线；掩蔽移除了模型注意力已大幅衰减的旧观察和罕见重新打开的页面；新增轮次在能将失败转为成功时有效，但在移除模型本会使用的证据时失败。

Conclusion: 上下文管理应被视为一种依赖于模型-检索器匹配状态的干预手段，而非通用策略。研究提供了分析智能体深度搜索中上下文使用的整体视角。

Abstract: Long-horizon search agents accumulate large amounts of retrieved content across many tool calls, making context-budget efficiency increasingly important. A minimal intervention is to mask stale observations from the context as the trajectory progresses, but it remains unclear when this form of context management helps and why. We study observation masking through a systematic sweep over various agent backbones (4B to 284B parameters) and three retrievers on offline and live-web agentic search benchmarks. We find that the accuracy gain from masking follows an asymmetric inverted-U shape when plotted against the model's accuracy without context management: a plateau under weak retrievers, a peak when a strong retriever meets a mid-capacity model, and a sharp collapse when the model is saturated. This pattern reflects the interaction between retriever recall and the model's implicit filtering capacity, rather than either factor in isolation. Mechanistically, masking implements a token-for-turn trade-off: it removes observations the model has largely stopped attending to and pages the agent rarely re-opens. The added turns help when they convert failures into successes, but they fail when masking removes evidence the model would otherwise have used. We therefore reframe context management as a regime-dependent intervention and provide a holistic perspective for analyzing context use in agentic deep search. We release our scaffold and trajectories here (https://github.com/i-DeepSearch/observation-masking) to support future research.

</details>


### [176] [ProtStructQA: A Denotation Threshold in Protein Structural Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00451)
*Aravind Mandiga,Guoming Li,Jin Lu,Ismailcem Budak Arpinar,Khaled Rasheed,Samuel E. Aggrey*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ProtStructQA是一个用于蛋白质结构问答的可执行基准测试，包含38.2万个问题，将自然语言问题映射到可执行的3D结构测量上。研究发现模型存在能力依赖的指称阈值：低于该阈值时工具使用占优，高于该阈值时思维链策略效果最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有蛋白质语言系统评估多基于生成可读文本，但结构性问题具有更精确的语义——它表示3D坐标系中的测量。因此需要一种能够将自然语言问题编译为可执行结构测量的评估方法。

Method: 构建ProtStructQA基准，从隐藏的DSL程序生成自然语言问题，在AlphaFold预测结构上执行程序获取答案；包含38.2万问题（置信度、距离、PAE、溶剂暴露、二级结构、拓扑、接触），评估Qwen3系列（0.6B-8B）和Gemma-3在多种策略下的表现。

Result: 发现能力依赖的指称阈值（Qwen3-1.7B和4B之间）：低于阈值时ReAct工具使用占优，高于阈值时思维链从有害转为有益成为最强策略。语法约束和执行对于PAE和二级结构查询仍有选择性价值。

Conclusion: ProtStructQA将科学问答重新定义为从语言到测量的编译过程，为评估语言模型将词语映射为可执行3D结构测量的能力提供了诊断测试平台。

Abstract: Protein-language systems are often evaluated by whether they generate plausible biological text, but a structural question has a sharper semantics: it denotes a measurement in a 3D coordinate system. We introduce ProtStructQA, an executable benchmark for protein structural question answering in which each natural-language question is generated from a hidden typed domain-specific language (DSL) program and the answer is obtained by executing that program on an AlphaFold-predicted structure. ProtStructQA releases 382.2K questions covering confidence, distances, predicted aligned error (PAE), solvent exposure, secondary structure, topology and contacts, and held-out compositions: a 330K active benchmark over 10K proteins from four species, plus a 52.2K hard-negative robustness pool. Without fine-tuning, we evaluate Qwen3 models from 0.6B to 8B under direct prompting, chain-of-thought, grammar-constrained executable voting, executable voting with chain-of-thought, and multi-turn ReAct-style tool use, and replicate the headline finding on Gemma-3-1B and Gemma-3-12B. We find a capability-dependent denotation threshold between Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B: below it, tool-mediated ReAct dominates because models often fail to produce executable denotations; above it, chain-of-thought flips from mostly harmful to strongly beneficial and becomes the strongest strategy on most splits. Parse-failure and family-level analyses show that the threshold is a transition from unparseable language to executable structural denotation, while grammar and execution remain selectively valuable for PAE and secondary-structure queries. ProtStructQA reframes scientific QA as compilation from language to measurement and provides a diagnostic testbed for when language models can map words to executable 3D structural measurements.

</details>


### [177] [SALSA: Speech Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activation Vectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00460)
*Yekaterina Yegorova,Argyrios Gerogiannis,Haolong Zheng,Julia Hockenmaier,Chang D. Yoo,Mark A. Hasegawa-Johnson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SALSA方法，通过学习逐层引导向量来提升语音大模型在域外场景的泛化能力，在儿童语音、多语种语音和中英代码转换任务上最高获得46.8%的相对提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语音感知的大语言模型在域外场景（如儿童语音、多语种、代码转换）中泛化能力较差，现有方法难以有效适应。

Method: SALSA方法：学习逐层的引导向量（steering vectors），通过监督目标直接优化，而非传统的对比式激活差异方法。

Result: 在儿童语音、多语种语音和中英代码转换基准上，相比零样本推理和语音上下文学习基线，SALSA显著提升性能，最高相对改进达46.8%。

Conclusion: 引导编码器（特别是较深层）比引导LLM骨干更有效；引导通过调整高层声学与语音表征以更好地对齐预训练语言模型表征空间来提升ASR性能。

Abstract: Speech-aware large language models often generalize poorly to out-of-domain settings. We propose SALSA (Speech-Aware LLM Adaptation via Learned Steering Activations), a lightweight adaptation method that learns layer-wise steering vectors. Unlike commonly used steering approaches that rely on contrastive activation differences, SALSA directly optimizes steering vectors using a supervised objective. Across children's speech, multilingual speech, and Mandarin-English code-switching benchmarks, SALSA substantially improves performance over zero-shot inference and speech in-context learning baselines, achieving up to 46.8% relative improvements over zero-shot. Analysis further demonstrates that steering the encoder, particularly the later layers, is more effective than steering the LLM backbone. These findings suggest that steering improves downstream ASR performance by adapting higher-level acoustic and phonetic representations to better align with the pretrained language model representation space, rather than by modifying the decoder itself.

</details>


### [178] [Short-form Text Rewriting with Phi Silica](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00462)
*Divya Tadimeti,Shawn Pan,Sameera Lanka,Chenghui Zhou,Sadid Hasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过数据集构建、提示蒸馏、参数高效微调和评估，研究了如何将小语言模型Phi Silica适配到短文本改写任务中。实验表明，微调能提升语义保真度、减少幻觉，并提高对GPT-5-chat改写的胜率，缩小了小模型与云端大模型之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 短文本改写是一种受约束的释义任务，上下文有限且语义密度高，小语言模型在此场景下常面临语义保真度不足和幻觉鲁棒性差的问题，亟需针对性的适配方法。

Method: 使用公开幻灯片构建短文本数据集，通过GPT-5-chat生成改写监督信号并进行LLM-as-a-judge评估，采用参数高效微调方法适配Phi Silica模型。

Result: 微调后的Phi Silica在语义保真度、幻觉减少和与GPT-5-chat改写的胜率上均有显著提升。

Conclusion: 针对性的适配可以大幅缩小小语言模型与云端大模型在短文本改写任务上的性能差距，为精度敏感的改写任务提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Short-form text rewriting is a constrained variant of paraphrasing in which limited context and high semantic density leave little room for variation. While large language models perform well on general paraphrasing, small language models (SLMs) often struggle with semantic fidelity and hallucination robustness in short-form settings. In this work, we present an empirical study of adapting an SLM, Phi Silica, for short-form rewrite through dataset curation, prompt distillation, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, and evaluation. We curate a dataset of short presentation-style text from public slide decks and use GPT-5-chat both to generate rewrite supervision and to conduct LLM-as-a-judge evaluation. Our results show that finetuning improves semantic fidelity, reduces hallucinations, and increases preference win rate against GPT-5-chat rewrites. The findings suggest that targeted adaptation for SLMs can substantially narrow the gap to cloud models and provide practical guidance for adapting SLMs to precision-critical rewrite tasks.

</details>


### [179] [On the Limits of LLM Adaptability: Impact of Model-Internalized Priors on Annotation Task Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00467)
*Etienne Casanova,Rafal Kocielnik,R. Michael Alvarez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究揭示了LLM在零样本标注任务中的局限性：近三分之二的错误无法通过提示修正（救援率仅34.8%），高置信度错误尤其顽固；当给出错误定义时，模型会盲从且置信度不变。提出定义特定熟悉度（DSF）指标，发现其与模型性能正相关（偏相关r=+0.41），而传统记忆化指标均不相关，强调定义对齐比文本记忆更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究LLM内部先验知识与用户指令之间的交互如何影响零样本标注和LLM-as-a-judge任务的可靠性，特别是了解提示修正的局限性以及定义对齐的重要性。

Method: 在多个毒性检测数据集（社交媒体、游戏、新闻、论坛）上，使用稠密模型和混合专家模型进行实验，测量（1）模型对数据和任务定义的熟悉度对性能的影响，（2）提示中额外信息纠正零样本错误的能力（"决策粘性"），（3）模型对错误任务定义的敏感性。并引入定义特定熟悉度（DSF）指标。

Result: 零样本错误中近三分之二无法通过提示修正，救援率仅34.8%；高置信度错误抵抗修正能力最强；模型会遵循错误定义但置信度不变；DSF与模型性能呈正相关（偏相关r=+0.41），而ROUGE-L、BERTScore、嵌入余弦相似度等记忆化指标均未呈正相关。

Conclusion: 提示修正方法在标注任务中存在显著局限性，定义对齐（而非文本级记忆）对模型性能更为关键。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for zero-shot annotation and LLM-as-a-judge tasks, yet their reliability hinges on how model-internalized priors interact with user-provided instructions. We investigate three dimensions of this interaction: (1) how an LLM's familiarity with data and task definitions affects performance, (2) the extent to which additional information in prompts can correct zero-shot errors ("decision stickiness"), and (3) model susceptibility to misaligned task definitions. Through experiments on toxicity detection across diverse datasets (spanning social media, gaming, news, and forums) using both dense and mixture-of-experts models, we find that nearly two-thirds of zero-shot errors are resistant to correction, with an overall rescue rate (fraction of initial errors corrected by prompting) of only 34.8%. High-confidence errors prove especially resistant to correction. When given misaligned definitions, LLMs follow them while maintaining confidence levels unchanged from the aligned condition. Crucially, we introduce Definition-Specific Familiarity (DSF), which measures alignment between a model's internal concept and the task definition. After controlling for dataset-level confounds, DSF shows a positive association with model performance (partial r = +0.41), while three distinct memorization metrics (ROUGE-L, BERTScore, and embedding cosine similarity) all fail to show a positive association. These findings show the limitations of prompt-based correction in annotation tasks, highlighting the importance of definition alignment over text-level memorization.

</details>


### [180] [Do Text Edits Generalize to Visual Generation? Benchmarking Cross-Modal Knowledge Editing in UMMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00477)
*Xin Gao,Cheng Yang,Chufan Shi,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出UniKE基准，研究统一多模态模型中的跨模态知识编辑问题，发现文本编辑成功率高达92%但图像生成仅有18.5%准确率，并提出推理增强参数编辑方法提升跨模态编辑效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 统一多模态模型在实际部署中需要有效更新内部知识，但现有知识编辑方法仅针对纯文本模型，不清楚文本编辑能否成功迁移到图像生成任务上。

Method: 构建UniKE基准（2971个编辑主题，涵盖属性和关系编辑），采用VQA视觉验证评估；提出推理增强参数编辑方法（Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing），在生成前显式激活编辑知识。

Result: 文本侧编辑成功率约92%，而直接图像生成的最佳VQA准确率仅18.5%；提出的方法可提升所有模型-编辑器对的VQA准确率，最高提升18.6个百分点。

Conclusion: 文本知识编辑无法保证可靠的跨模态迁移，需要模态感知的编辑方法；编辑效果差距与文本表示与视觉生成条件路径之间的对齐程度有关。

Abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for general-purpose multimodal intelligence. As they are deployed in real-world applications, effectively updating internal knowledge becomes critical. While knowledge editing has matured for text-only models, it remains unclear whether edits that successfully modify textual outputs also transfer to image generation in UMMs. To study this question, we introduce UniKE, the first benchmark for cross-modality knowledge editing in UMMs, comprising 2,971 edit subjects spanning attribute and relation edits. Using VQA-based visual verification, we reveal a striking modality gap: text-side efficacy can reach approximately 92%, whereas the best overall VQA accuracy under direct image generation is only 18.5%. We further propose Reasoning-augmented Parameter Editing, which explicitly activates edited knowledge before generation and improves overall VQA accuracy for all evaluated model-editor pairs, with gains up to 18.6 percentage points. Mechanistic analysis shows that this gap is associated with partial alignment between edited textual representations and the conditioning pathways for visual generation, where edits sufficient for text outputs may remain too weak or misaligned to steer image synthesis. These findings show that textual knowledge edits do not guarantee reliable cross-modality transfer and motivate modality-aware editing methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/gxx27/UniKE.

</details>


### [181] [LaSR: Context-Aware Speech Recognition via Latent Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00507)
*Heyang Liu,Ziyang Cheng,Jiayi Huang,Wenyang Xiao,Ronghua Wu,Qunshan Gu,Yanfeng Wang,Yu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出LaSR训练范式，通过潜在推理轨迹增强语音大语言模型的上下文感知能力，无需显式中间token即可提升术语识别性能，并在Fun-Audio-Chat数据集上取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音大语言模型的情境感知能力有限，难以在语音识别中有效反映说话者意图和话题上下文。

Method: 提出LaSR（潜在语音推理）训练范式，在目标词的声学特征区域对齐思维链（CoT）监督，并引入潜在推理周期进行上下文信息锚定和转录过渡；同时构建Spoken Darwin-Science学术术语语料库用于基准测试。

Result: 在Fun-Audio-Chat上的实验表明，LaSR在不引入额外延迟的情况下显著提升了术语识别性能，且一致优于标准监督微调基线。

Conclusion: 潜在推理在构建高效、上下文感知的语音助手上具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: Recent advances in Speech Large Language Models (Speech LLMs) have significantly enhanced spoken language understanding and reasoning. However, their contextual awareness is limited, struggling to perform speech recognition that effectively reflects the speaker's intent and topical context. In this paper, we propose LaSR (Latent Speech Reasoning), a novel training paradigm featuring a context-aware reasoning trajectory that leverages the latent reasoning process. Instead of generating explicit intermediate tokens, LaSR aligns chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision around the acoustic feature region of the targeted word, and introduces latent reasoning periods for context information grounding and transcriptional transition. Furthermore, to effectively benchmark contextual recognition on specialized vocabulary, we propose Spoken Darwin-Science, a large-scale corpus focusing on academic terminologies. Preliminary experiments on Fun-Audio-Chat demonstrate that LaSR significantly improves terminology recognition without introducing additional latency and consistently outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning baselines. Our findings highlight the potential of latent reasoning in building efficient, context-aware speech assistants.

</details>


### [182] [Skill or Skip? Learning Selective Skill Invocation in Agentic Tasks via Dual-Granularity Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00510)
*Chishui Chen,Jiaye Lin,Te Sun,Junxi Wang,Yi Yang,Cong Qin,Yangen Hu,Lu Pan,Ke Zeng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SelSkill框架，通过双粒度偏好学习实现智能体技能的选择性调用，在多个基准上显著提升任务成功率和执行精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注选择相关技能或改进技能本身，而忽略了在决策点是否真正应该调用该技能的问题，不恰当的调用会引入无关上下文并干扰正确的执行流程。

Method: 提出SelSkill双粒度偏好学习框架，将技能使用建模为"调用或跳过"的决策，利用预测不确定性优先处理候选决策点，从共享轨迹前缀构建受控的调用-跳过偏好对，并融合回合级结果偏好与步骤级调用偏好以同时捕获整体轨迹质量和局部调用有效性。

Result: 在ALFWorld上（Qwen3-8B）任务成功率提升10.9个百分点，执行精度提升29.1个百分点；在BFCL上任务成功率提升5.7个百分点，执行精度提升29.5个百分点；在Tau-bench和PopQA上的零样本结果进一步表明所学调用策略可迁移到包含未见技能的新领域。

Conclusion: SelSkill通过选择性技能调用有效提升了智能体任务执行的质量，且具有良好的跨域泛化能力。

Abstract: Agent skills are callable procedural modules that provide reusable knowledge and execution policies for complex agentic tasks. However, existing methods mainly focus on selecting relevant skills or improving the skills themselves, while overlooking whether a relevant skill should actually be invoked at the current decision point. Unhelpful invocations may introduce irrelevant context and disrupt an otherwise correct execution process. To address this issue, we propose SelSkill, a dual-granularity preference-learning framework for selective skill invocation. SelSkill formulates skill use as a skill-or-skip decision, uses predictive uncertainty to prioritize candidate decision points, and constructs controlled invoke-skip preference pairs from shared trajectory prefixes. It further combines episode-level outcome preferences with step-level invocation preferences to capture both overall trajectory quality and the local effectiveness of skill invocation. On ALFWorld with Qwen3-8B, SelSkill improves task success by 10.9 percentage points and execution precision by 29.1 percentage points. On BFCL, it improves task success by 5.7 percentage points and execution precision by 29.5 percentage points. Zero-shot results on Tau-bench and PopQA further suggest that the learned invocation policy transfers to new domains with previously unseen skills.

</details>


### [183] [ProactiveLLM: Learning Active Interaction for Streaming Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00523)
*Junlong Tong,Yao Zhang,Anhao Zhao,Yingqi Fan,Yunpu Ma,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL
