To assess its prevalence, we introduce \emph{PrivacyPeek}, a benchmark for evaluating acquisition-stage privacy leakage of LLM-based agents, with $1{,}182$ cases across $7$ acquisition behaviours and $16$ application domains. Specifically, \emph{Acquisition Inspection} examines the agent's tool-call trajectory, both the tools it invokes and the data it receives, to detect when it acquires sensitive information beyond the task scope. \emph{Probe Elicitation} then issues a follow-up probe and measures how readily an attacker could elicit sensitive information the agent acquired but did not disclose. Our experiments on 10 LLM-based agents across 4 model families show that the unnecessary acquisition of sensitive information is widespread. In addition, we observe a correlation between the task-completion capability and acquisition-stage leakage. Prompt-level defences reduce only a small fraction of acquisition-stage leakage, leaving the majority unmitigated. These results make auditing acquisition-stage privacy both urgent and necessary. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/Xuan269/PrivacyPeek-Resource.

</details>


### [446] [A Protocol-Language Model for Network Intrusion (Without Deep Packet Inspection)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00155)
*Vivek Kumar Sharma*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PLM-NIDS利用RWKV-4状态空间模型将网络流量的L3/L4数据包元数据作为语言建模，通过困惑度分数实现零样本异常检测（PR-AUC=0.93），并在加密流量下保持有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代NIDS面临结构性矛盾：威胁情报最高的协议（TLS 1.3、QUIC）恰恰加密了有效载荷，传统的字节级检测失效。作者提出一个更简单的问题：如果攻击特征不在字节中，而在节奏（rhythm）中？

Method: 将网络流视为一种语法完全由L3/L4数据包元数据（长度、到达间隔时间、TTL、TCP标志、哈希端口号）构成的语言。使用RWKV-4状态空间模型在344,232个无标签的良性流量上预训练，通过困惑度（perplexity）分数检测异常；并与LSTM对比，再通过有监督微调提升性能。

Result: 预训练因果LM验证损失0.204；零样本检测PR-AUC=0.93；LSTM退化为多数类预测器（ROC-AUC≈0.50），证明RWKV的因果预训练提供了独特归纳偏置。有监督微调后PR-AUC=0.94，ROC-AUC=0.75，精确率97.7%。RWKV的O(T)递归推理支持逐数据包流式处理。

Conclusion: PLM-NIDS提出加密流量场景下不依赖有效载荷的异常检测新范式，完全兼容TLS 1.3、QUIC等加密协议，且具备线速率流式处理能力，证明了网络流元数据本身蕴含可学习的语法结构。

Abstract: Modern network intrusion detection systems (NIDS) are caught in a structural contradiction: the protocols carrying the highest threat intelligence are precisely those encrypted under TLS 1.3 and QUIC, where payload inspection yields nothing. We ask a simpler question -- what if the attack signature is not in the bytes, but in the rhythm? -- and answer it by treating network flows as a language whose grammar is written entirely in L3/L4 packet metadata: length, inter-arrival time, TTL, TCP flags, and hashed port numbers. We present PLM-NIDS, which proves three claims in sequence. (1) The grammar exists and is learnable: a RWKV-4 state-space model trained on 344,232 unlabelled Monday flows achieves a causal LM validation loss of 0.204, demonstrating that benign traffic has predictable, statistically consistent structure. (2) Attacks violate this grammar: the per-flow perplexity score cleanly separates benign from attack flows with PR-AUC = 0.93 using zero attack labels at training time. (3) This separation is architecturally nontrivial: an LSTM trained on identical token sequences degenerates to a majority-class predictor (ROC-AUC approximately 0.50, F1 = 0.91 by always predicting "attack"), proving that RWKV's causal pre-training provides an inductive bias unavailable to direct classifiers. Supervised fine-tuning further raises PR-AUC to 0.94 and ROC-AUC to 0.75, with a precision of 97.7% at the calibrated operating threshold. The RWKV backbone's O(T) recurrent inference enables per-packet streaming without flow buffering, making PLM-NIDS operationally viable at line rate. Because it reads only IP/TCP/UDP headers, it is inherently encryption-agnostic: TLS 1.3, QUIC, and future encrypted protocols are handled transparently.

</details>


### [447] [DataShield: Safety-degrading Data Filtering for LLM Benign Instruction Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00160)
*Junbo Zhang,Qianli Zhou,Xinyang Deng,Wen Jiang,Jie Pan,Jinbiao Zhu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: DataShield是一种高效识别良性数据集中导致LLM安全能力下降的样本的方法。它通过量化样本对模型顺从行为的贡献度来识别高风险数据，在Llama3-8B等模型上验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在微调良性数据集时也会出现安全能力下降的问题，而现有识别安全退化样本的方法计算成本高且噪声大。

Method: 提出DataShield方法，包含三个核心组件：(1) 顺从向量提取——捕捉LLM的顺从行为倾向；(2) 顺从感知分数(CAS)——自动识别最优安全关键层；(3) 安全退化样本过滤——量化训练数据沿顺从方向的投影偏移。

Result: 在Llama3-8B、Llama3.1-8B和Qwen2.5-7B上使用Alpaca和Dolly数据集验证了方法的有效性，能够有效识别高/低风险数据子集。

Conclusion: 开放性问答更容易触发安全退化，对应回答通常更长。该工作为数据中心的防御方法提供了新见解。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) suffer from degraded safety capabilities even when fine-tuned with benign datasets. However, existing methods for identifying safety-degrading samples in benign datasets suffer from high computational costs and significant noise issues. In this paper, we propose DataShield to efficiently and effectively identify potential safety-degrading samples. Our key intuition is based on the observation that benign fine-tuning increases the overall response compliance of LLMs. DataShield's key technical insight is to quantify each sample's contribution to the model's compliance behavior as its safety degradation score. DataShield consists of three core components: (1) Compliance Vector Extraction, which captures the LLM's compliance behavior tendency; (2) a novel Compliance-Aware Score (CAS), which automatically identifies the optimal safety-critical layer; and (3) Safety-degrading Sample Filtering, which quantifies the projection shift of training data along the compliance direction. Extensive experimental evaluation on Llama3-8B, Llama3.1-8B, and Qwen2.5-7B using the Alpaca and Dolly benign datasets validates our method's effectiveness in identifying high-risk and low-risk data subsets. We also observe that open-ended question answering is more likely to trigger safety degradation, and corresponding responses tend to be longer. We hope this work can provide new insights into data-centric defense methods. The source code is available at: https://github.com/ZJunBo/DataShield.

</details>


### [448] [Improving IoT Intrusion Detection Through SMOTE-Based Oversampling and Extended Multi-Model Evaluation on Side-Channel Power Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00161)
*Muhammad Khuram Shahzad,Haseeb Khan,Muhammad Masood Khan,Mubashra Bibi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对IoT网络入侵检测中极端类别不平衡问题（正常样本与攻击样本比例高达75,964:1），采用SMOTE过采样技术平衡数据集，并对比8种机器学习算法。随机森林和Extra Trees均取得最佳性能（微平均F1=0.9989），但Extra Trees速度快10倍。引入宏平均F1指标揭示了被聚合指标掩盖的类别级信息，SMOTE平衡对少数攻击类的可靠检测至关重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于功率的物联网入侵检测方法（Dominguez等人）未解决极端类别不平衡问题，且未使用平衡训练集评估分类器性能，导致模型对少数攻击类的检测能力不明。

Method: 对原始数据集提取的9个子集应用SMOTE过采样，使不平衡比精确达到1.1；在平衡后的6小时数据集上训练8种算法（随机森林、HistGradientBoosting、LightGBM、Extra Trees、XGBoost、k-NN、MLP、决策树）；使用混淆矩阵、F1热力图、ROC曲线进行细粒度评估；进行特征重要性分析。

Result: 随机森林取得微平均F1=0.9989、宏平均F1=0.9794，超越基线论文的0.9983；Extra Trees性能相同但速度快10倍；SMOTE平衡是可靠检测少数攻击类（尤其是组合M+L感染）的必要条件；60步功率窗口中最后时间步特征最重要。

Conclusion: SMOTE过采样结合集成学习能有效解决IoT入侵检测中的极端类别不平衡问题，引入宏平均F1等细粒度评估指标对发现模型在少数类上的真实表现至关重要。

Abstract: The detection of intrusions in IoT-based networks poses challenges that cannot be overcome using traditional machine learning methods. Perhaps the biggest of them is related to the presence of a class imbalance in the side-channel dataset, where the number of samples in the normal class compared to the attacks can reach a ratio of 75,964 to 1. Such an aspect is addressed by Dominguez et al. through the proof of concept of power-based intrusion detection. Unfortunately, neither the authors attempt to cope with the problem of imbalance nor do they assess the classifier performance using a balanced training set. In the current paper, both aspects will be handled at once. First, a Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique (SMOTE) was performed on all nine possible datasets extracted from the initial one, providing an exact imbalance ratio of 1.1 for each. Then, eight algorithms i.e. Random Forest, HistGradientBoosting, LightGBM, Extra Trees, XGBoost, k-Nearest Neighbors, Multi-Layer Perceptron, and Decision Tree were trained under identical conditions for the SMOTE balanced 6-hour dataset. Random Forest reached a micro-averaged F1 score of 0.9989 and macro F1 of 0.9794, thus outperforming the previously best micro-F1 result obtained by Time Series Forest algorithm from the base paper of 0.9983. Extra Trees provided the same performance as well, but at 10 times faster. The introduction of a macro-F1 metric explicitly in contrast to the base paper assessment reveals important class-level information missed with aggregate performance metrics. Recall rates per-class calculated with confusion matrices, F1 heatmaps, and ROC curves show that minority attack classes, especially those with combined M+L infections, are detected reliably only when using SMOTE balance. Feature importance analysis indicates the latest time steps as the most important predictor signals out of 60 steps in a power window.

</details>


### [449] [Inferring Routing-Layer Defense Mechanisms from Observable Behavior in OLSR-Based MANETs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00184)
*Nadav Schweitzer,Kiril Danilchenko,Ariel Stulman*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究能否通过被动观测路由行为推断MANET中是否存在路由层防御机制（Fictive Mitigation）。实验表明，尽管防御机制仅使用标准OLSR控制报文，被动观测仍可通过集成学习模型以0.91准确率（AUC 0.96）检测到防御存在，但跨域迁移存在非对称性，使用四个不变特征子集可实现对称迁移（约0.86）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注攻击检测，而防御机制是否可被对手被动识别（即防御探测）的问题未得到充分关注。本文旨在探究路由层防御是否会在被动可观测的路由和控平面行为中留下可检测的统计痕迹。

Method: 基于ns-3仿真，在基线、仅攻击、仅防御、攻击+防御四种场景下，对静态和移动条件进行实验。从OLSR路由动态和控制平面活动中提取特征，使用集成学习模型（随机森林、梯度提升等）进行二分类检测，并评估域内与跨域（静态→移动、移动→静态）迁移性能。

Result: 域内分类准确率达0.91（AUC 0.96）。跨域泛化不对称：静态训练模型在移动域下降至0.67，而移动训练模型在静态域达0.84。使用四个不变特征子集可实现近似对称迁移（双向约0.86）。

Conclusion: 评估的Fictive Mitigation防御机制在被动可观测的路由行为中留下了可检测的统计足迹，对手具备在受保护MANET中进行侦察的潜在能力。同时，特征选择对跨域泛化至关重要，适当选择不变特征可缓解迁移不对称问题。

Abstract: Mobile ad hoc networks (MANETs) based on proactive routing protocols such as OLSR remain vulnerable to routing-layer attacks. While prior work has focused primarily on attack detection, the problem of identifying deployed defenses has received comparatively little attention. This work examines whether the presence of a routing-layer defense can be inferred from features derived exclusively from externally observable routing and control-plane behavior. The evaluated Fictive Mitigation mechanism operates entirely within standard OLSR control traffic and introduces no new packet types, making passive detection inherently difficult. Using ns-3 simulations across baseline, attack-only, defense-only, and combined attack-defense regimes under both static and mobile conditions, we derive features from observable routing dynamics and control-plane activity available to a passive observer. Despite the restricted observability available to the adversary, the results show that defense detection remains feasible in this setting. Ensemble models achieve in-domain accuracy up to $0.91$ (AUC $0.96$). Cross-domain generalization is asymmetric: models trained on static data degrade under mobility ($\approx 0.67$), whereas mobile-trained models transfer more robustly ($\approx 0.84$). Restricting the model to a compact invariant feature subset of four metrics yields near-symmetric cross-domain transfer ($\approx 0.86$ in both directions). These findings indicate that the evaluated defense mechanism leaves a detectable statistical footprint in passively observable routing behavior, providing adversaries with a potential reconnaissance capability in protected MANET deployments.

</details>


### [450] [How to Compare the Security of Code Written by Humans to LLM-generated Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00186)
*Rebecca Balebako,Jasmine Egl*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个自动化框架，用于比较人类、LLM以及人机协作三种方式生成代码的安全性，并通过开源实现和可行性研究为可重复的“物种公平”实验提供基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏标准化的方法来实证比较人类-LLM协作、纯LLM和纯人类方式生成代码的安全性差异。

Method: 提出了一个自动化框架，能够记录提示词、时间戳和实验设置，并通过多维静态和动态质量分析来衡量结果。

Result: 通过可行性研究验证了框架的有效性，提供了“物种公平”比较的实验蓝图。

Conclusion: 该框架为未来关于人类与LLM生成代码安全性的实证研究奠定了基础，支持可重复的实验。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly transforming how software is created and maintained. Comparing LLM-generated code against human-written standards is essential to determine whether these new tools uphold or erode the security baselines established by professional developers. Yet, we lack a standardized method for empirically comparing the security of code produced through human-LLM collaboration against LLM-only, or traditional human-only methods. To facilitate this, we propose an automated framework for conducting comparative studies across human-only, LLM-only, and hybrid conditions. Our approach automates the logging of prompts, timing, and experimental settings, measuring outcomes through multi-dimensional static and dynamic quality analysis. We provide an open-source implementation of this framework to ensure that future researchers can conduct reproducible, species-fair experiments. Importantly, we validate the framework via a feasibility study, providing an experimental blueprint for ``species-fair'' comparisons between human and AI subjects. By sharing lessons learned, we establish a foundation for empirical research on human and LLM-generated code for software security.

</details>


### [451] [A Moderatorless Protocol for WEREWOLF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00190)
*Naoki Kitamura,Hironori Kiya,Hirotaka Ono*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种无需主持人或电子设备、仅用普通扑克牌即可实现狼人杀游戏的物理加密方案，通过公开可验证的卡牌操作和角色依赖的视角，解决了隐藏角色游戏中对可信第三方的依赖问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的狼人杀等社交推理游戏依赖可信主持人分配角色和调解秘密行动，这提高了参与门槛，且主持人成为单点故障点。本文旨在消除这一依赖。

Method: 基于卡牌物理密码学原语（如面朝下承诺、可验证洗牌），设计高层子协议（角色内信息共享、秘密行动指定、属性测试），通过公开的卡牌操作序列实现角色依赖的视角，让狼人相互识别、预言家测试玩家身份。

Result: 成功实现了完全无主持人的狼人杀游戏，支持任意n名玩家，所需卡牌数为O(n³)。所有卡牌操作公开且可审计。

Conclusion: 证明了社交推理游戏可以在没有数字设备或可信第三方的情况下，仅用物理卡牌即可安全实现，为去中心化游戏提供了可行的物理密码学方案。

Abstract: Social deduction games, or hidden-role games, are multiplayer games in which players are assigned private roles and act under asymmetric information about other players' roles and actions. In the canonical example Werewolf, werewolves conceal their roles and mislead the other players, while the seer can obtain role information about a chosen player. Thus, a central functionality of such games is controlling which players can access which information. In typical play, this control is implemented by a trusted human moderator, who assigns roles, mediates secret actions, and reveals outcomes. This reliance raises the barrier to participation and introduces a trusted third party as a single point of failure. In this work, we show that Werewolf can be played without a moderator or any digital device, using only ordinary playing cards. Our construction maintains a shared pool of cards that is observable to all players and manipulated according to a common public procedure, while its interpretation depends on each player's private role. This induces role-dependent views from a single public sequence of card operations. Consequently, even without private messages, werewolves can identify one another and coordinate, and the seer can test whether a chosen player is a werewolf in each round. The proposed implementation is built from card-based physical cryptographic primitives, such as face-down commitments and verifiable shuffles, and higher-level subprotocols for intra-role information sharing, secret action designation, and attribute testing. These subprotocols implement the moderator's core functions while keeping all card operations public and auditable under standard assumptions on physical card operations. We show that the resulting complete moderatorless implementation of Werewolf scales to an arbitrary number n of players using O(n^3) cards.

</details>


### [452] [Bit-Exact AI Inference Verification Without Performance Tradeoffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00279)
*Naci Cankaya*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文探讨了AI工作负载的可验证性问题，指出GPU浮点运算的非确定性曾被视为验证障碍，但通过软件仿真和确定性重计算，实际上可以实现比特级精确的推理验证，且无需相同硬件环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在AI治理中，对隐蔽对抗者（只在检测概率高时才遵守监控）的AI工作负载声明进行验证是必要条件。然而GPU浮点运算的非确定性迫使审计者只能接受近似输出匹配，这给隐蔽对抗者留下了可被利用的不可验证自由度。

Method: 分析了现代推理引擎（vLLM、HF transformers）如何在不需要设置性能折衷的确定性标志的情况下产生确定但非不变的输出；通过纯软件仿真，在多种NVIDIA GPU变体上实现了LLM推理的比特级精确重计算。

Result: 证明了比特级精确重计算不需要访问相同的硬件；累积的舍入误差可以成为推理所用软件和硬件设置的可审计签名，而非可验证性的约束。

Conclusion: GPU浮点运算的累积舍入误差不是验证的障碍，反而可以作为推理软件和硬件配置的审计签名，从而支持对AI工作负载的可信治理。

Abstract: Verifying claims about AI workloads is a pre- requisite for credible AI governance of covert adversaries (who comply with monitoring only when detection likelihood is high), yet the ap- parent non-determinism of GPU floating-point arithmetic forces auditors to accept approximate output matches. Covert adversaries can exploit un- verifiable degrees of freedom in monitored compu- tation. Attack vectors include steganography, un- reported modification of inference software, and covert computation via unreported batch elements. Empirically, we analyze how modern inference engines (vLLM, HF transformers) produce deter- ministic but non-invariant outputs, without need- ing to set performance-compromising determin- ism flags, if the right information is available for re-computation and no atomic functions are called in the backend. We demonstrate that such bitwise- precise re-computation does not require access to identical hardware, via a software-only emula- tion of LLM inference across multiple NVIDIA GPU variants. Thus, accumulated rounding errors can be an auditable signature of the software and hardware setup used for inference, instead of a constraint on verifiability.

</details>


### [453] [Beyond Edge Coverage: Per-Task Data-Flow Extraction at Kernel Function Boundaries via LLVM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00455)
*Yunseong Kim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出BOUNDARY FLOW框架，通过LLVM插桩在Linux内核KCOV中扩展数据流提取（函数参数和返回值），为内核模糊测试提供上下文感知的反馈信号，并支持安全分析师进行根因分析，开销低于3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有覆盖率引导的内核模糊测试（如syzkaller）仅依赖边缘覆盖率（trace-pc），无法区分仅在参数值上不同的执行路径（如copy_from_user()不同size参数触发相同基本块但安全影响迥异），缺乏数据流信息导致无法感知上下文。

Method: 基于LLVM的插桩框架：1) 编译器pass（-fsanitize-coverage=dataflow-args, dataflow-ret）在函数入口和返回处插入轻量回调，捕获结构化元组<PC, arg_idx, arg_size, ptr, offsets[]>；2) 通过DWARF DICompositeType元数据自动分解复合类型，无需源码注解；3) 内核设备（/sys/kernel/debug/kcov_dataflow）提供无锁每任务环形缓冲区，不干扰现有KCOV/syzkaller；4) 后编译流水线（rustc, opt, llc）支持Rust内核模块插桩。

Result: 在五类漏洞（越界OOB、释放后使用UAF、双释放、10层深度链传播、Rust FFI、Rust for Linux Modules）上评估，插桩路径开销低于3%。

Conclusion: BOUNDARY FLOW双用途：模糊测试获得状态感知的反馈以引导值相关状态转换的变异，安全分析师获得确定性的参数记录进行根因分析，无需printk或kprobe开销，且是唯一能在-O2 DWARF省略下捕获Rust函数参数的运行时方法。

Abstract: Coverage-guided kernel fuzzers such as syzkaller rely on edge coverage (trace-pc) as their sole feedback signal. This context-blind approach cannot distinguish execution paths that differ only in argument values. for example, two invocations of copy_from_user() with different size parameters hit identical basic blocks yet have vastly different security implications. We present BOUNDARY FLOW, an LLVM-based instrumentation framework that extends Linux KCOV with data-flow extraction of function arguments and return values. A compiler pass (-fsanitize-coverage=dataflow-args, dataflow-ret) emits lightweight callbacks capturing a structured tuple <PC, arg_idx, arg_size, ptr, offsets[]> at function entry and <PC, ret_size, ptr, offsets[]> at return. Composite types are automatically decomposed via DWARF DICompositeType metadata with zero source annotation. A separate kernel device(/sys/kernel/debug/kcov_dataflow) provides lock-free per-task ring buffers with no inter ference to existing KCOV or syzkaller infrastructure. We demonstrate dual utility: fuzzers gain state-aware feedback for mutation guidance into value-dependent state transitions, and security analysts obtain deterministic argument records for root-cause analysis without printk or kprobe overhead. A post-compilation pipeline (rustc, opt, llc) enables Rust kernel module instrumentation without modifying rustc, the only runtime method for capturing Rust function arguments given that drgn/vmcore fails under-O2 DWARF elision. Evaluated on five vulnerability classes (OOB, UAF, double-free, 10 deep chain propagation, Rust FFI, Rust for Linux Modules) with <3% overhead on instrumented paths.

</details>


### [454] [Stochastic Analysis of Cybersecurity Defense Strategies Under Single Attack Scenario](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00481)
*Song-Kyoo Kim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于随机过程的主动网络安全防御时机选择框架，通过拉普拉斯-卡尔松变换和首次超越理论，在单一攻击场景下推导出防御时刻的概率密度函数及攻击前后观测时间的条件期望，为低延迟主动防御的参数校准提供了闭式解析解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络安全防御时机研究缺乏精确的随机建模方法，难以量化防御时机对威胁强度的敏感性，亟需一种能够闭式表达防御时刻概率分布的理论框架来支持低延迟主动防御的参数优化。

Method: 将防御过程建模为连续观测机制，防御时刻与后续观测时隙服从独立指数分布；利用拉普拉斯-卡尔松变换结合首次超越理论推导联合检测函数；通过马尔可夫泊松到达下的边缘化处理得到防御时刻概率密度及条件期望。

Result: 给出了防御时刻边际分布和条件期望的闭式解析解，实现了防御时机对威胁强度敏感性的定量评估，并可视化展示了防御时刻密度曲线。

Conclusion: 该工作弥合了随机对决方法论与网络安全实际应用之间的鸿沟，为低延迟主动防御措施的观测参数精确校准提供了理论工具。

Abstract: This research presents a novel stochastic framework for proactive cybersecurity defense timing under a single attack scenario. The approach models the defense process as a continuous observation mechanism in which the defense instant and the subsequent observation slot follow independent exponential distributions. Laplace-Carson transforms combined with first-excess theory yield the joint detection function that brackets the attack moment. Marginalization under Markovian Poisson arrivals then produces the probability density of the defense moment and conditional expectations of pre-attack and post-attack observation times. These closed-form results enable quantitative assessment of defense timing sensitivity to threat intensity and support precise calibration of observation parameters for low-latency proactive measures. Major contributions include the explicit derivation of marginal distributions and expected values, visualization of defense moment density, and the bridging of stochastic duel methodology with practical cybersecurity applications.

</details>


### [455] [Confused ChatGPT: Cross-App Context Poisoning via First-Party APIs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00485)
*Chao Wang,Somesh Jha,Zhiqiang Lin*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文揭示了ChatGPT Apps（2025年10月上线）中的跨应用上下文投毒攻击：第三方应用共享同一聊天上下文，恶意应用可通过API写入持久化的系统级内容，诱导LLM操纵其他良性应用。根本原因是架构上缺乏多租户隔离机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ChatGPT Apps引入应用内应用范式，截至2026年5月已有888个应用，但其安全状况从未被研究过。

Method: 识别跨应用上下文投毒攻击变种（间接提示注入），通过sendFollowUpMessage等API及两个未文档化参数（systemPrompt、isVisible）实现静默系统级写入，构造confused-deputy攻击。

Result: 发现多种API可写入共享上下文，两个未文档化参数可放大攻击效果；在6个当前ChatGPT模型上验证了条件式和命令式两种载荷风格。

Conclusion: 根本原因是架构缺陷：LLM上下文是持久、扁平、无标签的共享数据存储，缺乏隔离。修复需要架构级改动，而非打补丁。

Abstract: ChatGPT Apps, launched by OpenAI on Oct. 6, 2025, introduce an app-in-app paradigm in which third-party applications share a single chat context with the user and with every other connected app. The ecosystem grew from 122 apps in Dec. 2025 to 888 by May 2026, yet its security has remained uninvestigated. We identify cross-app context poisoning, a variant of indirect prompt injection distinguished by three properties: 1) the injection persists in the shared chat context across turns; 2) the effect surfaces through a different co-resident app the user later invokes; and 3) the delivery vectors are first-party APIs exposed to every connected app. We find multiple APIs capable of writing app-controlled content into the shared context, with sendFollowUpMessage as the most direct and potent channel. Two undocumented parameters that the runtime silently accepts, systemPrompt and isVisible, amplify this channel to silent, system-priority writes. Leveraging this channel, we realize a confused-deputy attack in which a malicious app poisons the context so that the LLM, consulting that context, enables manipulation against benign co-resident apps. We demonstrate two payload styles (conditional and imperative) and evaluate them across six current ChatGPT models. The root cause is architectural: the LLM's context is a persistent, flat, untagged data store shared by user and apps, with no isolation. Every mature multi-tenant platform, from Multics virtual memory to Android UIDs and iOS sandbox profiles, paid the isolation cost before admitting third parties; ChatGPT Apps did not. Fixing this requires an architectural change, not a patch. We disclosed our findings to OpenAI; the undocumented parameters remain accessible at the time of writing, and the architectural gap is by design: the shared context that enables cross-app composition is the same flat namespace that enables cross-app poisoning.

</details>


### [456] ["I Strongly Suspect This Website Is a Scam": Benchmarking PII Leakage and Detection without Defense in Autonomous Web Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00497)
*Soham Roy,Sarthakbrata Halder,Arya Bharaty,Vaibhav Bhaskar,Yash Sinha,Dhruv Kumar,Srikant Panda,Murari Mandal*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出Scammer4U基准测试，评估社交工程攻击对自主网页代理提取PII的有效性，发现关键PII泄露率高达54-93%，并揭示检测与行动之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社交工程攻击广泛存在于互联网中，能够操纵自主网页代理提交用户的PII，对已部署的代理系统构成严重风险，但目前缺乏系统性的量化评估。

Method: 构建了Scammer4U基准测试，包含91个攻击者控制环境与10个良性孪生基线，覆盖8种攻击向量和16个站点类别，采用8轴因子分类法隔离各攻击设计因素的因果贡献。

Result: 无隐私指导时，关键PII泄露率达54-93%，而良性孪生基线泄露率为0%；存在检测-行动差距：即使代理识别出站点可疑，仍有35.9%的会话提交了关键PII。

Conclusion: 依赖代理自身识别攻击的防御机制存在根本性缺陷，需要独立于代理推理循环的输出级拦截机制来有效防止PII泄露。

Abstract: Deceptive web content, widely instantiated across the internet and commonly known as \textit{social-engineering attacks}, manipulates autonomous web agents into submitting users' personally identifiable information (PII) to attacker-controlled endpoints. In this paper, we show that social-engineering attacks are highly effective at extracting critical-tier PII from frontier web agents, posing a severe risk to deployed agentic systems. To quantify this risk, we introduce \textbf{\textsc{Scammer4U}}, a pre-registered benchmark of 91 attacker-controlled environments and 10 benign-twin baselines, spanning 8 attack vectors and 16 site categories on an 8-axis factorial taxonomy that isolates the causal contribution of individual attack design factors. Across frontier agents, we find that critical-tier PII leakage reaches 54--93\% under no privacy guidance, compared to 0\% on benign-twin baselines, confirming that leakage is attack-attributable rather than incidental form-filling. Escalating prompt-level mitigation yields sharply model-dependent reductions across the four families and remains insufficient to reliably prevent critical PII submission at the pooled level. Most critically, we identify a detection--action gap: agents whose reasoning an independent LLM judge confirms has flagged the site as suspicious still submit critical PII in 35.9\% of sessions, versus 66.1\% when no suspicion is verbalized, a 30.2\% gap robust across all four model families. Our findings reveal that defenses conditioned on the agent's own recognition of an attack are gating on the wrong signal, motivating output-level interception of outbound submissions that operates independently of the agent's reasoning loop.

</details>


### [457] [Authenticity Debt and the Synthetic Content Threat Landscape: A Layered Framework for Trust, Provenance, and IP Governance in the Generative AI Era](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00621)
*Shubhashis Sengupta,Benjamin McCarty,Milind Savagaonkar,Rhine Andotra*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出"真实性债务"概念，分析生成式AI带来的内容真实性风险，构建了危害分类体系，并基于零信任架构提出包含密码学溯源、人工验证和持续治理的分层参考架构，以应对AI生成内容在开放性、对抗性环境中的真实性挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI以近乎零边际成本生产高保真内容，导致传统控制在真实性、来源、完整性和问责性四个层面均不足以应对风险，企业缺乏系统性的真实性保障框架。

Method: 采用多维分类法梳理生成式AI危害与攻击向量，调研数字水印、C2PA/Adobe CAI溯源框架、检测技术等技术控制的能力与失效模式，融合零信任架构原则与企业治理框架，提出分层参考架构。

Result: 论证了单一技术机制在开放、对抗性环境中不足以解决真实性挑战；构建了包含密码学溯源、人工验证和持续治理的分层架构；梳理了EU AI Act、FTC、NIST AI RMF等监管要求。

Conclusion: 组织应将真实性建设视为制度性基础设施而非事后补救，通过分层技术控制与持续治理相结合，在规模化部署AI内容时维持可防御的真实性保障。

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence has fundamentally changed how content is now produced. It has enabled how high-fidelity text, images, audio, and videos are created, modified, and redistributed at near-zero marginal cost. This shift exposes enterprises and ecosystems to a number of risks across four reinforcing authenticity layers -- authenticity, provenance, integrity, and accountability -- that traditional controls are inadequate to address in isolation. We introduce the concept of authenticity debt: the cumulative institutional liability that accumulates when organizations deploy AI-generated content without preserving verifiable origin, integrity, and accountability, deferring exposure that surfaces under regulatory, legal, or market scrutiny. This paper presents a comprehensive, multi-dimensional taxonomy of generative AI harms and attack vectors, surveys the capabilities and failure modes of technical controls including digital watermarking, provenance frameworks (C2PA, Adobe CAI), and detection technologies, and argues that no single mechanism is sufficient in open, adversarial, and evolving environments. Drawing on Zero Trust Architecture principles and enterprise governance frameworks, we propose a layered reference architecture that integrates cryptographic provenance, human-in-the-loop verification, and continuous governance to sustain defensible authenticity at scale. We further examine the regulatory landscape (EU AI Act, U.S.\ FTC, NIST AI RMF) and identify practical guiding principles for organizations seeking to build authenticity as institutional infrastructure rather than an afterthought.

</details>


### [458] [NICE: A Framework for Declarative and Machine-Checkable Vulnerability Reproduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00625)
*Minh-Luân Nguyen,Olivier Levillain,Julien Malka,Stefano Zacchiroli,Théo Zimmermann*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: NICE是一个基于NixOS的CVE复现框架，通过声明式配方自动构建和验证易受攻击的环境，支持长期可复现性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件漏洞复现对于安全研究至关重要，但现有方法难以长期保持环境可复现性，且随着时间推移复现难度越来越大。

Method: 使用NixOS虚拟机配置、脚本化利用场景和机器可检查的断言来声明式定义和自动验证漏洞环境。

Result: 在19个真实世界CVE上验证，覆盖多种CWE类别、攻击向量和目标类型，成功生成简洁配方和集成测试。

Conclusion: NICE适用于安全教育、网络靶场创建及漏洞报告，其可复现性和可审查性有助于报告审计与验证。

Abstract: Reproducing software vulnerabilities is fundamental to security researchers, open-source maintainers, and educators. Yet, vulnerabilities remain hard to reproduce today, and even when they can be reproduced, recreating a software environment where the vulnerability can be exploited becomes harder and harder over time. We present NICE, the NIx CvE reproduction framework, which uses declarative recipes to build and automatically validate vulnerable environments. In NICE, a reproduced CVE comprises one or more NixOS virtual machine configurations, a scripted exploitation scenario, and machine-checkable assertions that provide factual evidence of exploitation. This design facilitates sharing, validation, review, and long-term reproducibility.
  We evaluate NICE on 19 diverse real-world CVEs spanning multiple CWE categories, attack vectors, and target types (user-space, system software, kernel, and graphical applications). We show that NICE allows to produce concise recipes and integration tests that reproduce vulnerable environments and provide proofs of exploitation.
  NICE is applicable to security education and training (e.g., creating cyber ranges), but also to vulnerability reporting, where its reproducibility and reviewability properties can make reports easier to audit and verify.

</details>


### [459] [The Invitation Trap: Proactive Availability Backdoor in LLMs via Conversational Induction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00654)
*He Wang,Jun Feng,Hong Sun,Pengfei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PAB（主动可用性后门）的新型后门攻击范式，通过利用对齐LLM的固有助人特性，主动诱使用户执行植入触发器的查询，实现高攻击性、精准性和隐蔽性。在基于大五人格模型的双智能体生态仿真框架下，PAB的有效攻击成功率（结合攻击发生率和成功率）达到73.1%。同时提出了针对性防御方法Anti-PAB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对LLM的后门攻击通常是被动的，由攻击者操控等待触发。本文旨在将攻击向量从被动等待转变为主动的社会工程学攻击，利用LLM的助人特性反过来武器化，以主动诱捕用户。

Method: 提出PAB（主动可用性后门）范式，通过将后门触发器植入建议中，利用LLM的助人特性主动向用户提供带触发器的建议。构建基于大五人格模型（五因素模型）的双智能体生态仿真框架，使用少样本提示部署PAB，在多个模型和领域上进行验证。

Result: PAB在多个模型和领域上表现出色，有效攻击成功率为73.1%（结合攻击发生率与成功率的联合概率）。同时提出了Anti-PAB防御方法。

Conclusion: LLM的助人特性可以被武器化以破坏可用性，暴露了对LLM用户的严重隐藏威胁。研究揭示了主动式后门攻击对LLM安全构成的真实风险。

Abstract: Current backdoor attacks against LLMs are typically manipulated by the attacker and remain passive. In this paper, we introduce the \textbf{Proactive Availability Backdoor (PAB)}, a novel paradigm that shifts the attack vector from passive waiting to active social engineering. By weaponizing the inherent helpfulness of aligned LLMs, PAB proactively traps users into executing trigger-implanted queries by offering suggestions, achieving high aggressiveness, precision and stealthiness. To rigorously evaluate its threat in a real-life context, we introduce a dual-agent ecological simulation framework based on selected dimensions of the Five-Factor Model, and deploy PAB with few-shot prompts. Being validated on different models and domains, PAB performs remarkably and its effective attack success rate, which calculates the joint probability of attack incidence rate and attack success rate, goes to \textbf{73.1\%}. We also introduce \textbf{Anti-PAB}, a defense method tailored for PAB. Our findings reveal that the helpfulness of LLMs can be weaponized to compromise availability, exposing a serious hidden threat to LLMs users. We release all the scripts and datasets in the experiments at \texttt{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PAB-ANONYMOUS/}.

</details>


### [460] [NeuroLog: Reasoning You Can Audit -- Neuro-Symbolic Vulnerability Discovery via LLM Facts, Datalog, and SMT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00669)
*Sanjay Rawat*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: NeuroLog是一个端到端、无需构建的漏洞发现流水线，结合LLM提取事实、Datalog推理、SMT过滤和LLM生成崩溃输入，在多个真实项目中发现了包括CVE-2023-38545在内的8个CVE级漏洞和5个内存安全漏洞（4个为之前未报告）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有C/C++漏洞发现方法在"需要构建环境的重量级静态分析器"和"容易产生幻觉且跨函数数据流跟踪能力弱的LLM"之间面临两难选择，缺乏一种无需构建、准确且能跨函数推理的自动化方案。

Method: NeuroLog采用四阶段流水线：(1) LLM逐函数提取类型化数据流事实（无幻觉，无需构建）；(2) Souffle Datalog规则网格将事实组合为跨函数发现；(3) Z3 SMT后过滤不可行发现并输出SAT模型；(4) 第二LLM代理读取SAT模型生成Python程序产生崩溃输入，经ASan验证。同时利用少量语料种子提取范围不变量来收紧SMT问题。

Result: 在stb、cJSON、libxml2、FFmpeg demuxer、curl 8.3.0上重新发现8个CVE级问题（包括CVSS 9.8的CVE-2023-38545 SOCKS5堆溢出），均经ASan确认。在libarchive HEAD上发现5个内存安全漏洞（4个新发现），已被上游确认并修复。提取耗时约37秒/$0.005（stb），崩溃生成仅需2次LLM迭代，不变量过滤减少13.2%的可行集。

Conclusion: NeuroLog证明了LLM+Datalog+SMT的混合架构在无需构建的条件下可以实现高效、准确的跨函数漏洞发现，且SAT模型可作为崩溃合成的中间产物而非简单的是/否判定，为自动化漏洞挖掘提供了新范式。

Abstract: Vulnerability discovery on C/C++ source asks the analyst to choose between heavyweight static analysers, which need a working build before a single query runs, and free-form LLMs, which read source readily but invent details and lose track of cross-function dataflow on real codebases. We present NeuroLog, an end-to-end build-free pipeline that assigns each layer the role it is uniquely good at: an LLM extracts typed dataflow facts one function at a time; a Souffle rule mesh composes those facts into cross-function findings; a Z3 post-pass filters infeasible findings and emits a SAT model for each survivor. To go beyond pure static reasoning we also fold in runtime evidence: likely range invariants from a handful of corpus seeds tighten the SMT problem at near-zero cost. A second LLM agent reads each SAT model and writes a Python program that produces a candidate crashing input, validated by an AddressSanitizer harness. Combining static-narrowing-SMT (Saturn, Pinpoint) and Datalog-with-SMT (Formulog) is prior art; new here are an LLM-derived fact base, a no-build pipeline, and the SAT model as an artifact (input to crash synthesis) rather than a yes/no verdict. Across stb, cJSON, libxml2, an FFmpeg demuxer slice, and curl 8.3.0, NeuroLog re-discovers eight CVE-class issues end-to-end, including the CVSS-9.8 SOCKS5 heap overflow CVE-2023-38545, each ASan-confirmed. On libarchive HEAD we surface five memory-safety bugs (four previously unreported) across the cpio reader and the XAR/WARC/7zip writers; all filed upstream, several fixes merged, with the cpio use-after-free acknowledged in seven hours. Extraction takes ~37 s and $0.005 on stb; crash synthesis turned a static finding into a 102-byte stb_vorbis crash in two LLM iterations (no fuzzer); a likely-invariant filter from three Matroska seeds eliminates 13.2% of the FFmpeg-demuxer feasible set.

</details>


### [461] [Quality-Diversity Evolution for Discovering Diverse Vulnerabilities in LLM Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00801)
*Subhadip Mitra*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于质量-多样性进化框架的LLM红队测试方法，使用MAP-Elits算法在语义层面演化可解释的攻击策略。实验发现不同模型（GPT-4o-mini、Claude 3.5 Sonnet、Gemini 2.0 Flash等）具有独特的脆弱性特征，其中Claude最具鲁棒性（最高适应度仅0.4），而GPT-4o-mini和Gemini在某些策略下可达0.8适应度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM对抗测试方法存在覆盖不足的问题：人工红队难以规模化，LLM作为攻击者的方法会出现模式坍缩（生成攻击多样性不足），基于梯度的方法产生不可解释的乱码。亟需一种可扩展、可解释且能系统性发现模型漏洞的方法。

Method: 采用质量-多样性进化框架，在语义层面（而非token序列）演化可解释的攻击策略。使用MAP-Elites算法维护一个在多个行为维度（策略类型、编码方法、提示长度）上多样化的攻击存档，通过进化过程持续生成和优化攻击策略。

Result: 在GPT-4o-mini、Claude 3.5 Sonnet、Gemini 2.0 Flash和Devstral-small-2四个模型上的实验显示：GPT-4o-mini对假设性和多轮框架结合ROT13编码最脆弱（适应度0.8）；Gemini对直接攻击+ROT13及多轮+Leetspeak最脆弱（0.8）；Claude对所有策略均表现出一致的模糊响应（最高仅0.4），鲁棒性最强。

Conclusion: 语义层级表示产生的攻击可解释，能揭示系统性的模型特定弱点，为改进LLM安全提供了可操作的见解，并为评估未来前沿模型建立了可重复的基线。

Abstract: Current approaches to LLM adversarial testing suffer from coverage gaps: manual red-teaming does not scale, LLM-as-attacker methods exhibit mode collapse, and gradient-based approaches produce uninterpretable gibberish. We introduce a quality-diversity evolutionary framework that operates at the semantic level, evolving interpretable attack strategies rather than token sequences. Using MAP-Elites, we maintain a diverse archive of attacks across behavioral dimensions (strategy type, encoding method, prompt length). In experiments across GPT-4o-mini, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini 2.0 Flash, and an open-weight coding model (Devstral-small-2), we discover distinct vulnerability profiles: GPT-4o-mini is vulnerable to hypothetical and multi-turn framing combined with ROT13 encoding (fitness 0.8), Gemini to direct attacks with ROT13 and multi-turn with Leetspeak (0.8), while Claude shows uniformly ambiguous responses across all strategies (max 0.4). The semantic representation produces interpretable attacks that reveal systematic, model-specific weaknesses, providing actionable insights for improving LLM safety and a reproducible baseline for evaluating future frontier models. Code and experiment artifacts are released at https://github.com/bassrehab/red-queen.

</details>


### [462] [Cross-Generational Transfer of Adversarial Attacks Reveals Non-Monotonic Safety Alignment in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00813)
*Subhadip Mitra*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 通过对Gemma四代模型（7B-31B）进行质量-多样性进化（MAP-Elites）自动化红队测试，发现安全对齐并非单调提升：Gemma 3（12B）攻击成功率（68.7%）显著高于Gemma 2（45.5%）和Gemma 4（33.9%），跨代攻击转移率显示Gemma 4的防御具有泛化性，但 misinformation 漏洞在Gemma 3中飙升（29%→99%）且未完全修复（77%）。静态基准无法揭示这些退化模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型安全对齐是否随代际单调提升，以及传统静态基准能否有效检测安全退化。

Method: 使用质量-多样性进化算法（MAP-Elites）作为自动化红队探测工具，对Gemma家族四代模型（7B-31B）进行纵向攻击测试，并比较跨代攻击的迁移率。

Result: 1) Gemma 3 的ASR（68.7%）显著高于Gemma 2（45.5%）和Gemma 4（33.9%）；2) 跨代攻击迁移率上，对其他代的攻击迁移到Gemma 3为44-46%，迁移到Gemma 4仅14-18%；3) 版权和网络犯罪漏洞在全部代际接近100%；4) Misinformation ASR从Gemma 2的29%飙升到Gemma 3的99%，Gemma 4仍高达77%。

Conclusion: 安全对齐在模型代际间非单调提升，存在退化现象；静态基准无法检测此类问题，需要自适应的纵向探测方法。

Abstract: Safety alignment in LLMs does not improve monotonically across model generations. Studying four generations of Google's Gemma family (7B-31B) with quality-diversity evolution (MAP-Elites) as an automated red-teaming probe, we find that Gemma 3 (12B) exhibits 68.7% +/- 5.7% attack success rate (ASR; mean +/- std, 3 seeds), significantly higher than its predecessor Gemma 2 (45.5% +/- 7.2%; p = 0.030, paired bootstrap) and its successor Gemma 4 (33.9% +/- 1.8%). Replaying evolved attack archives across generations reveals that attacks from other generations transfer to Gemma 3 at 44-46% but only 14-18% to Gemma 4, indicating that Gemma 4's safety gains generalize beyond the attack distributions evolved against earlier generations. Under our 8B judge, copyright and cybercrime vulnerabilities register at near-100% across all generations, though a second-judge audit (Section 6) suggests the copyright result is sensitive to judge choice. Misinformation ASR jumps from 29% to 99% between Gemma 2 and Gemma 3 and remains elevated at 77% in Gemma 4, indicating the regression was not fully addressed. These patterns are invisible to static benchmarks and emerge only through adaptive, longitudinal probing. All experiments use 3 random seeds with a unified self-hosted judge; code and artifacts are available at https://github.com/bassrehab/red-queen.

</details>


### [463] [Needles at Scale: LLM-Assisted Target Selection for Windows Vulnerability Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01364)
*Michael J. Bommarito*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出Symbolicate-Enrich-Sample流水线，通过自动恢复符号、提取结构特征、使用低成本语言模型进行优先级排序，从Windows操作系统数千万函数中筛选出约2.2万个候选函数，解决了大规模攻击面分析中目标选择这一核心瓶颈问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代操作系统攻击面极其庞大（数千个签名二进制文件、数百万个函数），但绝大多数函数与特定漏洞无关。人工分析或LLM代理必须先选择值得分析的函数再进行分析，而"目标选择"本身才是真正的约束瓶颈，而非后续分析过程。

Method: 三步流水线：(i) Symbolicate（符号化）：自动获取公开符号文件，与恢复的调用图关联，为剥离符号的供应商二进制文件恢复函数级符号；(ii) Enrich（丰富化）：为每个命名函数附加低成本的确定性结构特征，基于这些特征使用低成本语言模型分配可达性层级、风险等级、漏洞类别假设及推理依据；(iii) Sample（采样）：通过优先级加权重要性采样器抽取多样化、优先排序的批次。

Result: 在包含7,231,419个函数的完整Windows镜像上，该方法具有显著的选择性；叠加确定性过滤器后，得到约22,000个函数的候选短列表，足够人类或代理进行分析。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一个选择基础（selection substrate），作为下游检测器或LLM代理运行的优先级排序层。论文描述了流水线的选择性、失效模式、方法论并报告了聚合统计（由于法律和双重用途原因，未公开导出的数据集）。

Abstract: The attack surface of a modern operating system is a haystack: thousands of signed binaries and millions of functions, almost none relevant to any given vulnerability. A human analyst or an LLM agent must pick the function worth reading before analyzing it. At whole-OS scope, this target selection, not the analysis, is the binding constraint. We present Symbolicate-Enrich-Sample, a low-cost batch pipeline that turns a corpus of production Windows binaries into a queryable, priority-ranked research queue. We (i) recover function-level symbols for stripped vendor binaries by auto-fetching the public symbol files and joining them to a recovered call graph; (ii) attach cheap, deterministic structural features to each named function and, conditioned on those features, use a low-cost language model to assign a reachability tier, a risk level, a bug-class hypothesis, and a rationale; and (iii) draw diverse, prioritized batches via a priority-weighted importance sampler. The contribution is a selection substrate: the prioritization layer a downstream detector or LLM agent runs on top of. Across a whole Windows image of 7,231,419 functions, the labels are markedly selective, and stacking deterministic filters on them leaves a ~22K-function shortlist: the candidate needles, few enough for a human or agent to work through. We characterize the pipeline's selectivity and its failure modes, describe the methodology, and report aggregate statistics; we withhold the derived dataset for legal and dual-use reasons.

</details>


### [464] [GCVE: A Decentralized Model for Vulnerability Identification, Publication, and Operational Enrichment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00856)
*Alexandre Dulaunoy*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: GCVE提出了一种去中心化、开放、可扩展的漏洞标识与发布模型，通过自治编号机构、轻量级分配规则和分布式发布机制，解决现有漏洞生态中集中式系统与独立发布之间的脱节问题，并扩展了漏洞记录的概念范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有漏洞生态系统存在集中式系统控制严格但灵活不足，而大量安全研究者独立发布公告缺乏共享机制的问题，导致漏洞发现、关联、丰富和重用困难。

Method: 通过设计自治的GCVE编号机构、轻量级分配规则、分布式发布机制、开放的最佳实践（BCP）流程以及参考实现（vulnerability-lookup），构建去中心化的漏洞标识与协调基础设施。

Result: 实现了全局唯一性与参与者按需发布的平衡，扩展了漏洞记录类型（包括分配、披露、目击、被拒标识、观察、利用漏洞信息和丰富记录），并通过AI扩展机制支持标准演进。

Conclusion: GCVE框架将漏洞协调从简单的标识符分配转变为开放的安全知识生产基础设施，借鉴MISP生态的经验，实现集体安全知识的生产与共享。

Abstract: The Global CVE initiative (GCVE) proposes a decentralized, open, and extensible model for vulnerability identification, publication, and enrichment. It addresses a gap in today's vulnerability ecosystem: centralized systems provide rigorous control and widely recognized identifiers, while many producers publish advisories independently without a shared fabric for discovery, correlation, enrichment, and reuse.
  This paper presents GCVE as a socio-technical standardization effort combining autonomous GCVE Numbering Authorities, lightweight allocation rules, distributed publication, open Best Current Practices, and practical reference implementations. The model preserves global uniqueness while allowing participants to publish according to their operational needs. It also broadens the concept of a vulnerability record to cover assignments, disclosures, sightings, rejected identifiers, observations, exploited vulnerability information, and enrichment records.
  The paper describes how the GCVE BCP process supports technical interoperability and amendable operational practice, including practical guidance for vulnerability handling and disclosure. It also examines the extension mechanism, including AI-oriented extensions, as a way to evolve the standard without centralizing control.
  A particular focus is placed on vulnerability-lookup as the reference implementation. It aggregates multiple sources, supports GCVE publication and consumption, implements distributed Known Exploited Vulnerability data, and enables automatically enriched vulnerability data streams. Building on lessons from the MISP ecosystem, GCVE frames vulnerability coordination not only as identifier allocation, but as open infrastructure for collective security knowledge production.

</details>


### [465] [ClawHub Security Signals: When VirusTotal, Static Analysis, and SkillSpector Disagree](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01494)
*Vincent Koc,Patrick Erichsen,Jacob Tomlinson,Agustin Rivera,Michael Appel,Nir Paz*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文发布了ClawHub Security Signals数据集，包含67,453个OpenClaw技能版本。通过分析三种扫描器（VirusTotal、静态启发式分析、NVIDIA SkillSpector）之间的分歧发现：扫描器间重叠率极低（仅0.69%的技能被三者同时标记），分歧结构取决于攻击面类型。研究表明代理技能安全需要分层治理，而非单一扫描器的允许/阻止决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将代理技能安全简化为模型安全或传统恶意软件检测，忽视了技能作为独立安全边界的特点。本文旨在揭示不同安全扫描器在代理技能检测上的系统性分歧，推动分层安全治理框架的建设。

Method: 构建ClawHub Security Signals数据集（67,453个技能版本），每行包含SKILL.md内容、捆绑文件、ClawScan裁决结果以及三个扫描器家族（VirusTotal、静态启发式分析、NVIDIA SkillSpector）的证据。通过计算扫描器间标记重叠率、按攻击面分类分析分歧结构。

Result: 三种扫描器极少标记相同技能：任意两扫描器最多重叠10.4%的联合阳性结果，仅0.69%被三者同时标记，81.9%的被标记技能仅被单一扫描器识别。SkillSpector在可疑样本中占比75.3%，但在恶意样本中仅6.8%；VirusTotal在恶意样本中占72.8%。

Conclusion: 代理技能安全需要分层治理方法，不能依赖单一扫描器的允许/阻止决策。发布的数据集为银标准（自动裁决而非人工标注），支持社区进一步研究，鼓励开发针对技能安全分类的专用模型。

Abstract: Agent skills extend AI agents with reusable instructions, tools, scripts, references, and workflows, establishing a security boundary distinct from both model safety and traditional package-malware detection. ClawHub Security Signals is a sanitized dataset of 67,453 latest public OpenClaw skill versions. Each row pairs redacted SKILL.md content and sanitized bundled files where present with a final ClawScan registry verdict and evidence from three scanner families: VirusTotal, static heuristic analysis, and NVIDIA SkillSpector.
  Rather than estimating malicious-skill prevalence, we study scanner disagreement. The three scanners rarely flag the same skills: any pair overlaps on at most 10.4% of their combined positives, only 0.69% of skills are flagged by all three, and 81.9% of flagged skills are identified by a single scanner. The disagreement is structured by attack surface. SkillSpector, which raises semantic agentic-risk advisories rather than malware-reputation signals, is positive for 19,209 of 25,504 suspicious rows (75.3%) but only 14 of 206 malicious rows (6.8%). The malicious-verdict region shows the inverse profile: 150 of 206 malicious rows (72.8%) are VirusTotal-positive, consistent with bundled-code malware evidence.
  These results show that agent-skill security requires layered governance, not single-scanner allow/block decisions. The corpus is released as a sanitized silver-standard dataset: labels are the registry's automated verdicts, not human-annotated ground truth, and the release represents an early, versioned snapshot intended to support the community while a human-annotated subset is developed. Further research is encouraged, including models tailored for skill-security triage.

</details>


### [466] [A Lightweight Hybrid MLP-Based Framework for Real-Time Phishing URL Detection Using Structural URL Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00889)
*Uche Unoke Emmanuel,Gideon Francis Oghie*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级混合框架，结合黑名单筛查和基于结构化URL特征的MLP分类器，实现实时钓鱼URL检测，准确率达99.24%，推理延迟仅1.2ms/URL。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统黑名单和基于规则的钓鱼检测方法反应滞后，难以识别新兴钓鱼URL，亟需一种高效、准确的实时检测方案。

Method: 提出混合框架：黑名单初步筛查 + MLP分类器，提取16个结构域、域名和安全性相关的URL特征，无需网页内容或第三方API。使用PhiUSIIL数据集训练评估，并开发了CyberGuard桌面原型应用。

Result: MLP分类器准确率99.24%，精确率98.74%，召回率99.95%，F1值99.34%，ROC-AUC 99.65%，优于RF、LR、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost。混合架构推理延迟1.2ms/URL，峰值吞吐量4200 URL/s。

Conclusion: 该框架在资源受限环境下提供了准确且计算高效的实时钓鱼URL检测方案，具备实际部署可行性。

Abstract: Phishing attacks remain a major cybersecurity threat, exploiting deceptive URLs to steal sensitive user information. Traditional blacklist and rule-based detection approaches are reactive and often fail to identify newly emerging phishing URLs. This paper proposes a lightweight hybrid framework for real-time phishing URL detection that combines blacklist-based screening with a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) classifier operating solely on structural URL features. The framework extracts 16 URL-derived features capturing structural, domain-based, and security-related characteristics without requiring webpage content access, third-party APIs, or visual rendering, making it computationally efficient for real-time deployment. The system was trained and evaluated on the PhiUSIIL phishing dataset containing 235,795 labelled URLs. Experimental results show that the proposed MLP achieved 99.24% accuracy, 98.74% precision, 99.95% recall, 99.34% F1-score, and 99.65% ROC-AUC, outperforming Random Forest, Logistic Regression, XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost under the same evaluation setting. The hybrid architecture achieved an average inference latency of 1.2 ms per URL and a peak throughput of 4,200 URLs per second under concurrent processing. A functional desktop application prototype, CyberGuard, further demonstrates deployment viability. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an accurate and computationally efficient solution for real-time phishing URL detection in resource-constrained environments.

</details>


### [467] [Framework for Discovering GPS Spoofing Attacks in Drone Swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00904)
*Yingao Elaine Yao,Pritam Dash,Karthik Pattabiraman*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究了无人机蜂群控制算法中的安全漏洞，提出两种模糊测试工具（SwarmFuzzGraph和SwarmFuzzBinary）来发现蜂群传播漏洞（SPVs），通过GPS欺骗攻击利用这些漏洞可导致无人机碰撞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的蜂群控制算法研究主要关注提高智能性，但忽略了安全层面的影响，攻击者可利用算法设计缺陷破坏蜂群系统。

Method: 提出SwarmFuzzGraph（基于图论与梯度引导优化）和SwarmFuzzBinary（基于观测种子调度与二分搜索）两种模糊测试工具，用于发现蜂群传播漏洞。

Result: SwarmFuzzGraph在流行算法中平均成功率48.8%，但在不同拓扑结构中失效；SwarmFuzzBinary成功率与前者相当，且适用于所有测试算法。

Conclusion: 蜂群控制算法存在可被利用的安全漏洞，SwarmFuzzBinary在通用性上优于SwarmFuzzGraph，可为蜂群安全防御提供支持。

Abstract: Swarm robotics, particularly drone swarms, are used in various safety-critical tasks. While a lot of attention has been given to improving swarm control algorithms for improved intelligence, the security implications of various design choices in swarm control algorithms have not been studied. We highlight how an attacker can exploit the vulnerabilities in swarm control algorithms to disrupt drone swarms. Specifically, we show that the attacker can target a swarm member (target drone) through GPS spoofing attacks, and indirectly cause other swarm members (victim drones) to veer from their course, resulting in collisions. We call these Swarm Propagation Vulnerabilities (SPVs).
  In this paper, we introduce two fuzzing tools, SwarmFuzzGraph and SwarmFuzzBinary, to efficiently find SPVs in swarm control algorithms. SwarmFuzzGraph uses a combination of graph theory and gradient-guided optimization to find SPVs. Our evaluation on a popular swarm control algorithm shows that SwarmFuzzGraph achieves an average success rate of 48.8% in finding SPVs. However, SwarmFuzzGraph fails to find any SPVs in drone swarms with different topologies. We then propose SwarmFuzzBinary, which uses observation-based seed scheduling and binary search to find SPVs. The evaluation shows that SwarmFuzzBinary's success rate is comparable to SwarmFuzzGraph and work in all tested algorithms.

</details>


### [468] [One (Thread) Can Keep a (PRNG) Secret, but not Two](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00918)
*Ehood Porat,Amit Klein,Benny Pinkas*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文首次提出利用竞争条件漏洞对XNU内核（macOS/iOS）的IPv6 Fragment ID生成算法进行密码分析攻击，成功破解PRNG内部状态并预测Fragment ID，实现IPv6分片欺骗，进而可篡改UDP和TCP数据。该漏洞被分配CVE-2024-27823，Apple已修复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对IPv6 Fragment ID的攻击多为暴力或侧信道方式，缺乏利用竞争条件进行密码分析的先例；且XNU内核的Fragment ID生成算法存在可被利用的隐蔽漏洞，威胁macOS和iOS设备安全。

Method: 利用XNU内核中PRNG的竞争条件漏洞，通过并发请求获取多个Fragment ID样本，进行密码分析以恢复PRNG内部状态，进而预测后续Fragment ID，最终实现IPv6分片欺骗攻击。

Result: 成功破解了XNU的IPv6 Fragment ID生成算法，能够准确预测Fragment ID；基于此实现了对NFS（UDP）文件写入篡改和HTTP（TCP）请求篡改两种实际攻击。

Conclusion: 这是首个利用竞争条件进行密码分析的实际攻击案例，揭示了XNU内核PRNG设计中的安全隐患。Apple已确认漏洞并修复，建议用户及时更新系统。

Abstract: We present a novel, practical attack on the IPv6 Fragment ID generation algorithm of XNU, which is the kernel used by Apple products such as macOS and iOS. This attack exploits a race-condition vulnerability in the algorithm's pseudorandom number generator (PRNG) to cryptanalytically break, learn the internal state of the generator, and consequently predict fragment IDs, which, in turn, facilitates an IPv6 fragment spoofing attack. As far as we know, this is the first cryptanalytic attack that is based on exploiting race-conditions. With fragment spoofing, it is possible to partially manipulate UDP datagrams and TCP segments. We showcase a new type of attack on NFS (UDP) where an off-path attacker modifies a file as it is written, and an attack on HTTP (TCP) where an off-path attacker modifies an HTTP request. Apple assigned this vulnerability the CVE identifier CVE-2024-27823 and patched all its XNU-based products against the attack.

</details>


### [469] [Benchmarking Security Risk Detection and Verification in Open Agentic Skill Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00925)
*Ismail Hossain,Sai Puppala,Zhuoran Lu,Sajedul Talukder,Nan Jiang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SkillVetBench是一个两阶段安全审查基准，用于检测开放智能体技能生态中的恶意技能：第一阶段基于自然语言规范进行语义审查，第二阶段在沙箱中执行可疑技能以收集运行时证据。实验表明纯静态方法漏检率高达89%，而SkillVetBench能通过执行轨迹提供具体的恶意判定证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开放智能体平台允许社区贡献可复用技能，但这引入了供应链安全风险——恶意贡献者可将有害行为隐藏在表面良性的技能中。由于缺乏同时评估恶意技能检测与运行时验证的基准，现有防御手段难以被有效评估。

Method: SkillVetBench采用两阶段审查流程：第一阶段对技能的自然语言规范进行语义审查以检测隐藏恶意意图；第二阶段在沙箱中执行被标记的技能，观察运行时行为并收集可审计证据。基准数据来自OpenClaw生态中确认的恶意技能，包括ClawHavoc供应链攻击样本。

Result: 实验表明：(1)纯语义和签名基线方法不足，对源于自然语言指令、多组件逻辑或跨组件交互的恶意技能漏检率高达89%；(2)运行时攻击集中在少量高权限原语（exec、write_file、install_skill、spawn）；(3)SkillVetBench可通过沙箱执行提供具体的运行时证据支持恶意判定。

Conclusion: SkillVetBench能有效弥补纯静态检测的不足，通过结合语义审查与沙箱运行时验证，为开放智能体技能生态提供更可靠的安全审查方案。

Abstract: Open agent platforms allow community contributors to publish reusable skills that agents can invoke at runtime. This extensibility also creates a supply-chain risk: malicious contributors can hide harmful behavior inside skills that appear benign under superficial inspection. However, existing defenses are hard to evaluate because there is no benchmark that measures both malicious-skill detection and runtime verification. We present SkillVetBench, a two-stage security vetting benchmark for open agentic skill ecosystems. The first stage performs semantic vetting over each skill's natural-language specification to detect hidden malicious intent. The second stage executes flagged skills in an instrumented sandbox to observe runtime behavior and collect auditable evidence. We build a benchmark from confirmed malicious skills in the live OpenClaw ecosystem, including samples from the recent ClawHavoc supplychain campaign. Unlike static-only methods, SkillVetBench verifies detected threats with execution traces. Our experiments show that: (1) semantic-only and signature-based baselines are insufficient, missing up to 89\% of malicious skills whose threats arise from natural-language instructions, multicomponent logic, or cross-component interactions; (2) runtime attacks are concentrated in a small set of high-permission primitives, especially exec, write\_file, install\_skill, and spawn; and (3) SkillVetBench provides case studies in which sandbox execution directly supports malicious verdicts with concrete runtime evidence.

</details>


### [470] [SS-ZKR: Spatial-Semantic Zero-Knowledge Routing for Privacy-Preserving Multi-Agent Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00962)
*Hassan Touheed*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出SS-ZKR，一种在A2A/MCP协议之上的隐私保护路由协议，通过差分隐私语义向量、自适应净化和零知识证明，实现跨组织边界的加密内容路由。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代理互操作协议（A2A、MCP）和身份框架（DID、VC）不支持在不解密的情况下进行基于内容的语义路由，这在GDPR/HIPAA/MiFID II等合规敏感环境中是不可接受的。

Method: 提出三机制协议：机制I通过差分隐私语义意图向量实现盲路由，机制II提供向量加权自适应净化和差分隐私保护，机制III将信任区域拓扑编译为零知识访问电路。

Result: 提供了形式化威胁模型、信息泄漏界限分析、三机制伪代码，以及与TEE和同态加密基线的分析复杂度对比。

Conclusion: SS-ZKR使金融服务、医疗和国防领域的企业能够在不向路由基础设施暴露专有数据的情况下，跨监管边界编排异构AI代理。

Abstract: Foundational agent interoperability standards, notably the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), have advanced multi-agent system communication, and complementary identity frameworks leveraging W3C Decentralised Identifiers (DIDs) and Verifiable Credentials (VCs) provide cryptographic agent authentication. However, no existing protocol supports content-based semantic routing of agent payloads across organisational trust boundaries without requiring the routing intermediary to decrypt the payload, which is a hard constraint in compliance-sensitive environments governed by GDPR, HIPAA, and MiFID II. We propose SS-ZKR, a three-mechanism privacy-preserving routing protocol designed as a complementary layer atop A2A/MCP. Mechanism I introduces blind routing via differentially private semantic intent vectors cryptographically bound to zero-knowledge proofs of payload-schema consistency. Mechanism II offers vector-weighted adaptive payload sanitisation with formal (epsilon, delta)-differential privacy for numerical fields and heuristic semantic aggregation for textual fields. Mechanism III presents a spatial-to-cryptographic policy compiler that translates visually defined trust-zone topologies into deterministic zero-knowledge access circuits. We provide a formal threat model, analyse information leakage bounds of intent vectors, present pseudocode for all three mechanisms, and give analytical complexity comparisons against TEE-based and homomorphic encryption-based routing baselines. SS-ZKR lets enterprises in financial services, healthcare, and defence orchestrate heterogeneous AI agents across regulatory boundaries without exposing proprietary data to routing infrastructure.

</details>


### [471] [AMP: A Vendor-Neutral Wire Format for Agent Memory Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01138)
*Thamilvendhan Munirathinam*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了memorywire，一个基于JSON-Schema 2020-12的标准化记忆线格式，支持5种记忆操作和4种记忆类型，包含开源参考实现和5种后端适配器，实验表明其在召回率、延迟和跨适配器一致性上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体记忆框架各有独立的SDK、存储格式和操作术语，缺乏统一的线格式，导致集成困难、迁移成本高，且缺少人工审核写入的治理机制。

Method: 设计了memorywire线格式（JSON-Schema 2020-12），定义5种操作（remember, recall, forget, merge, expire）和4种记忆类型（语义、 episodic、程序性、情感），提供MemoryStore接口、扇出路由器和可选的人机协同治理通道，并基于RRF、FSM、STM/LTM合并等成熟组件实现。

Result: 在100事实/50查询数据集上recall@5=1.000，ingest p50=37.8ms，recall p50=40.6ms；对抗性融合实验中RRF在注入扫描下保持recall@5=1.000；跨16场景的适配器一致性测试通过68/80单元，零失败。

Conclusion: 该工作并非提出新算法，而是将现有成熟组件打包为与协议无关的标准格式，可与Model Context Protocol协同而非竞争。

Abstract: Agent-memory frameworks - mem0, Letta/MemGPT, Cognee, Zep/Graphiti, MemoryOS, MemTensor - each ship their own SDK, storage layout, and operational vocabulary. There is no shared wire format: every integration is bespoke, every migration rebuilds memory from scratch, and no framework ships a governance surface that lets a human review writes before they enter long-term storage. We present memorywire, a JSON-Schema 2020-12 wire format for five memory operations (remember, recall, forget, merge, expire) over four memory types (semantic, episodic, procedural, emotional), with a MemoryStore interface, a fan-out router, and an optional HITL governance channel. We describe an open-source reference implementation with five backend adapters (sqlite-vec, mem0, Letta, Cognee, pgvector); a microbenchmark on a 100-fact / 50-query labelled corpus achieving recall@5 = 1.000 on the 42 labelled queries with ingest p50 = 37.8 ms and recall p50 = 40.6 ms; an adversarial-fusion experiment showing Reciprocal Rank Fusion holds recall@5 = 1.000 across a 1-of-N rank-0 injection sweep (K in {0,5,...,50}) where max fusion collapses to 0.500 with 80% leak at K >= 5; and a 16-scenario cross-adapter conformance suite passing 68 of 80 cells with zero failures. The contribution is not a new algorithm; it is a packaging of established components (RRF, FSMs, STM/LTM consolidation, diff-and-approve workflows) into a venue-neutral protocol with an empirically validated reference, positioned to compose with the Model Context Protocol rather than compete with it.

</details>


### [472] [BraveGuard: From Open-World Threats to Safer Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01166)
*Yunhao Feng,Yifan Ding,Xiaohu Du,Ming Wen,Xinhao Deng,Yanming Guo,Yuxiang Xie,Baihui Zheng,Yingshui Tan,Yige Li,Yutao Wu,Yixu Wang,Kerui Cao,Wenke Huang,Xingjun Ma,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: BraveGuard是一个面向计算机使用代理的自我进化防御框架，通过从开放世界威胁信号和真实代理轨迹中训练守卫模型，显著提升了对多步执行轨迹的安全性检测能力（在AgentHazard上准确率从38.79%提升至82.38%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算机使用代理在长期交互中产生了多步执行轨迹，安全风险往往隐藏在其中，单个动作看似无害但组合后可能产生危害。传统基于孤立提示或最终响应的检测方法难以捕捉这类风险。

Method: BraveGuard构建了一个自适应防御循环：1) 挖掘最新研究来源识别新兴风险和攻击模式；2) 将其实例化为可执行的计算机使用任务；3) 收集代理的完整执行轨迹；4) 从轨迹级推导监督信号用于训练守卫模型。当出现新威胁时重复该流程。

Result: 在AgentHazard基准上，BraveGuard将检测准确率从38.79%大幅提升至82.38%（平均守卫模型设置下），且对Qwen3-Guard和Llama-Guard等多种守卫模型均有一致性改进。

Conclusion: 基于开放世界威胁发现和真实代理执行的守卫监督，能超越固定分类体系和合成提示级数据，为应对不断演变的真实世界风险提供可扩展的自适应防御路径。

Abstract: Computer-use agents extend language models from text generation to sustained interaction with files, terminals, browsers, and external tools. This shift creates safety risks that are difficult to detect from isolated prompts or final responses, because harm often emerges only through multi-step execution traces whose individual actions appear locally benign. We introduce BraveGuard, a self-evolving defense framework for training guard models from open-world threat signals and realistic agent trajectories. BraveGuard mines recent research sources to identify emerging risks and attack patterns, instantiates them as executable computer-use tasks, collects agent rollouts, and derives trajectory-level supervision for guard model training. As new threats and validation failures appear, the pipeline can be repeated, yielding an adaptive defense loop rather than a static, benchmark-driven training process. We instantiate BraveGuard by training multiple guard backbones, including Qwen3-Guard and Llama-Guard variants, and evaluate the resulting guards on trajectory-level agent-safety benchmarks. BraveGuard consistently improves safety detection across computer-use trajectories. On AgentHazard, it substantially improves detection accuracy over off-the-shelf guard models, with accuracy increasing from 38.79% to 82.38% under the averaged guard-model setting. These results show that guard supervision grounded in open-world threat discovery and realistic agent execution can improve safety monitoring beyond fixed taxonomies and synthetic prompt-level data. BraveGuard offers a scalable path toward adaptive defenses for computer-use agents facing evolving real-world risks.

</details>


### [473] [Schema-Agnostic Knowledge Graph Construction via Hybrid Ontology Discovery for Cyber Threat Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01208)
*Seonwoo Kim,Jinwoo Kim,Daegyu Kang,Daeseong Kim,Insup Lee*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: ANCHOR是一个基于混合本体发现和SHACL验证的、与模式无关的CTI知识图谱构建系统，能利用本地LLM实现隐私保护的威胁情报分析，在UCO、STIX和MALOnt模式上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有本体对齐的CTI抽取方法面临三大挑战：模式特定管道需手动重配、基于提示的模式包含在大本体上无法扩展、依赖企业LLM API与隐私约束冲突。因此需要一种模式无关且支持隐私保护的方法。

Method: 提出ANCHOR系统，核心是混合本体发现（搜索-导航机制动态探索大规模本体模式）与SHACL验证（强制模式合规的类型分配），结合LLM实现模式无关的CTI知识图谱构建。

Result: 在UCO、STIX和MALOnt模式上的实验表明，ANCHOR在本体类型化和模式合规性方面优于现有基线。使用本地LLM时性能接近企业LLM，实现了隐私保护的高保真CTI分析。

Conclusion: ANCHOR成功解决了CTI抽取中模式依赖和隐私保护的矛盾，通过混合本体发现和SHACL验证实现了可扩展、模式无关且隐私友好的威胁情报知识图谱构建。

Abstract: Cyber threat intelligence (CTI) reports now serve as essential resources for capturing adversary tactics, techniques, and procedures observed in modern attack campaigns. While traditional CTI platforms reduce this intelligence to isolated indicators through fixed schemas such as STIX, ontology-based representations preserve the semantic relationships needed for structured threat analysis. However, existing approaches for ontology-aligned CTI extraction face three challenges: (i) schema-specific pipelines that require manual reconfiguration whenever the schema changes, (ii) prompt-based schema inclusion that fails to scale on large ontologies such as UCO, and (iii) reliance on enterprise LLM APIs that conflicts with privacy constraints when integrating sensitive internal incident data. In this paper, we present ANCHOR, a schema-agnostic CTI knowledge graph construction system that bridges LLMs and formal ontology schemas. At the core of ANCHOR is hybrid ontology discovery, a search-and-navigate mechanism that dynamically explores large-scale ontology schemas, combined with SHACL-based validation to enforce schema-compliant type assignments. Experimental results on the UCO, STIX, and MALOnt schemas show that ANCHOR outperforms existing baselines in ontology typing and schema compliance. In addition, ANCHOR with a local LLM closely matches enterprise LLM typing performance, enabling privacy-preserving CTI analysis with high fidelity.

</details>


### [474] [GPU Acceleration of Learning With Errors KEMs Using OpenACC for Post-Quantum Cryptography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01211)
*Tiziana Liberati,Nitin Shukla,Matteo Barbieri,Gabriella Bettonte,Elisabetta Boella,Simone Rizzo,Daniele Gregori,Marco Pedicini*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于LWE问题的密钥封装机制（KEM），并利用OpenACC在GPU上实现加速。在NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchip上实现了比多线程CPU基线高达208倍的加速，并在能耗效率上比x86+H100系统提升约2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shor算法证明了大整数分解和离散对数问题在量子计算机面前不再安全，因此需要开发抗量子攻击的密码学方案。LWE问题是PQC的核心难题之一，但其计算强度远高于经典密码学方案，亟需高效的加速实现。

Method: 基于标准LWE问题构建KEM方案，使用OpenACC编程模型在GPU上实现并行加速，支持裸机和容器化执行，并在多代NVIDIA GPU上评估性能。

Result: 在所有测试GPU平台上均实现显著加速，NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchip上相比多线程CPU基线获得208倍加速，且能处理CPU因内存和同步限制无法运行的大规模问题。能耗方面，Grace Hopper Superchip比x86+H100系统效率高出约2倍。

Conclusion: GPU加速对LWE这类计算密集型的密码学任务非常有效，能同时提升计算速度和能效，为后量子密码学的实际部署提供了可行的加速方案。

Abstract: Shor's algorithm proved that asymmetric cryptographic protocols based on the integer factorization and discrete logarithm problems are no longer safe in a world with large-scale quantum computers. As a result, Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) has been developed over the last few years, seeking cryptographic primitives resistant to quantum attacks. One of the main hard problems underlying PQC schemes is the Learning with Errors (LWE) problem, which is significantly more computationally intensive than its classical predecessors. In this work, we present a Key Encapsulation Mechanism (KEM) based on plain LWE and develop a GPU-oriented implementation using OpenACC. We evaluate the performance of our accelerated application in terms of both time-to-solution and energy-to-solution, considering bare-metal and containerized executions across multiple NVIDIA GPU models and generations. Our implementation achieves significant acceleration across all tested GPU platforms. In particular, on the NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchip, it attains up to a $208\times$ speedup over a multithreaded CPU baseline and enables the execution of problem sizes that are impractical on CPU architectures due to memory and synchronization constraints. Energy consumption analysis also shows $\approx 2\times$ better efficiency when using the Superchip compared to systems equipped with x86-based CPUs and NVIDIA H100 GPUs. These results highlight the effectiveness of GPU acceleration for computationally demanding LWE-based cryptographic workloads.

</details>


### [475] [Privacy-Preserving Smart Surveillance with Cross-Dataset Violence Detection and Decentralized Evidence Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01225)
*Hasan Coşkun,Furkan Çolhak,Andrea Kulakov,Vesna Dimitrova*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出了一种隐私保护的智能监控框架，将事件检测与证据披露分离，使用MobileNetV2+BiLSTM进行暴力视频检测，并通过Shamir秘密共享和多重认证实现阈值审批解密。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI监控系统虽能加速公共安全响应，但录制的证据仍处于中心化管理控制之下，缺乏隐私保护机制。

Method: 1) 使用轻量级MobileNetV2进行暴力视频分类；2) 对检测到的暴力片段立即加密，通过阈值审批才能访问；3) 采用Shamir秘密共享拆分解密密钥，成员份额由公钥密码保护；4) 投票机制支持限时令牌、双因素认证、签名和审计日志；5) 评估了MobileNetV2+LSTM、MobileNetV2+BiLSTM和MobileNetV2+时序CNN三种模型结构。

Result: 最佳模型MobileNetV2+BiLSTM在合并保留集上达到93.5%测试准确率和0.980的ROC-AUC；但在RWF-2000子集上表现较低，证实存在数据集偏移问题。

Conclusion: 该框架在智能监控中实现了隐私保护与安全性的平衡，但数据集偏移仍是需要解决的挑战。

Abstract: AI-enabled surveillance can accelerate public-safety response, yet most systems still leave recorded evidence under centralized administrative control. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving smart surveillance framework that separates incident detection from evidence disclosure. A lightweight MobileNetV2-based video classifier detects violent clips, while each recorded incident segment is immediately encrypted and made accessible only through threshold-based approval. The decryption key is split with Shamir's Secret Sharing, member shares are protected with public-key cryptography, and voting is supported by time-limited tokens, two-factor authentication, signatures, and audit logs. This study evaluates MobileNetV2+LSTM, MobileNetV2+BiLSTM, and MobileNetV2+temporal CNN heads on SCVD, RWF-2000, and Real-Life Violence Situations under seven in-domain and cross-dataset scenarios. The best all-source model, MobileNetV2+BiLSTM, reaches 93.5% test accuracy and ROC-AUC 0.980% on the merged held-out set, while lower RWF-2000 slice performance confirms persistent dataset shift.

</details>


### [476] [Formal Verification of Secure Encrypted Virtualization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01381)
*Hansika Weerasena,Amitabh Das,Prabhat Mishra*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文针对AMD SEV机密虚拟机缺乏形式化安全保证的问题，提出了一个形式化框架，通过对SEV规范进行设计和属性层面的抽象，并实施属性检查，以确保机密性、完整性和可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AMD SEV作为云端机密计算的关键技术，缺乏形式化的安全保证，现有安全分析往往基于非正式推理，难以提供严格的安全保障。

Method: 对AMD SEV规范进行设计级和属性级抽象，建立形式化模型，并通过属性检查验证机密性、完整性和可用性。

Result: 成功构建了AMD SEV机密虚拟机的形式化模型，并验证了其关键安全属性（机密性、完整性、可用性）。

Conclusion: 该形式化框架为定义和验证TEE安全属性提供了严谨基础，有助于增强AMD SEV等机密计算技术的可信度。

Abstract: Trusted execution environments (TEEs) provide a secure environment for data and code in use, ensuring that they are protected with respect to confidentiality and integrity. Virtual machine (VM)-based TEEs utilize virtualization technology to create isolated execution spaces that can support a complete operating system or specific applications. AMD secure encrypted virtualization (SEV) is a key technology used in confidential computing in the cloud enabling hardware-based memory encryption to protect sensitive data within VMs. However, AMD SEV often operate without formal assurances of their security guarantees. Our research introduces a formal framework for representing and verifying AMD SEV confidential VMs. Specifically, we conduct design-level and property-level abstraction on AMD SEV specification and conduct property checking on the model to ensure confidentiality, integrity and availability. This approach provides a rigorous foundation for defining and verifying key security attributes for safeguarding execution environments.

</details>


### [477] [Differentially Private Datastore Generation for Retrieval-Augmented Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01413)
*Abdelrahman Abouelenein,Marwan Torki*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于哈希的概率生成框架，利用局部敏感哈希（LSH）划分高维数据并添加差分隐私（DP）噪声，在仅降低平均2.6%准确率（ϵ=5）的情况下实现强隐私保护，并将成员推断攻击准确率降至53.60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代设备端AI系统依赖检索增强推理，需要在不泄露个人隐私的前提下共享数据存储。差分隐私提供了形式化保证，但如何高效创建和发布差分隐私数据存储仍是一个挑战。

Method: 提出基于哈希的概率生成框架，使用局部敏感哈希（LSH）将高维数据高效划分为桶，然后对每个桶的累积投票添加校准后的差分隐私噪声，生成跨类别的概率分布。

Result: 在7个数据集上实验，ϵ=5时仅平均降低2.6%准确率，成员推断攻击准确率降至53.60%。

Conclusion: 该方法可广泛应用于需要安全键值数据存储创建和发布的任何管道，在隐私保护和模型效用之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: It is crucial for modern on-device AI systems that rely on retrieval-augmented inference to release and share datastores without compromising individual privacy. This can be achieved using Differential Privacy (DP), which provides a formal guarantee that ensures individual contributions remain indistinguishable, even under adversarial analysis. In this paper, we introduce a hashing-based probability generation framework designed to enable the creation and release of differentially private datastores. Our approach employs locality-sensitive hashing (LSH) to efficiently partition high-dimensional data into buckets. We then add calibrated DP noise to the accumulated vote for each bucket, generating a probability distribution across classes. Our method is broadly applicable to any pipeline requiring secure key,value datastore creation and release. We conducted experiments on seven datasets with varying sample sizes and class counts, ranging from 2 to 14. At epsilon=5, our released DP datastore achieves strong privacy protection with only an average 2.6% drop in accuracy. Finally, we benchmark DP datastore resilience to membership inference attacks, reducing attack accuracy to 53.60%.

</details>


### [478] [On the Evaluation of Spiking Neural Network Configurations for Network Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01442)
*Raj Patel,David Amebley,Taye Akinrele,Shaswata Mitra,Sayanton Dibbo,Shahram Rahimi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文通过消融实验系统评估了9种脉冲神经元模型与3种脉冲编码方案组合（共27种变体）在4个网络入侵检测基准数据集上的性能，发现脉冲编码方案比神经元模型对检测质量影响更大，其中延迟编码搭配LeakyParallel神经元综合表现最优（平均准确率92.11%，宏F1 0.80，假阳性率2.01%），表明SNN在低延迟和资源受限场景下是传统入侵检测方法的可行替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有网络入侵检测中的深度学习模型计算开销大，亟需轻量级替代方案以适配边缘计算和神经形态部署；尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）天然适合该场景，但其在入侵检测中的设计空间（神经元模型与脉冲编码方案的选择）尚未被系统刻画。

Method: 采用控制消融实验，组合9种神经元与3种脉冲编码方案形成27个变体，基于snntorch框架在NSL KDD、KDDCup99、CIC-IDS2017和CTU-13四个基准数据集上进行有限预处理的原始输入评估，每种配置运行5个随机种子。

Result: 脉冲编码方案是比神经元模型更重要的检测质量决定因素；速率编码和delta编码表现差于延迟编码；LeakyParallel神经元+延迟编码综合最优，四个数据集平均准确率92.11%，宏F1 0.80，假阳性率2.01%，在CIC-IDS2017和CTU-13上接近完美准确率，同时推理速度最快。

Conclusion: SNN在低延迟或资源受限的入侵检测部署场景中，能够作为传统方法的可行替代方案，具备实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Network intrusion detection is a core component of modern cybersecurity infrastructure, yet the deep learning models that dominate the field are computationally demanding, motivating interest in lightweight alternatives suited to edge and neuromorphic deployment. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are therefore a natural candidate, but their design space, spanning the choice of neuron model and spike encoding scheme, remains poorly characterized for intrusion detection. We bridge this gap by using a controlled ablation study using 9 neurons coupled with 3 spike encoding schemes, making 27 variants, all implemented on snntorch evaluated over raw inputs with limited preprocessing on four benchmark datasets (NSL KDD, KDDCup99, CIC-IDS2017, and CTU-13) with 5 seeds. We find that spike encoding scheme is a better determinant for detection quality than the neuron model, where rate and delta spike encodings perform worse than latency encoding over the sweep. The LeakyParallel neuron with latency encoding performed the best overall, averaging at 92.11% accuracy and 0.80 macro- F1 at a rate of 2.01% false positives averaged over all 4 datasets, with accuracy close to perfect for CIC-IDS2017 and CTU-13, and also performed the fastest on inference. These results highlight the potential of SNNs as a viable alternative to traditional methods of intrusion detection when considering low-latency or resource-constrained deployments.

</details>


### [479] [NetVAD: Foundation-Model Representation Learning for Identifier-Free Unsupervised Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01452)
*Darren Fürst,Patrick Levi,Sebastian Steindl*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出NetVAD，一种结合网络基础模型与变分自编码器的无监督入侵检测方法，在ToN-IoT和IoT-23数据集上达到与监督方法竞争的性能（Micro F1 98%），并揭示了流式基础模型在检测单包侦察攻击时的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前无监督入侵检测模型性能远不如有监督分类器，且监督模型只能针对特定攻击训练。为了弥合这一差距，作者利用新兴的网络基础模型能力。

Method: 提出NetVAD，一种严格无标识符的变分自编码器，将冻结的基础模型表示投影到任务特定的隐空间，仅使用良性流量训练。

Result: 在ToN-IoT上达到98% Micro F1和96% Macro F1，对Okiru僵尸网络检测F1达99.6%，但在单包侦察事件上存在局限。

Conclusion: 大规模预训练对防止性能下降至关重要，专用解码器架构能更精确建模良性流形，通过更高的重构损失更可靠地捕获攻击。

Abstract: Detecting zero-day exploits in production networks requires robust Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS). However, current unsupervised models struggle to match the performance of supervised classifiers, which are trained for specific attacks only. To bridge this gap, we leverage the emerging capabilities of Network Foundation Models. We propose \textit{NetVAD}, a strictly identifier-free Variational Autoencoder that projects representations from a frozen Foundation Model into a task-specific latent space, trained solely on benign traffic. Evaluated on ToN-IoT and IoT-23, NetVAD achieves highly competitive unsupervised performance. On ToN-IoT, it achieves a 98% Micro F1-score and a 96% Macro F1-score at an operational false positive rate. Unlike prior work, we show the model's performance transparently for all attack-classes of the datasets. While the architecture excels at discerning complex botnet behaviour (99.6% F1 on Okiru), our evaluation reveals limitations of flow-based Foundation Models in detecting single-packet reconnaissance events. Finally, a comprehensive ablation study confirms that while large-scale pre-training is essential to prevent performance degrading, specialised decoder architectures are necessary to precisely model the complex benign manifold, ensuring attacks are caught more reliably, due to a higher reconstruction loss.

</details>


### [480] [Agent Operating Systems (AOS): Integrating Agentic Control Planes into, and Beyond, Traditional Operating Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01508)
*Ankur Sharma,Deep Shah*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出Agent操作系统（AOS）概念，将智能体控制平面集成到现有操作系统中，解决传统OS抽象在调度、内存管理、安全、可观测性等方面对智能体AI工作负载的不足，旨在为智能体计算建立可控、可问责、安全的系统基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统操作系统设计基于确定性程序、显式控制流和人类发起的工作流，其核心抽象（进程、线程、系统调用、文件、权限）假设有界行为和可预测交互模式。而智能体AI系统引入了一种不同的执行模型：长期运行、目标导向、概率推理、动态调用工具、基于反馈自适应行为。现有用户态实现无法满足其调度、状态管理、安全治理等需求。

Method: 提出AOS架构，将智能体控制平面集成到现有OS中。结构化解构AOS职责：调度器、上下文与内存管理、工具与能力注册表、策略与信任执行、可观测性与审计。分析经典OS抽象局限，提出从用户态运行时到分布式控制平面的集成模型，并在Linux和Windows原语上映射AOS概念。

Result: 定义了AOS的精确概念、显式假设与非目标，提出了结构化职责分解，映射到现有OS原语，分析了安全与安全性影响包括智能体特定威胁模型，并定义了强调确定性执行、可审计性和操作者可理解性的评估标准。

Conclusion: 目标不是完全替换操作系统，而是为智能体计算建立严谨的系统基础，使其在大规模下保持可控、可问责和安全。

Abstract: Traditional operating systems were designed around deterministic programs, explicit control flow, and human initiated workflows.
