Their core abstractions processes, threads, system calls, files, and permissions assume bounded behavior and predictable interaction patterns. Agentic AI systems introduce a different execution model: long-lived, goal-directed entities that reason probabilistically, invoke tools dynamically, and adapt behavior based on feedback. While agents can be implemented as user-space applications today, their execution characteristics stress OS boundaries in scheduling, memory and state management, security, observability, and governance. This paper introduces the concept of an Agent Operating System (AOS), a systems architecture that integrates an agentic control plane into existing operating systems or, in some models, subsumes selected OS responsibilities over time. We provide a precise definition of an AOS, explicit assumptions and non-goals, and a structured decomposition of AOS responsibilities into schedulers, context and memory management, tool and capability registries, policy and trust enforcement, and observability and audit. We analyze limitations of classical OS abstractions for agent workloads, propose integration models from user-space runtimes to distributed control planes, and map AOS concepts onto Linux and Windows primitives. We present security and safety implications, including agent specific threat models, and define evaluation criteria that emphasize deterministic enforcement, auditability, and operator comprehensibility. The objective is not to replace operating systems wholesale, but to establish a rigorous systems foundation for agentic computation that remains controllable, accountable, and secure at scale.

</details>


### [481] [Defenses & Enablers For Skill Injection Attacks on Terminal Based Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01567)
*Yoshinari Fujinuma,Varun Gangal,Traian Rebedea,Makesh Narasimhan Sreedhar,Prasoon Varshney,Rebecca Qian,Anand Kannappan*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM代理在复用技能文档时面临的安全威胁，提出基于守护者的防御机制（动态与静态），并测试攻击重框架下的鲁棒性。实验表明守护者可将攻击成功率降低过半，动态守护者更具鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理越来越依赖可复用的技能文档，这引入了新的攻击面，现有研究缺乏对此类威胁的系统性防御与评估。

Method: 提出两种守护者防御：动态守护者（实时中介访问）和静态守护者（构建时重写文件）。并通过四种攻击重框架技术进行压力测试。

Result: 守护者将攻击成功率降低过半且保持任务效用。无守护时攻击重框架将成功率推至81.4%，动态守护者降至18.6%。

Conclusion: 实时中介（动态守护者）是一种鲁棒的防御机制，能有效抵御攻击重框架等威胁。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable skills i.e. documents describing task-specific procedures. However, this introduces a new attack surface for agents to manage. We study two complementary directions for this threat. First, we evaluate guardian-based defenses: an intermediary LLM agent that acts as a mediator for skill file access (dynamic guardian) or pre-rewrites these files at build time (static guardian). Across three LLM agent families, our guardians cut attack success rate (ASR) by well over half while preserving task utility. Second, we stress test them through attack reframing using four attacks that preserve the malicious instruction but change the phrasing. For non-guardian setup, the reframing pushes the ASR up to 81.4\%, but the dynamic guardian brings it down to 18.6\%, showing that real-time mediation is a robust defense.

</details>


### [482] [CoreUnlearn: Rethinking Concept Unlearning through Disentangled Component-Level Erasure in Text-guided Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01658)
*Mengnan Zhao,Lihe Zhang,Baocai Yin*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: CoreUnlearn通过解耦和移除概念嵌入中的关键成分来实现概念擦除，在有效移除不良概念的同时最大程度保留模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本引导扩散模型的图像合成技术存在隐私泄露和有害内容生成等伦理问题，而当前的对齐微调方法受限于文本空间的表征能力，且对预定义擦除参考的选择高度敏感，次优参考会严重影响模型效用保持。

Method: 提出CoreUnlearn框架，包含组件提取模块(CEM)和交换解耦策略(SDS)。SDS引导CEM预训练将概念嵌入分解为不同组件类型，然后移除擦除关键组件同时保留非关键组件，通过微调模型权重实现概念擦除。

Result: 大量实验表明CoreUnlearn实现了有效的概念擦除，且对模型整体性能影响极小。

Conclusion: CoreUnlearn通过解耦和选择性移除概念中的关键组件，克服了现有方法在文本空间表征能力上的限制和对擦除参考敏感的问题，在概念擦除任务中取得了更好的效果与效用保持平衡。

Abstract: Text guided diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis but also raise ethical concerns, such as privacy violation and harmful content generation. To mitigate these issues, prevailing methods typically leverage an alignment mechanism, with predefined erasure references, to fine-tune pretrained model weights. However, these techniques are intrinsically limited by the representational capacity of textual space and display high sensitivity to the choice of predefined erasure references, e.g., suboptimal references may significantly affect the model utility preservation during erasure. To overcome these limitations, we introduce CoreUnlearn, aiming to disentangle and remove the erasure-critical component of the undesirable concept. Specifically, CoreUnlearn comprises a Component Extraction Module (CEM) and a Swap Disentangling Strategy (SDS). Guided by SDS, CEM is pre-trained to decompose concept embeddings into distinct component types. Leveraging this decomposition, CoreUnlearn then removes the erasure-critical component while retaining non-critical ones by fine-tuning model weights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoreUnlearn achieves effective concept erasure with minimal impact on overall model performance.

</details>


### [483] [IstGPT: LLM-based Anomaly Detection for Spatial-Temporal Graph in Industrial Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01691)
*Yuchen Zhang,Ning Xi,Pengbin Feng,Shigang Liu,Jianfeng Ma,Yulong Shen,Yanan Sun,Xiaolin Zhou*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: IstGPT是首个基于大语言模型和图学习的工业异常检测工具，通过多模态知识提取传感器-执行器依赖图，结合图神经网络与编码器-解码器架构，在9个数据集上达到最优的F1分数和eTaF1指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工业异常检测工具因传感器与执行器间复杂的依赖关系，在实时检测方面效果有限。

Method: 1. 利用多模态工业知识（运行数据、技术文档、系统图）通过多阶段提示工程提取依赖图；2. LLM优化迭代精炼图结构；3. 集成改进图神经网络与编码器-解码器架构，通过重构误差检测异常。

Result: 在9个数据集（2个公开、6个模拟、1个真实机器人数据集）上，IstGPT在F1分数和eTaF1指标上均优于12个现有最优基线方法。

Conclusion: IstGPT在工业异常检测中展现了优越性能，并具备在真实工业场景中部署的可行性。

Abstract: Industrial Internet systems face increasing threats from sophisticated industrial control system (ICS) attacks, resulting in critical safety incidents. However, existing tools exhibit limited effectiveness in real-time anomaly detection due to the complex dependencies among sensors and actuators. To tackle this, we present IstGPT, the first industrial anomaly detection tool based on LLMs and graph learning to provide real-time protection against a wide range of ICS attacks. IstGPT achieves fine-grained and precise modeling on spatial-temporal dependencies in industrial cyber-physical systems. It first leverages industrial multi-modal knowledge, including operational data, technical documents, and system diagrams, to extract sensor-actuator dependency graphs via multi-stage prompt engineering. Then, LLM-Optimation iteratively refines the graph based on node accuracy, edge consistency, and logical coherence. Finally, IstGPT integrated improved graph neural networks with an encoder-decoder architecture to detect anomalies via reconstruction errors. We evaluate IstGPT against 12 state-of-the-art baselines on 9 datasets, including 2 public, 6 simulated, and a real-world robotic arm dataset. IstGPT achieves the best F1-scores and eTaF1 (a newer time-aware metric) across nine datasets. We further discuss the feasibility of deploying IstGPT in real-world industrial scenarios.

</details>


### [484] [SECUREVENT: Hybrid AI/ML Security Monitoring for Distributed Event-Based Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01741)
*Eric Liang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出SECUREVENT，一种面向分布式事件系统的混合AI/ML安全监控架构，通过结合传统防护与在线异常检测、图感知行为特征、复杂事件策略、联邦学习及对抗ML治理，在动态事件流场景下提升安全检测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分布式事件系统（发布/订阅、IoT遥测、云原生微服务等）的松耦合和异步特性扩大了攻击面，而单个组件无法观测全局行为，传统静态规则难以应对动态变化的事件流、身份、模式和时序关系。

Method: 提出混合AI/ML安全监控架构SECUREVENT，融合认证传输、主题级授权、签名事件等传统防护，以及在线异常检测、图感知行为特征、复杂事件处理（CEP）策略规则、联邦学习和对抗ML治理。

Result: 在合成事件流攻击上的确定性原型研究表明，混合AI/CEP监控器相比静态规则能提升召回率，同时保持较低的假阳性率。

Conclusion: 机器学习不能替代密码学和访问控制机制，但在事件流、身份、模式和时序关系过于动态、静态控制无法单独应对时，基于模型的安全监控是必要的。

Abstract: Distributed event-based systems have become a common substrate for Internet-scale publish/subscribe services, IoT telemetry, cloud-native microservices, and security operations pipelines. Their loose coupling and asynchronous delivery improve scalability, but they also expand the attack surface: publishers, brokers, subscribers, topics, schemas, and temporal ordering can each be abused without a single component observing the whole behavior. This paper proposes SECUREVENT, a hybrid AI/ML security-monitoring architecture for distributed event-based systems. The architecture combines traditional protections such as authenticated transport, topic-level authorization, and signed events with online anomaly detection, graph-aware behavioral features, complex-event policy rules, federated learning, and adversarial-ML governance. A deterministic prototype study over synthetic event-stream attacks illustrates how a hybrid AI/CEP monitor can improve recall over static rules while retaining a low false-positive rate. The central claim is not that machine learning replaces cryptographic and access-control mechanisms, but that model-based security monitoring is necessary when event flows, identities, schemas, and timing relationships are too dynamic for static controls alone.

</details>


### [485] [Tridirectional Discriminating-Power Formal Verification of Smart Contract Reentrancy Defense Against Production-Deployed Solidity Source](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01794)
*Ray Iskander*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文首次在Lean 4中对OpenZeppelin重入锁模式在已部署的Solidity源代码上进行了机器验证的正确性证明，所有13个定理均零公理、零假设地完成检查，并覆盖了DAO 2016攻击、Compound v2和Aave V3三个生产级实例及其边界情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能合约重入攻击自2016年以来已造成超5亿美元损失，其中DAO攻击导致约360万ETH被盗并引发以太坊硬分叉。OpenZeppelin的ReentrancyGuard是DeFi领域的实际标准防御方案，但此前没有任何工作系统地证明该模式既能阻止攻击、又能保证正常执行，同时还能区分相邻的安全与易受攻击变体。

Method: 针对DAO 2016、Compound v2和Aave V3 flashLoan三个生产实例及一个最小差异突变体（flashLoanVulnerable）进行三重验证：(a) 复现DAO 2016攻击模式，(b) 证明Compound v2的正确性，(c) 通过边界情况证明区分Aave V3的CEI合规flashLoan与突变体。所有证明在Lean 4中完成，零sorry、零用户引入公理，公理足迹仅限[propext]，并在CI下持续验证。

Result: 成功完成了13个定理的机器验证，所有定理均零公理、零假设通过检查。构建了"无回溯改造"原则下的元定理，并完成了首例跨协议压力测试（从Compound v2到Aave V3）。完整源代码及可复现配置已开源。

Conclusion: 该工作首次为OpenZeppelin重入锁模式提供了具有区分能力的机器验证证明，覆盖了攻击复现、正确性证明和边界情况区分三个方向，填补了此前研究在"两者兼顾加边界情况"方面的空白。更广泛协议族的可移植性留作未来工作。

Abstract: We present the first machine-checked correctness proof of the OpenZeppelin reentrancy-guard pattern against a Lean 4 state-machine model of production-deployed Solidity source. All thirteen theorems are machine-checked with zero sorry, zero user-introduced axioms, and an axiom footprint bounded by [propext] (a standard mathlib4 axiom), gated under continuous integration.
  Smart contract reentrancy has caused over US$500M in documented losses since 2016, with the DAO 2016 attack draining ~3.6M ETH and forcing the hard fork that split Ethereum. The OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard pattern is the de facto defense across production DeFi, yet no prior work has established its discriminating power: that the guard blocks attacks on vulnerable instances, preserves correct execution for non-attacking transactions, and distinguishes adjacent safe and vulnerable variants. Prior efforts formalized either guard correctness on toy contracts or attack feasibility on isolated instances - not both directions plus boundary cases against production source.
  We verify three production instantiations - DAO 2016, Compound v2, and Aave V3 flashLoan - plus a minimal-diff mutant of Aave V3's flashLoan (flashLoanVulnerable) isolating one security-critical difference, via mutation testing. The tridirectional structure pairs (a) attack reproduction of the DAO 2016 pattern, (b) a correctness proof for Compound v2, and (c) a boundary-case proof distinguishing Aave V3's CEI-correct flashLoan from the mutant. A capstone meta-theorem composes the three under a no-retrofit discipline, demonstrated at the first cross-protocol stress test (Compound v2 to Aave V3); broader-family portability is future work.
  Full Lean 4 source, CI config and reproduction commands are at https://github.com/rayiskander2406/qanary-contracts, reproducible at v1.6-phase7-closure (substrate: v1.3-layer6-closure).

</details>


### [486] [Benign Inputs, Harmful Outputs: Cross-Modal Jailbreaking via Distributed Semantic Recomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01837)
*Yani Wang,Yilong Yang,Yang Liu,Zhuzhu Wang,Zuobin Ying,Zhuo Ma*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出分布式语义重组（DSR）框架，通过将有害意图分解为良性文本和视觉基元，利用多模态大模型的推理能力在跨模态推理阶段实现有害输出合成，揭示了模型的效用-安全悖论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全防护主要针对单模态文本输入拦截，对跨模态越狱攻击脆弱；而传统攻击（无论单模态文本还是跨模态）通常在输入层面包含明显有害内容，容易被安全过滤器检测。

Method: 提出分布式语义重组（DSR）框架，将有害意图分解为一组良性的文本和视觉基元，利用模型的推理能力，在跨模态推理阶段将这些看似无害的组件潜在地融合成有害输出。

Result: 在多个商业多模态大模型流水线上，DSR实现了优越的攻击成功率，同时保持极低甚至可忽略不计的输入毒性率。

Conclusion: 发现了多模态大模型中关键的效用-安全悖论：模型的指令遵循能力反而促进了自身认知被利用。提示本文包含有害模型响应。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in content synthesis and autonomous reasoning. Previous safety guardrails are primarily designed for unimodal textual input interception, leaving them vulnerable to cross-modal jailbreak attacks. However, regardless unimodal textual attack or cross-modal jailbreak, typically inclusive part of explicit harmful or sensitive content at the input level, which is called Harm-Bearing. It allow the model's safety filters to detect and block such content easily. To address this limitations, we propose Distributed Semantic Recomposition (DSR), a novel cross-modal jailbreak framework that decomposes harmful intent into a set of benign textual and visual primitives. By exploiting the model's reasoning ability, DSR enables the latent fusion of these seemingly innocent components into harmful outputs during the cross-modal inference phase. Extensive experiments on multiple commercial MLLMs pipelines demonstrate that DSR achieves superior attack success rates while maintaining an extremely low or even negligible input toxicity rate. Our findings uncover a critical Utility-Safety Paradox in MLLMs, where the model's instruction-following proficiency facilitates its own cognitive exploitation. Content Warning: This paper contains harmful model responses.

</details>


### [487] [Implementation and Optimization of HQC Decoding on NPU-Integrated Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01968)
*Vu Minh Chau,Nguyen Ngoc Kiet,Pham Quang Minh,Mai Xuan Ngoc,Nguyen Duc Anh,Hoang Ta*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文研究了在集成NPU的骁龙设备Hexagon处理器上，利用HVX向量化后端优化HQC后量子密码解码算法，通过重新设计核心内核（向量化Hadamard变换、有限域运算、综合征计算等），实现了最高18.13倍的能效提升，并显著减轻了主机CPU负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HQC已被NIST选为标准化后量子密码算法，但其解码过程（尤其是Reed-Muller和Reed-Solomon分量）计算开销大，在移动和嵌入式平台上高效部署面临挑战，需要针对性优化。

Method: 利用Qualcomm Hexagon处理器的HVX向量扩展后端，重新设计解码内核，包括：向量化Reed-Muller Hadamard变换、标量等效峰值选择、HVX面向的有限域算术、向量化综合征计算、缩短支撑定位子根评估，采用HVX友好的数据布局和执行模式。

Result: 在Snapdragon 8 Gen 2开发套件上测试，Hexagon/HVX辅助解码显著降低了延迟和能耗，能效提升最高达18.13倍，同时大幅卸载了主机CPU的工作负载。

Conclusion: 集成NPU的移动平台在将底层内核重新设计为向量化执行后，能够作为结构化后量子密码解码的有效后端。

Abstract: Hamming Quasi-Cyclic (HQC) has been selected by NIST for standardization as an additional code-based key-encapsulation mechanism, providing algorithmic diversity alongside lattice-based post-quantum cryptography. Efficient deployment of HQC on mobile and embedded platforms, however, requires careful optimization of its decoding procedure, whose Reed-Muller and Reed-Solomon components dominate the computational cost. This paper studies HQC decoding on Qualcomm Hexagon processors in NPU-integrated devices, focusing on the Hexagon Vector eXtensions (HVX) backend rather than a tensor-inference engine. We observe that HQC decoding naturally exposes vector-structured computation, including Reed-Muller reliability vectors, Hadamard-transform coefficients, Reed-Solomon syndrome vectors, finite-field products, and packed support-point evaluations. Based on this observation, we redesign the dominant decoding kernels around HVX-friendly data layouts and execution patterns, including a vectorized Reed-Muller Hadamard transform, scalar-equivalent peak selection, HVX-oriented finite-field arithmetic, vectorized syndrome computation, and shortened-support locator-root evaluation. We implement and evaluate the optimized decoder using both Hexagon simulator measurements and real-device experiments on a Snapdragon~8 Gen~2 hardware development kit. The results show that Hexagon/HVX-assisted decoding substantially reduces latency and energy consumption, improving energy efficiency by up to $18.13\times$ while significantly offloading host CPU work. These results indicate that NPU-integrated mobile platforms can serve as effective backends for structured post-quantum cryptographic decoding when the underlying kernels are reformulated around vector execution.

</details>


### [488] [PeAR: A Static Binary Rewriting Framework for Binary-Only Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02126)
*Alvin Charles,Adrian Herrera,Peter Oslington,Alwen Tiu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出PeAR，一种基于静态二进制插桩（SBI）的纯二进制模糊测试框架，证明SBI在准确性和可扩展性上可与动态二进制插桩（DBI）媲美，并在FUZZBENCH基准上实现了4倍吞吐量提升和88%的目标覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有纯二进制模糊测试主要依赖动态二进制插桩（DBI），但DBI存在运行时开销；静态二进制插桩（SBI）被认为存在准确性和可靠性问题。本文旨在证明SBI是一种可行且高效的替代方案。

Method: 利用现成的静态二进制重写框架构建PeAR，实现多种现代模糊测试特性（延迟初始化、持久模式、共享内存模糊测试），并在FUZZBENCH基准上进行了4.25 CPU-年的实验评估。

Result: (i) 成功插桩88%的FUZZBENCH目标；(ii) 使用持久模式和共享内存时中位吞吐量提升4倍；(iii) 覆盖率与基于编译器的插桩相当。

Conclusion: SBI是纯二进制模糊测试中实用且有效的技术，现代二进制重写框架能够以高粒度和可忽略的性能损失实现复杂插桩。

Abstract: Binary-only fuzzing is a key technique for finding bugs in close-source software. Without access to source code, the fuzzer must rely on static or dynamic binary instrumentation for coverage guidance. In practice, most fuzzers favor dynamic binary instrumentation (DBI), accepting runtime overhead to avoid the perceived accuracy and soundness challenges associated with static binary instrumentation (SBI). We show that these concerns are unwarranted, and that accurate, scalable~SBI is achievable using off-the-shelf frameworks. Building on these frameworks, we develop PeAR, an extensible binary-only fuzzing framework. We demonstrate PeAR's versatility by implementing several modern fuzzer features -- including, deferred initialization, persistent mode, and shared-memory fuzzing.
  We evaluate PeAR over 4.25 CPU-yrs of fuzzing on the FUZZBENCH benchmark and find that PeAR: (i) successfully instruments 88% of FUZZBENCH targets, comparable to the best SBI-based fuzzers; (ii) achieves a median throughput improvement of 4x when using persistent mode and shared memory fuzzing; and (iii) attains coverage comparable to compiler-based instrumentation.
  Our results show that SBI is a practical and effective technique for binary-only fuzzing, and that modern binary rewriting frameworks can apply complex instrumentation with high granularity and negligible performance compromise.

</details>


### [489] [The Unicity Execution Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02181)
*Ahto Buldas,Dirk Draheim,Mike Gault,Risto Laanoja,Vladimir Rogojin,Ahto Truu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了Unicity执行层，一个支持安全离线交易并防止双花的模块化框架，通过公钥所有权模型和数字签名证明了三个安全属性，并引入广义多公钥签名方案实现用户侧隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的区块链系统在处理离线交易时面临双重支付（双花）的安全挑战，同时需要在交易隐私和身份管理之间取得平衡。作者提出Unicity执行层，旨在实现无需信任的双花预防的同时，兼顾服务端和用户端的隐私保护。

Method: 采用形式化安全模型，以公钥代表代币所有权、数字签名代表转账授权；通过数学证明三个安全属性；引入广义多公钥签名方案（允许一个私钥生成多个不可关联的公钥），并设计了交互式和非交互式两种具体实现。

Result: 严格证明了无双花、无阻塞和服务端隐私三个安全属性；提出的多公钥签名方案能够实现用户侧隐私，支持稳定公钥身份下的私有交易，且密钥管理开销最小。

Conclusion: Unicity执行层为离线交易提供了安全且保护隐私的解决方案，在防止双花的同时实现了服务端和用户端的双重隐私保护，具备实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper introduces the Unicity Execution Layer, a modular component of the Unicity framework enabling secure off-chain transactions while maintaining trustless double-spending prevention. We present a formal security model where token ownership is represented by public keys and transfers require digital signatures. We prove three fundamental security properties: (1) no double-spending--each token state can be spent at most once, (2) no blocking--only the legitimate owner can prevent a token from being spent, and (3) service-side privacy--the Unicity Service cannot link transactions with the same token. The user-side privacy is addressed by introducing generalized multi-public-key signature schemes that allow one secret to generate multiple unlinkable public keys, and interactive and non-interactive concrete instantiations, enabling private transactions with stable public identity with minimal key management overhead.

</details>


### [490] [Unicity: Predicates and Atomic Swaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02192)
*Ahto Buldas,Dirk Draheim,Mike Gault,Risto Laanoja,Vladimir Rogojin,Ahto Truu*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了谓词化Unicity代币所有权，将智能合约功能移至链下由依赖方直接执行，并证明其安全性可归约为谓词族不可伪造性，同时展示了如何通过谓词实现无信任原子交换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将Unicity代币所有权泛化为可编程支出条件（谓词），使智能合约类功能在链下由依赖方而非共识参与者执行，以提升灵活性和效率。

Method: 定义了谓词化代币所有权模型，将安全性归约为谓词族不可伪造性，并通过构建无信任原子交换作为实例验证模型效用。

Result: 证明了Unicity执行层的安全属性在归约到谓词族不可伪造性后得以保持。

Conclusion: 谓词化模型可实现链下可编程支出条件，且安全可证，原子交换是有效的应用示例。

Abstract: We generalize Unicity token ownership to programmable spending conditions called predicates, enabling smart-contract like functionality executed off-chain directly by relying parties rather than by consensus participants. We prove that the security properties of the Unicity execution layer are preserved under reduction to predicate family unforgeability. To demonstrate the utility of the model, we show how to implement trustless atomic swaps by using predicates.

</details>


### [491] [PyFEX: Uncovering Evasive Python-based Threats via Resilient and Exhaustive Path Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02196)
*Meng Wang,Yue Ma,Majid Garoosi,Wenting Fan,Liwei Guo,Jianqiang Wang,Ali Abbasi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PyFEX是一个弹性强制执行引擎，通过系统性地探索所有条件分支、合成虚拟对象恢复崩溃、路径合并及自动发现休眠函数，有效检测PyPI恶意包和跨平台编译二进制文件。基于该引擎构建的PyFEXScan在真实部署中发现了212个未知恶意包（超91,648次下载），优于现有静态和动态分析工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态分析工具被运行时混淆和编译字节码所蒙蔽，而动态分析工具脆弱易被环境检测规避，且常因依赖不满足而提前终止，无法有效应对针对PyPI的软件供应链攻击和跨平台恶意二进制文件的双重威胁。

Method: 提出弹性强制执行引擎PyFEX，核心技术包括：(1) 强制遍历所有条件分支以绕过规避检查；(2) 引入崩溃恢复机制，在运行时合成虚拟对象满足失败操作；(3) 采用路径合并缓解路径爆炸；(4) 设计自动化入口识别机制主动发现并调用休眠函数，暴露隐藏于未调用API中的恶意逻辑。

Result: 在已知恶意PyPI包和真实编译二进制文件上，PyFEX暴露了现有工具遗漏的关键行为；在PyPI实时部署中，PyFEXScan发现了212个此前未知的恶意包，累计下载量超过91,648次。

Conclusion: 弹性且全面的分析对保障Python生态安全至关重要，PyFEX通过其强制执行和崩溃恢复机制有效弥补了现有分析工具的不足。

Abstract: The rapid expansion of the Python ecosystem has fueled two distinct but converging threats: adversaries increasingly target the software supply chain via the Python Package Index (PyPI), while also building evasive, cross-platform malicious binaries compiled from source code written in Python. Current program analysis techniques struggle to address this dual threat. Static analysis based tools are often blinded by runtime obfuscation and compiled bytecode, while dynamic analysis based ones are fragile, prone to evasion by environmental guardrails, and often terminates prematurely due to unsatisfied dependencies.
  To overcome these limitations, we present PyFEX, a resilient forced-execution engine. PyFEX explores a program's behavioral space systematically by forcing execution across all conditional branches to bypass evasion checks. To address the fragility of dynamic execution, it introduces a novel resilient crash recovery mechanism that synthesizes dummy objects to satisfy failed operations at the runtime, allowing analysis to proceed past fatal errors, and employs path merging to mitigate path explosion. PyFEX further incorporates an automated entry identification mechanism that proactively discovers and invokes dormant functions, exposing malicious logic hidden within uncalled APIs. To demonstrate the efficacy of this engine, we built PyFEXScan, a proof-of-concept malware detector built on top of PyFEX. Evaluated against both known malicious PyPI packages and real-world compiled binaries, PyFEX exposes critical behaviors missed by the existing state-of-the-art tools. In a live deployment on PyPI, PyFEXScan discovered 212 previously unknown malicious packages accounting for over 91,648 downloads, underscoring the necessity of resilient, exhaustive analysis for securing the Python ecosystem.

</details>


### [492] [AgentRedBench: Dynamic Redteaming and Integration-Aware Defense for LLM Agents over SaaS Integrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02240)
*Hiskias Dingeto,Will Leeney*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出AGENTREDBENCH，一个针对LLM工具型代理的间接提示注入攻击动态红队基准测试，覆盖24种企业集成和5种攻击类型，并开源了AGENTREDGUARD防护模型，将攻击成功率从69.9%降至2.4%，误报率仅0.37%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试对间接提示注入威胁评估不足，多数仅覆盖少量集成且攻击载荷固定，开源防护模型基于聊天数据而非工具响应内容训练，无法有效应对真实生产环境中的攻击。

Method: 构建215个微妙授权边界攻击场景，覆盖24种企业集成、9个功能族和5种攻击类型；采用LLM驱动的动态红队测试方法；训练基于集成多样化的工具对抗响应内容语料的AGENTREDGUARD防护模型。

Result: 无防护时攻击成功率为32%-81%；AGENTREDGUARD将攻击成功率从69.9%降至2.4%，误报率仅0.37%，在跨集成和跨攻击类型测试中均优于所有开源基线。

Conclusion: 提出的基准测试和防护模型有效缓解了工具型代理中的间接提示注入威胁，且防护效果具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Indirect prompt injection in tool-use agents is a concrete production threat: LLM agents read from integrations (third-party services such as Gmail, Salesforce, or Jira accessed through tool calls) whose response content the user neither writes nor controls. Existing benchmarks under-measure the threat: most cover only a handful of integrations with the same attack payload replayed across runs, and open-source guards are trained on chat-style data rather than tool-response content. We introduce AGENTREDBENCH, a dynamic LLM-driven redteaming benchmark of 215 subtle underspecified authorization (attacks at the boundary of what the user's request authorises) scenarios across 24 enterprise integrations in nine functional families and five attack types. Across an eight-model panel (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google), no-guard ASR (attack success rate) ranges from 32% (Claude Sonnet 4.6) to 81% (Gemini 3 Flash). To keep the scenario set out of training corpora and preserve headline ASR meaning over time, we release the codebase, integration schemas, and AGENTREDGUARD model openly; the canonical scenarios are evaluated through a maintainer-mediated channel with immutable versioning. We release AGENTREDGUARD alongside the benchmark: a guard trained on an integration-diverse corpus of adversarial tool-response content. AGENTREDGUARD cuts panel ASR from 69.9% to 2.4% at 0.37% false-positive rate, outperforming every open-source baseline with non-trivial detection (Llama Guard, PromptGuard 2, ProtectAI) on both axes. Cross-integration and cross-attack type holdouts both confirm the gain transfers beyond the training subset.

</details>


### [493] [SeClaw: Spec-Driven Security Task Synthesis for Evaluating Autonomous Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02302)
*Hao Cheng,Changtao Miao,Tianle Song,Yin Wu,He Liu,Erjia Xiao,Junchi Chen,Xiaoyu Shi,Yichi Wang,Jing Yang,Taowen Wang,Jinhao Duan,Mengshu Sun,Peiyan Dong,Xuan Shen,Yang Cao,Renjing Xu,Kaidi Xu,Jindong Gu,Bo Zhang,Jize Zhang,Chenhao Lin,Philip Torr,Chao Shen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SeClaw是一个结合规范驱动安全任务合成与执行安全评估的框架，用于评估自主LLM代理在状态化环境中的安全性，覆盖资源、用户任务、环境和内在行为等多类风险，并提供标准化测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主LLM代理安全评估存在三个局限：依赖人工构建任务、新兴威胁覆盖不足、过度关注最终结果而忽略执行过程。需要一种可扩展、可控制且能评估过程安全的基准测试方案。

Method: 提出SeClaw框架，包含两大核心组件：1) 规范驱动的安全任务合成，从结构化风险规范自动构建安全测试任务；2) SeClaw Docker标准化测试平台，支持多种风险场景下的代理行为评估，并提供轨迹感知的恶意行为检测。

Result: 构建了覆盖资源、用户任务、环境和内在行为四类风险的基准测试，支持超越最终响应的轨迹级行为安全评估。

Conclusion: SeClaw通过系统化任务合成与可复现安全评估的桥梁，为自主LLM代理的安全性测量、诊断和比较提供了实用基础。

Abstract: Autonomous LLM agents increasingly operate in stateful environments where they access tools, files, memory, and external services. While such capabilities enable complex real-world workflows, they also introduce security risks that are difficult to capture with existing evaluations. Current agent security benchmarks often rely on manually curated tasks, provide limited coverage of emerging threats, and focus primarily on final outcomes rather than the execution processes that lead to unsafe behavior. We introduce SeClaw, a framework that combines specification-driven security task synthesis with execution-based security evaluation for Autonomous agents. Spec-driven security task synthesis enables scalable and controllable construction of security tasks from structured risk specifications, while SeClaw docker provides a standardized testbed for evaluating agent behavior under diverse safety-risk scenarios. The benchmark covers risks arising from resources, user tasks, environments, and intrinsic agent behaviors, and supports trajectory-aware assessment of unsafe actions beyond final responses. By bridging systematic task synthesis and reproducible security evaluation, SeClaw provides a practical foundation for measuring, diagnosing, and comparing security failures in autonomous LLM agents. The code is available at https://github.com/seclaw-eval/seclaw-eval.

</details>


### [494] [I-(OT)^2: A Client-optimal Oblivious Transfer Protocol for IoT Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02344)
*Elia Onofri,Andrea Ciccotelli,Roberto Di Pietro*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于二次剩余问题的新型基础1-out-of-2茫然传输协议I-(OT)²，旨在最小化接收端计算开销和交互轮次，在低功耗物联网设备上实现了比SimplestOT快10倍以上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OT扩展协议在传输数量较少或通信延迟和客户端计算受限场景下实用性不足，因此高效的基础OT协议仍然必要。

Method: 基于二次剩余问题(QR)构造1-out-of-2 OT协议，通过轻量级离线预计算将在线计算负担几乎全部转移给发送方，在线通信仅需6条消息和4个摘要交换。

Result: 在128位安全强度(3072位RSA模数)下，接收端每次OT在线成本：桌面平台2.80μs，IoT设备39.90μs，比SimplestOT快10倍以上。

Conclusion: I-(OT)²特别适用于接收端为低功耗硬件的客户端-服务器架构（如IoT设备），是一种高效实用的基础OT协议。

Abstract: Oblivious Transfer (OT) is a fundamental cryptographic primitive enabling privacy-preserving computation and constitutes a core building block for secure multi-party computation while supporting a wide range of security-sensitive applications: private information retrieval, zero-knowledge proofs, and password-authenticated key exchange, to cite a few. While recent advances in OT extension have significantly reduced amortised costs, their reliance on batches of random base OTs and substantial pre-computation phases limits their practicality in scenarios where the number of transfers is modest or where communication latency and client-side computation are critical constraints. In such settings, efficient base OT protocols remain both relevant and necessary. In this work, we introduce $I$-$(OT)^2$, a novel base 1-out-of-2 OT protocol grounded in the quadratic residuosity problem, specifically designed to minimise receiver-side computation and interaction. Our construction is particularly appealing on client--server architectures in which the receiver operates on low-power hardware, such as Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Through a lightweight offline pre-computation phase, $I$-$(OT)^2$ shifts the on-transfer computational burden almost entirely to the Sender, while reducing online communication to only six messages and four digests exchanged. We provide a detailed description of the protocol, accompanied by a formal proof of its security. Moreover, to demonstrate the viability of $I$-$(OT)^2$, we also present an open-source proof-of-concept implementation (in C language) evaluated on real IoT hardware. Results are staggering: for 128-bit security using a 3072-bit RSA modulus, the receiver incurs an average online cost per OT as low as 2.80 μs on desktop platforms and 39.90 μs on IoT devices, more than 10$\times$ faster than the well known SimplestOT.

</details>


### [495] [Ghost Tool Calls: Issue-Time Privacy for Speculative Agent Tools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02483)
*Bardia Mohammadi,Lars Klein,Akhil Arora,Laurent Bindschaedler*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的隐私风险：工具增强型语言代理在推测性提前调用工具时，会向外部服务泄露用户意图，即使后续分支被放弃，泄露的信息也无法撤回。作者提出“推测性工具隐私契约”运行时抽象，并评估了12种策略，发现只有发送时刻干预才能减少推断风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工具增强型语言代理为降低延迟而推测性地提前发出工具调用，但这些调用会在代理尚未最终确认执行路径前，将用户意图泄露给外部服务。即使代理后续放弃该分支，外部观察者已经获取的信息无法撤销，这构成了超越传统权限控制的新型隐私风险。

Method: 作者将“观察到承诺前的推测性调用”视为一种一阶效应（first-class effect），与状态变更区分开来，并据此设计了“推测性工具隐私契约”运行时抽象。实现了原型系统，并在三个数据集上评估了12种隐私策略。

Result: 推测性分发会增加观察者对用户意图的推断能力；事后过滤、只读限制和访问控制白名单无法消除这种推断风险；只有那些在发送时刻改变或抑制推测性调用的参数或目标投影的策略才能减少推断。

Conclusion: 现有方法（事后清理、只读限制、访问控制）不足以解决推测性调用带来的隐私泄露问题，必须从发送时刻（issue-time）进行干预，通过修改或抑制推测性调用的内容或目标来保护用户隐私。

Abstract: Tool-augmented language agents speculatively issue likely future tool calls to hide latency, but those calls leak inferred user intent to external services before the agent commits to the branch. Every external observer that received the call retains the disclosure after the agent abandons the branch. Timing is the issue, not authorization: no commit-time cleanup, read-only restriction, or access-control allow-list unsends what an observer already holds. We call these invocations ghost tool calls and propose Speculative Tool Privacy Contracts, a runtime abstraction that treats observation before commitment as a first-class effect, distinct from state mutation. We implement the contracts in a prototype runtime and evaluate twelve policies across three corpora. Speculative dispatch increases what an observer can infer about user intent; post-hoc filters, read-only restrictions, and access-control allow-lists leave that inference intact; only issue-time policies that change or suppress the speculative call's argument or destination projection before dispatch reduce it.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [496] [Leveraging the Learning Curve: Reusing Existing Architectural Patterns to Design and Implement MAS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00287)
*Arthur Casals,Anarosa A. F. Brandão*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出将分布式系统（DS）工程技术与智能体理论相结合，通过引入最小化智能体概念集到DS领域，改进现代多智能体系统（MAS）的工程化方法。通过两项实践研究（DS架构模式设计、研究生课程教学）验证了该方法的有效性，结果表明即使无DS经验的学生也能成功实现MAS，平均成绩超80%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI驱动的多智能体系统往往忽略智能体固有的协作特性，且常被当作其他AI系统的组件使用。从软件工程角度，分布式系统的架构特性与MAS的分布式本质天然契合，但两者在工程实践中存在脱节。本文旨在通过建立DS与MAS的统一工程方法，弥合这一鸿沟。

Method: 1. 回溯MAS和DS的共同起源，建立架构层面的平行对应关系。2. 定义最小化智能体概念集。3. 开展两项实践研究：将概念融入DS架构模式设计分布式MAS；在研究生课程中用于教授无智能体理论背景的学生MAS工程。4. 通过学生成绩评估方法有效性。

Result: 两项实践研究中，学生均成功使用DS工具和技术实现了MAS。超过三分之二的学生无DS实践经验，但两门课程的平均最终成绩均超过80%，验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究支持利用现代AI技术开发先进系统，同时与已有的智能体研究方向保持一致，并充分利用成熟的DS技术与概念。

Abstract: Recent advancements in AI have led to the development of specialized systems related to multi-agent systems (MAS). However, the inherently collaborative nature of agents is often overlooked, and many of these specialized systems are used as components by other AI systems. From a software engineering perspective, this context can benefit from aligning the architectural characteristics of distributed systems with the inherently distributed nature of MAS. We propose that introducing a minimal set of agent-related concepts into the Distributed Systems (DS) domain can improve the engineering of modern MAS by leveraging techniques from DS engineering with established agent theory. In this study, we recapitulated the common origins of MAS and DS by drawing architectural parallels to establish a unified engineering approach. We then defined a minimal set of agent concepts to perform two practical studies on leveraging MAS development. First, we incorporated these concepts into a DS architectural pattern to design a distributed MAS. We then used these concepts in a graduate course to teach MAS engineering to students with no prior knowledge of agent theory. The learning outcomes from both courses included successful MAS implementation using DS tools and techniques. Although more than two-thirds of these students had no practical experience in developing distributed systems, the average final grade in both courses was above 80\%, thus validating our approach. Finally, we discuss how this study supports the development of advanced systems using modern AI techniques consistently with established agent-related research while leveraging established DS techniques and concepts.

</details>


### [497] [State Machine Guided Multi-Relational Synthetic Data from Logs for Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00531)
*Aja Khanal,Apurva Narayan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出从日志中恢复执行状态机并构建多表关系模式，从而生成保留结构、时间和过程约束的合成数据，显著提升异常检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有日志异常检测方法将日志视为模板的扁平序列，忽略了事件共现和演化的关系执行结构。

Method: 通过从日志中恢复执行状态机，诱导出包含跟踪、事件、状态、转换和参数的多表关系模式，以此作为生成先验产生多关系合成数据。

Result: 生成的合成数据通过约束验证、分布相似性和过程级指标验证了保真度，且增强真实日志后显著提升了异常和缺陷检测性能。

Conclusion: 执行日志隐式编码了由潜在状态机控制的关系数据库，恢复该结构可实现原则性的合成数据生成，用于鲁棒且可解释的异常检测。

Abstract: Software systems generate massive unstructured logs that record execution behavior, failures, and interactions across components, yet existing log anomaly detection methods treat these logs primarily as flat sequences of templates, overlooking the relational execution structure that governs how events co-occur and evolve over time. We propose a framework that discovers this hidden structure by recovering an execution state machine directly from logs and inducing a corresponding multi-table relational schema connecting traces, events, states, transitions, and parameters. This discovered state machine serves as a generative prior to produce realistic multi-relational synthetic data that preserves structural, temporal, and process constraints while amplifying rare but valid execution behaviors. We assess the fidelity of the generated data through constraint validation, distributional similarity, and process-level metrics, and demonstrate its usefulness by showing that augmenting real logs with the synthetic relational data significantly improves anomaly and bug detection on held-out real datasets compared to sequence-based baselines and naive oversampling. Our results show that execution logs implicitly encode a relational database governed by a latent state machine, and that recovering this structure enables principled synthetic data generation for robust and interpretable anomaly detection.

</details>


### [498] [Scaling Behavior of Single LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00655)
*Jialing Li,Zhouhong Gu,Yin Cai,Hongwei Feng*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本论文系统研究了基于LLM的多智能体系统（MAS）的扩展行为，发现增加智能体数量并不会单调提升性能，而是遵循收益递减规律，关键因素在于协同增益与协调开销之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM多智能体系统前景广阔，但关于其扩展行为和内在集体动力学的基本问题尚未得到充分探索，特别是增加智能体数量对性能的具体影响机制尚不明确。

Method: 提出顺序迭代多智能体系统（SIMAS）框架，通过最小化架构设计隔离协作变量，在多种任务和模型规模下进行实验，观察性能随智能体数量的变化规律。

Result: MAS性能随智能体数量增加呈现收益递减模式；需要足够强大的基础LLM才能发挥MAS优势；任务类型显著影响最优智能体数量；性能下降源于协调开销而非长上下文失败；该趋势在不同交互架构下具有普适性。

Conclusion: 集体智能是战略交互设计的涌现属性，而非简单增加智能体数量的必然结果；为设计高效协作系统提供了实践指导，挑战了"更多智能体必然带来更好性能"的主流假设。

Abstract: The burgeoning field of LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) promises to tackle complex tasks through collaborative intelligence, yet fundamental questions regarding their scaling behavior and intrinsic collective dynamics remain underexplored. This paper systematically investigates how the performance of a homogeneous MAS evolves as the number of agents increases, isolating the variable of collaboration from model or knowledge heterogeneity. We propose the Sequential Iterative Multi-Agent System (SIMAS) framework, a minimalist architecture centered on sequential inter-agent communication, to clearly observe scaling effects. Through extensive experiments across diverse tasks and model scales, we establish that MAS performance does not scale monotonically with agent count but follows a pattern of diminishing returns, governed by a trade-off between collaborative synergy and coordination overhead. Our findings reveal that effective MAS requires a sufficiently capable base LLM, that task type critically modulates the optimal agent count, and that collective intelligence is an emergent property contingent on strategic interaction design rather than a guaranteed outcome of agent plurality. The performance degradation stems coordination overhead rather than merely long-context failure, and the scaling tendency generalizes across interaction architectures like structured debate topologies. This work provides a foundational understanding of MAS scaling laws, offering practical guidance for designing efficient collaborative systems and challenging the prevailing assumption that more agents invariably lead to better performance.

</details>


### [499] [Dynamic Coordination Strategy Selection for Enterprise Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00804)
*Thanh Luong Tuan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文通过30项企业任务、1440个生成输出的实验，发现应基于问题类别动态选择协调策略（共识、辩论、综合、单智能体），而非固定全局策略。虽然精确最优策略不稳定，但预测策略始终在最佳观测策略0.10质量分以内，支持“近优路由”而非“精确胜出”。结构化合规验证任务例外：所有模型臂都偏向单智能体而非共识。中英文领域任务间无显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业多智能体系统暴露多种协调模式，但缺乏何时使用共识、辩论、综合或单智能体工作流的实证依据。现有部署常采用固定全局策略，而本研究旨在验证是否应根据问题类别动态选择协调策略。

Method: 构建30项企业任务矩阵（跨6个行业、5个问题类别、4种执行条件、每单元格3次重复、4个模型臂），共生成1440个输出，由固定Sonnet评分标准评判。

Result: 精确胜出假设未获支持（胜者身份跨模型臂不稳定）。但近优路由假设获强支持：所有模型臂和问题类别中，预测策略与最佳观测策略质量分差≤0.10。结构化合规验证任务中所有模型臂偏好单智能体而非共识。中英文领域任务间无显著排名差异。

Conclusion: 企业协调策略应采用动态路由作为校准的默认方案，而非确定性胜出规则。结构化合规验证需特殊对待（偏好单智能体），中英文领域差异不显著。

Abstract: Enterprise multi-agent systems increasingly expose multiple coordination patterns, but deployments often lack evidence for when to use consensus, debate, synthesis, or a simpler single-agent workflow. This paper evaluates whether coordination strategy should be selected dynamically by problem class rather than fixed globally. We run a frozen matrix of 30 enterprise tasks spanning six industries, five problem classes, four execution conditions, three replications per cell, and four model arms: qwen_local, sonnet, gemma_openrouter, and an auxiliary openai cloud-validation arm. All 1,440 generated outputs are judged by a fixed Sonnet rubric.
  The main finding is bounded and operationally useful, but it is not the original strict H1. The pre-registered exact-winner/CI criterion is not supported: exact winner identity is unstable across model arms, and several predicted strategies are close to, but not above, the best observed alternative. A weaker near-best routing claim is strongly supported. In every pre-registered model arm and problem class, and again in the auxiliary OpenAI validation arm, the predicted strategy is within 0.10 quality-score points of the best observed condition. Structured compliance verification is the clearest exception to the original mapping: all arms favor single_agent rather than consensus. A pre-registered Kendall's W test finds no reliable difference between Vietnamese-domain and English-domain tasks in how consistently the four coordination conditions are ranked (mean W of 0.20 in both strata; signed-rank p = .85), so H2 is not supported. We conclude that enterprise coordination policy should use dynamic routing as a calibrated default, not as a deterministic winner-selection law.

</details>


### [500] [FinCom: A Financial Multi-Agent Demo with Disagree-or-Commit Deliberation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00939)
*Chao Peter Yang,Zixiao Tan,Kaisen Yao,Ziyu Zhou,Eleanor Jiang,Michael Wu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出FinCom框架，通过"异议或承诺"协议在金融AI委员会中嵌入结构化异议，由监督者协调三个专家代理（研究、量化、风险），强制代理在达成共识前必须批判或接受同伴推理，显著提升推理准确性和风险意识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体金融系统采用的共识或辩论协调机制存在谄媚现象（智能体趋同于同伴推理而非证据），导致过早达成一致和性能下降。

Method: 提出FinCom框架，实施Disagree-or-Commit (DoC)协议：一个中央监督者协调三个ReAct驱动的专家代理（研究、量化、风险），每个代理配备专用工具，在审议过程中必须明确批评或接受同伴推理，最终收敛为统一建议。

Result: 在最新金融智能体基准测试及90个内部手工构建金融任务上，使用LLM-as-a-Judge评估，DoC相比追求共识的基线显著提升了推理准确性和风险意识。

Conclusion: 将异议重新定义为治理原语而非噪声，FinCom提供了一种轻量级、仅基于提示的方法，提高了智能体金融系统的问责性、透明度和认知鲁棒性。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for financial analysis and decision support. However, existing coordination schemes, especially those emphasizing consensus or debate, are vulnerable to sycophancy: agents conform to peer reasoning instead of evidence, leading to premature agreement and degraded outcomes. We introduce FinCom (Financial Committee), a governed multi-agent framework and interactive system that operationalizes the Disagree-or-Commit (DoC) protocol to embed structured dissent into financial AI committees. A central Supervisor orchestrates three ReAct-enabled specialist agents: Research, Quantitative, and Risk. Each agent is equipped with role-specific tools for retrieval, computation, and stress testing. During deliberation, agents must either explicitly critique or commit to their peers' reasoning before converging on a unified recommendation.
  This demonstration showcases how FinCom supports committee-style financial analysis through coordinated multi-agent interaction, including structured report generation and interactive decision support. Evaluated across the most recent financial agent benchmark, in addition to 90 internal handcrafted financial tasks using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, DoC improves reasoning accuracy and risk awareness significantly over a consensus-seeking baseline on both an in-house and external evaluation set. By reframing disagreement as a governance primitive rather than noise, FinCom offers a lightweight, prompt-only recipe for improving accountability, transparency, and epistemic robustness in agentic financial systems.

</details>


### [501] [Coordinating Task Switching in a Robotics Multi-Agent System Using Behavior Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01170)
*Lucas Haug,Anarosa Alves Franco Brandão,Arthur Casals*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出基于行为树（Behavior Tree）的多机器人协调方法，应用于IEEE VSSS（微型足球机器人）比赛，并与之前基于有限状态机（FSM）的方法在FIRASim模拟器及学术竞赛中进行了对比评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在机器人领域极具挑战性，VSSS足球比赛环境动态性强，机器人间的协调行为对获胜至关重要，现有基于FSM的方法存在局限性，需要更灵活、模块化的协调机制。

Method: 采用行为树（Behavior Tree）方法替代传统的有限状态机（FSM），为ThundeRatz机器人队的VSSS多机器人系统设计协调策略，并在FIRASim模拟器中进行对比实验。

Result: 在FIRASim模拟器中将行为树方法与之前的FSM方法进行了比较，并在学术机器人竞赛中进一步评估了新策略的性能。

Conclusion: 行为树方法相比FSM在VSSS多机器人协调中表现更优，并在实际竞赛中验证了其有效性。

Abstract: The application of multi-agent systems in robotics is a very challenging field. Several competitions involving such systems are proposed to foster research and development of strategies and mechanisms using games as the underlying domain. Among them are the ones from the \textit{IEEE Very Small Soccer (VSSS)} category, which is the case study described in this paper. In VSSS, two teams of three robots each compete in a very dynamic environment of a soccer game. Thus, coordination of robots' behavior during the game is crucial to win it. In this paper, we present a Behavior-Tree-based approach to support multi-robot coordination within the VSSS team of the ThundeRatz robotics team from the Universidade de S$\tilde{a}$o Paulo. Moreover, a comparison between the proposed approach and the previous one, which was based on a Finite State Machine (FSM), was conducted using the FIRASim simulator. Besides that, the performance of this new strategy was further evaluated in an academic robotics competition.

</details>


### [502] [Multi-Agent Computer Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01533)
*Jing Yu Koh,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Daniel Fried*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出多智能体计算机使用系统（MACU），通过管理者模型将任务分解为有向无环图（DAG），并行调度子智能体执行，相比单智能体CUAs在桌面和网页导航基准上提升3.4-25.5%，并加速长时任务完成约1.5倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前单智能体CUA在处理复杂长时任务时表现不佳，缺乏任务分解、并行执行和基于新信息持续重规划的能力，因此需要向多智能体协作的MACU系统转变。

Method: 提出通用多智能体架构：管理者模型将计算机使用任务分解为DAG，编码子任务间的依赖关系与目标；每轮迭代中，管理者调度就绪节点上的并行CUA子智能体执行，并根据子智能体反馈动态增删改DAG节点，处理部分可观测环境的信息传递问题。

Result: 在OSWorld、Online-Mind2Web、WebTailBench、Odysseys四个基准上，MACU一致优于单智能体基线3.4%-25.5%；在Odysseys长时导航任务中，平均任务完成时间缩短约1.5倍，且展现出更优的测试时扩展性。

Conclusion: 多智能体协调是扩展计算机使用代理以更长时间、更高效工作的有希望的方向。

Abstract: Computer use agents (CUAs) today are primarily deployed as single serial agents. This setup is suboptimal for complex long-horizon tasks that benefit from task decomposition, parallel execution, and consistent re-planning based on new information. In this paper, we argue that we should instead move towards evaluating and building multi-agent computer use (MACU) systems. These systems, which emphasize planning and parallel execution, alleviate many of the shortcomings of single-agent CUAs. We propose a general multi-agent setup in which a manager model decomposes computer use tasks as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), encoding relevant dependencies and goals for subagents. At each iteration, the manager dispatches parallel CUA subagents to carry out nodes on the ready frontier of the DAG, and continuously revises the DAG (adding, canceling, or rewriting nodes) as new findings arrive from subagents. This design treats the partially observable environment of computer use as a first class challenge: information that downstream agents may not be able to re-observe are retained and passed forward through the manager and DAG structure. We demonstrate that MACU consistently improves over strong single-agent baselines by $3.4-25.5\%$ on desktop (OSWorld) and web navigation (Online-Mind2Web, WebTailBench, Odysseys) benchmarks, exhibits more favorable test-time scaling, and solves complex long-horizon tasks where single-agent CUAs get stuck. On Odysseys, a long-horizon web navigation benchmark, MACU improves average task completion wall-clock time by ${\sim} 1.5 \times$, demonstrating its efficacy in speeding up traditionally slow CUA pipelines. Our findings highlight that multi-agent coordination is a promising axis for scaling computer use agents to work productively for longer and more effectively. We release all code and interactive visualizations at https://jykoh.com/multi-agent-computer-use.

</details>


### [503] [Agent System Operations: Categorization, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01581)
*Zexin Wang,Changhua Pei,Yuanhao Liu,Jingjing Li,Yintong Huo,Quan Zhou,Haotian Si,Hang Cui,Zihan Liu,Gaogang Xie,Fei Sun,Dan Pei,David Lo*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文对基于大语言模型的智能体系统运维（AgentOps）进行了系统性综述，定义了系统内外的异常类型，并提出了包含监控、异常检测、根因定位与修复四阶段的运维框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体系统虽广泛应用，但常出现异常导致不稳定和不安全，而关于智能体系统运维的系统性研究非常匮乏，亟需建立清晰的框架和定义挑战。

Method: 通过系统性综述的方式，对智能体系统中的异常进行分类（智能体内部异常与智能体间异常），并提出名为AgentOps的智能体系统运维框架，详细阐述了监控、异常检测、根因定位、修复四个关键阶段。

Result: 建立了AgentOps框架，系统定义了智能体系统中的异常类型及运维流程，填补了该领域的研究空白。

Conclusion: AgentOps为智能体系统的运维提供了清晰的理论框架和操作路径，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展。

Abstract: As the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, LLM-based agent systems offer advantages in flexibility and interpretability over traditional systems, garnering increasing attention. However, despite the widespread research interest and industrial application of agent systems, these systems, like their traditional counterparts, frequently encounter anomalies. These anomalies lead to instability and insecurity, hindering their further development. Therefore, a comprehensive and systematic approach to the operation and maintenance of agent systems is urgently needed. Unfortunately, current research on the operations of agent systems is sparse. To address this gap, we have undertaken a survey on agent system operations with the aim of establishing a clear framework for the field, defining the challenges, and facilitating further development. Specifically, this paper begins by systematically defining anomalies within agent systems, categorizing them into intra-agent anomalies and inter-agent anomalies. Next, we introduce a novel and comprehensive operational framework for agent systems, dubbed Agent System Operations (AgentOps). We provide detailed definitions and explanations of its four key stages: monitoring, anomaly detection, root cause localization, and resolution.

</details>


### [504] [MetaForge: A Self-Evolving Multimodal Agent that Retrieves, Adapts, and Forges Tools On Demand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01801)
*Shouang Wei,Houcheng Min,Xinpeng Dong,Xin Lin,Sen Cui,Bo Jiang,Zhongxiang Dai,Kun Kuang,Guandong Xu,Fei Wu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: MetaForge是一个多模态智能体框架，通过四阶段闭环（判断-检索-适应-锻造-回收）实现按需工具调用和自我进化，在12个基准测试中超越16个基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法受限于静态预定义工具库无法泛化到未见场景，且不加区分的工具调用带来冗余成本和噪声错误。

Method: 提出MetaForge框架，包含Decide（判断是否需要工具）、Retrieve（选择合适工具）、Adapt（将工具参数适配到任务上下文）、Forge（在线合成新技能并回收进工具库）四个阶段，形成闭环。通过强化学习联合优化调用必要性、检索准确性、执行效果和技能可复用性，并引入调用成本惩罚。

Result: 在12个基准测试中，MetaForge在准确率、效率和泛化能力上一致超越16个基线方法。

Conclusion: 验证了从静态工具库向按需自我演化的范式转变的有效性。

Abstract: Multimodal agents have achieved notable progress on complex reasoning tasks through tool use, yet remain limited by two issues: statically predefined tool inventories fail to generalize to unseen scenarios, and indiscriminate tool invocation incurs redundant cost and noise-induced errors. We propose MetaForge, a multimodal agent framework that learns when to invoke tools and how to evolve its toolset on demand. MetaForge factorizes agentic behavior into four coupled stages: Decide (judging whether tool use is warranted), Retrieve (selecting suitable tools), Adapt (grounding tool parameters in task context), and Forge (synthesizing new skills online and recycling them into the tool library for reuse), forming a closed judge-retrieve-adapt-forge-recycle loop. A unified orchestration policy enables the agent to choose among answering directly, reusing existing tools, or forging new ones. We jointly optimize invocation necessity, retrieval accuracy, execution effectiveness, and forged-skill reusability via reinforcement learning, with an explicit invocation-cost penalty discouraging redundant calls. Across 12 benchmarks, MetaForge consistently surpasses 16 baselines in accuracy, efficiency, and generalization, validating a paradigm shift from static tool inventories to on-demand self-evolution.

</details>


### [505] [Dynamic Trust-Aware Sparse Communication Topology for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Consensus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01828)
*Wanshuang Gou,Zihan Liu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出DySCo（动态稀疏共识机制），通过动态评估通信边的价值并选择高价值边进行消息交换，取代全连接通信，在降低通信开销的同时保留关键交叉验证信息，提升了多智能体系统的效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全连接多智能体通信框架中，消息数量、token成本和延迟随智能体数量呈二次增长；而固定的稀疏拓扑无法自适应调整通信关系，容易保留低价值交互或丢失关键纠错信息。

Method: DySCo基于智能体可靠性、答案分歧度和任务相关性，在每轮推理中动态估计通信边的价值，在预算约束下选择少量高价值边进行消息交换；通过动态信任权重聚合答案，并在共识稳定后提前终止讨论。

Result: 在数学推理、逻辑推理和事实问答任务上进行了性能评估，结果表明DySCo在降低通信开销的同时保留了关键的交叉验证信息。

Conclusion: DySCo通过按需通信替代通用广播，有效降低了通信复杂度并保持了共识稳定性，为大规模多智能体系统的高效协作提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large language model-driven multi-agent systems enhance the reliability of complex reasoning tasks through multi-round deliberation, role specialization, and cross-validation. However, existing multi-agent debate and collaboration frameworks typically adopt fully connected communication, causing the number of messages, token costs, and end-to-end latency to grow approximately quadratically with the number of agents; although fixed sparse topologies reduce overhead, they cannot adapt communication relationships to different task instances or intermediate reasoning states, making them prone either to preserving low-value interactions or to losing critical error-correction information. To address this problem, this paper proposes DySCo (Dynamic Sparse Consensus), a dynamic trust-aware sparse consensus mechanism. In each round of reasoning, DySCo estimates the value of communication edges based on agent reliability, answer divergence, and task relevance, and selects a small number of high-value edges for message exchange under budget constraints; it then aggregates the answers of different agents through dynamic trust weights and terminates the discussion early once consensus stabilizes. This mechanism replaces universal broadcasting with on-demand communication, thereby reducing communication overhead while preserving essential cross-validation information. We further present analyses of communication complexity and consensus stability, and evaluate the performance of DySCo on mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, and factual question-answering tasks.

</details>


### [506] [From Global Policies to Local Strategies: Multi-Objective Optimization of Resource-Specific Handover Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01857)
*Lukas Kirchdorfer,Artemis Doumeni,Han van der Aa,Hugo A. López*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文首次提出了多目标资源级决策优化方法，通过结合多智能体系统模拟器与进化算法，生成帕累托最优的资源特定交接策略，在合成和真实数据集上实现了成本降低37%、等待时间减少58%的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习资源分配方法忽略了实际任务交接中重要的资源间协作模式，导致效率受限。

Method: 将多智能体系统流程模拟器与多目标进化算法相结合，生成帕累托最优的资源特定交接策略。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，成本平均降低37%，等待时间减少58%，优于启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: 协作感知的优化方法能够显著提升业务流程性能，具有实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Efficient resource allocation is a key challenge in business process management, with direct implications for cost, throughput time, and utilization. While recent Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have shown promise in deriving adaptive allocation policies, they typically neglect inter-resource collaboration patterns that can strongly influence real-world task handovers. Recognizing this, this paper introduces the first approach for multi-objective optimization of resource-level decision-making, enabling the recommendation of person-specific handover policies. To achieve this, our work combines an existing Multi-Agent System-based process simulator with a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm. The resulting approach produces Pareto-optimal, resource-specific policies that optimize the process across multiple objectives. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets show that our approach reduces costs by an average of 37% and waiting time by 58%, consistently outperforming heuristic baselines and demonstrating the potential of leveraging collaboration-aware optimization to improve process performance.

</details>


### [507] [RadioMaster: Multi-Agent System for Autonomous Radio Signal Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01862)
*Jiazhen Lei,Tianze Cao,Yuxin Sha,Sihan Wang,Bingbing Wang,Fengyuan Zhu,Zeming Yang,Xiaohua Tian*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出RadioMaster，一种全自动多智能体框架，用于将用户意图转化为真实无线信号，解决了现有大语言模型在无线电信号生成领域的领域无知和硬件不敏感问题。RadioMaster通过RadioWiki知识检索、RadioAgent协作生成和RadioEmulator闭环验证三大支柱实现，并构建了RadioBench基准。实验表明其在配置可行性和信号保真度上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线原型开发中，将用户意图转化为物理无线电信号是一个繁琐且困难的过程，需要深厚的物理层知识。现有大语言模型和多智能体系统在软件工程中取得了突破，但在无线电信号生成任务上表现不佳，主要原因是严重的领域无知和对物理硬件约束的不敏感。因此，亟需一个能够弥合这一差距的自动化框架。

Method: 提出RadioMaster多智能体框架，包含三个协同模块：1) RadioWiki——领域知识检索模块；2) RadioAgent——多智能体协作生成I/Q采样及硬件配置；3) RadioEmulator——闭环物理层验证模块。同时构建了RadioBench基准数据集用于评估。

Result: 在真实世界评估中，RadioMaster在配置可行性和信号保真度方面显著优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: RadioMaster有效解决了LLM在无线信号生成任务中的不足，通过多智能体协同和闭环验证机制，实现了从用户意图到真实无线发射的全自动转化，为无线原型开发提供了可行的自动化解决方案。

Abstract: Translating user intents into physical radio signals represents the critical yet notoriously tedious final step in wireless prototyping, as it requires intricate knowledge of physical layer details and presents immense implementation challenges. Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent systems have revolutionized conventional software engineering, raising the compelling question of whether they can resolve these formidable difficulties. However, our investigations reveal that current models experience significant limitations and fail to accomplish this task when applied to radio signal generation. This performance degradation primarily stems from severe domain ignorance and a fundamental insensitivity to physical hardware constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce RadioMaster, a fully autonomous multi-agent framework designed to seamlessly translate user input into real-world wireless emissions. RadioMaster operates on three synergistic pillars: RadioWiki for domain-specific knowledge retrieval, RadioAgent for collaborative I/Q sample generation alongside hardware configuration, and RadioEmulator for closed-loop physical layer verification. Furthermore, we construct RadioBench, the first comprehensive benchmark tailored specifically for the radio signal generation domain. Extensive real-world evaluations demonstrate that RadioMaster significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines regarding configuration viability and signal fidelity.

</details>


### [508] [QoEReasoner: An Agentic Reasoning Framework for Automated and Explainable QoE Diagnosis in RANs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01925)
*Qizhe Li,Haolong Chen,Shan Dai,Zhuo Li,Zhiwei Hu,Xuan Li,Guangxu Zhu,Qingjiang Shi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: QoEReasoner是一个基于LLM的自动化QoE诊断系统，通过将大模型推理与确定性工具、领域知识库和历史案例库相结合，在真实RAN网络中实现18%-40%的诊断准确率提升，并将诊断时间从30分钟缩短至3分钟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAN网络中QoE退化诊断依赖专家手工分析高维跨层遥测数据，耗时且复杂；而直接使用LLM处理原始网络数据存在数值时序分析失败、协议违规因果推理和多步故障定位缺乏状态严谨性等根本性缺陷。

Method: 提出QoEReasoner端到端智能体系统，包含确定性工具（将原始KPI转为结构化证据）、领域知识库（强制执行协议一致故障传播）、历史案例库（专家验证案例指导假设生成）和有状态中央规划器（编排异常检测、因果追踪、根因定位的闭环流程）。

Result: 在真实RAN网络数据上，QoEReasoner在多项诊断任务中准确率超越强基线18%-40%；诊断时间从专家人工约30分钟降至每会话3分钟，生成可解释的专家级报告，且对不同LLM骨干网络保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: QoEReasoner通过将LLM的推理能力与网络物理现实的确定性知识相结合，有效解决了LLM在RAN故障诊断中的固有限制，实现了高效、准确且可解释的自动化QoE诊断。

Abstract: Diagnosing Quality-of-Experience (QoE) degradations in operational Radio Access Networks (RANs) is a critical but notoriously complex task, traditionally requiring labor-intensive expert analysis over high-dimensional, cross-layer telemetry. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unprecedented reasoning capabilities, they are fundamentally unsuited for raw RANs troubleshooting: they fail at numeric time-series analysis, hallucinate protocol-violating causal links, and lack the stateful rigor required for multi-step fault localization. To bridge this gap, we present QoEReasoner, an end-to-end, LLM-driven agentic system designed for automated and explainable QoE diagnosis. QoEReasoner tames the inherent unpredictability of LLMs by grounding their reasoning in the physical realities of the network. It employs deterministic tools to reliably translate raw numeric KPIs into structured evidence, enforces protocol-consistent fault propagation through a domain-specific Knowledge Base, and leverages a Historical Bank of expert-validated cases to guide hypothesis generation. A stateful central planner orchestrates this closed-loop process across anomaly detection, causal tracing, and root-cause localization. Evaluations on real-world operational RANs datasets demonstrate that QoEReasoner outperforms strong baselines by 18\%-40\% in accuracy across multiple diagnostic tasks. Furthermore, it reduces diagnostic time from approximately 30 minutes of manual expert analysis to just 3 minutes per session, delivering highly interpretable, expert-grade reports while remaining robust across diverse LLM backbones.

</details>


### [509] [A Simple Hierarchical Causality Primer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01979)
*Tim Gebbie*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个在复杂系统中形式化层次因果关系的简化框架，区分了“行动者”（实例化因果类）和“智能体”（实现局部动力学），并引入了因果类、聚合算子和离散事件-时间映射三个必要结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有复杂系统理论中缺乏对层次因果关系的清晰形式化描述，需要区分不同层级的角色与行为以理解跨层级的约束、选择和组织机制。

Method: 通过定义行动者（Actor）与智能体（Agent）的区分，引入因果类（Causation Classes）、聚合算子（Aggregation Operators）和离散事件-时间映射（Discrete Event-Time Maps）三个核心结构，构建简洁离散的层次因果框架。

Result: 给出了层次因果关系的初步形式化表述，明确了行动者层级角色如何约束和选择智能体层级行为，以及系统跨层级运作所需的三个必备结构。

Conclusion: 该离散简化框架为复杂系统中层次因果关系的进一步形式化研究提供了基础，未来可在此方向上深入拓展。

Abstract: We provide a brief primer for the idea behind formalising hierarchical causality in the context of complex systems. Here actors are not simply agents. Actors instantiate causation classes. Agents implement local dynamics in given levels or organisation in a given system. Hierarchical causality then describes how actor-level roles constrain, select, and organise agent-level behaviour across levels. The system then necessarily requires three additional structures. First, causation classes to abstract a given form of causal influence that an actor instantiates. Second, aggregation operators to move across the levels. Third, discrete event-time maps are required because the system comprises events, and the relation between local event counts and any global clock must be specified. Our formulation here is purposefully simple and discrete.

</details>


### [510] [Agentic-J: An AI Agent for Biological Microscopy Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02080)
*Lukas Johanns,Marilin Moor,Davide Panzeri,Yu Zhou,Xinyi Chen,Nora F. K. Pauly,Zixuan Pan,Matthias Gunzer,Andreas Müller,Yiyu Shi,Hedi Peterson,Jianxu Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Agentic-J 是一个基于容器的多智能体AI助手，专为ImageJ/Fiji设计，能通过自然语言描述自动生成可执行脚本，实现从细胞分割到多条件量化的完整生物图像分析工作流，并确保过程可追溯、可复现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物图像分析需要整合多种工具、编程环境和领域知识，但很少有研究人员能同时掌握所有这些技能，因此亟需一个能降低技术门槛的智能辅助系统。

Method: 采用容器化的多智能体架构，包含插件管理、代码生成、调试、质量保证和统计报告等专门子智能体，通过自然语言交互自动生成结构化的可执行脚本项目。

Result: 在真实的生物显微镜图像分析工作流中验证了系统能力，展示了从细胞核分割、细胞追踪到多条件量化分析的完整流程。

Conclusion: Agentic-J 使得每次分析决策都可追溯，工作流可复现、可共享，显著降低了生物图像分析的技术门槛。

Abstract: Biological image analysis increasingly demands integration across heterogeneous tools, programming environments, and domain knowledge that few researchers can command simultaneously. We present Agentic-J, a containerised, multi-agent AI assistant, primarily for ImageJ/Fiji that enables biologists to specify analysis tasks in natural language, from nuclei segmentation and cell tracking to multi-condition quantification. The agent generates executable scripts organised into a documented project structure, so every analysis decision is traceable and the workflow can be reproduced or shared. The specialised sub-agents handle plugin management, code generation, debugging, quality assurance, and statistical reporting. In this paper we introduce the system's design, demonstrate real biological microscopy image analysis workflows, and detailed the technical implementation.

</details>


### [511] [A Game-Theoretic Decision Framework for Optimal Selection of Coordination Detection Methods in Multi-UAV Fleet Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02383)
*Christian Manasseh*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出一个博弈论决策框架，用于在无人机编队监测中解决计算方法的“速度-精度”权衡问题，通过混合策略保证最坏情况下的检测性能，并在200种随机配置下验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机编队协调检测与领航飞机识别面临速度与精度的根本性权衡：快速方法牺牲检测保真度，精确方法可能超出空域冲突化解的时间预算。现有方法无法自适应地平衡这一矛盾。

Method: 构建了一个端到端流水线，包括轨迹监视数据处理、8种候选检测算法、蒙特卡洛敏感性分析（刻画随机性能），以及多目标优化层（识别Pareto最优方法组合）。核心是将方法选择建模为Monitor与Nature之间的二人零和博弈，通过minimax解得到鲁棒的混合策略。

Result: 在5-50架无人机的200种随机配置中：平衡型（70.6%）和速度优先型（79.7%）偏好Koopman Phase方法，路线领航识别优先型（47.4%）偏好CRQA方法。框架在所有偏好配置下达到0.29-0.53的归一化效用的保证博弈值。

Conclusion: 该框架是首个在UTM编队监测中实现原则性、场景自适应计算方法选择的方法，有效解决了速度-精度权衡问题。

Abstract: Detecting coordination among unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) fleets operating in shared airspace and identifying the route-lead aircraft whose navigation decisions govern fleet behavior presents a fundamental speed--accuracy trade-off: fast methods enable real-time traffic management but sacrifice detection fidelity, while accurate methods may exceed the time budget for actionable airspace deconfliction. This paper presents a game-theoretic decision framework that resolves this trade-off by formulating method selection as a two-player zero-sum game between a Monitor (selecting computational methods and parameters) and Nature (selecting the unknown traffic scenario). We construct an end-to-end pipeline from trajectory surveillance data through eight candidate detection algorithms, a Monte Carlo sensitivity analysis characterizing their stochastic performance, and finally a multi-objective optimization layer that identifies Pareto-optimal method portfolios. The minimax solution provides a robust mixed strategy with a probability distribution over methods that guarantees worst-case performance regardless of scenario uncertainty. Experimental evaluation across 200 randomized configurations spanning 5--50 aircraft demonstrates that the framework recommends distinct method portfolios depending on operational priority: Koopman Phase dominates balanced (70.6%) and speed-priority (79.7%) profiles, while CRQA emerges as primary (47.4%) when route-lead identification is prioritized. The framework achieves a guaranteed game value of 0.29--0.53 (normalized utility) across all tested preference profiles, providing the first principled, scenario-adaptive methodology for computational method selection in UTM fleet monitoring operations.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [512] [An Empirical Study on Logging Evolution On Stack Overflow: Trends, Topics, and Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00118)
*Patrick Loic Foalem,Andre Nguimbous,Foutse Khomh,Heng Li,Ettore Merlo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文基于Stack Overflow上的216,094篇日志相关帖子，分析了日志实践的11个主要话题及其流行度和难度，发现容器化环境中的日志记录是最具挑战性的话题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多从学术角度（文献综述、源码分析）探讨日志挑战，缺乏从开发者实践视角出发的全面研究。

Method: 分析216,094篇Stack Overflow帖子；使用LLM分类方法识别话题；通过评分、浏览量和三个社区驱动指标评估流行度和难度。

Result: 识别出11个话题，前三位（通用日志实践、错误处理与调试、日志级别与输出）占70%以上；容器化环境日志是最难话题（64.9%无被接受答案）。

Conclusion: 揭示了日志实践中的实际挑战，为开发者、框架供应商、研究人员和教育者提供了可操作见解。

Abstract: Context: Logging is a crucial practice in software engineering, aiding developers in debugging applications when errors occur. While existing research has explored logging challenges from an academic perspective through literature reviews and source code analysis, a comprehensive study from the practitioners' perspective remains lacking. 
  Objective: This paper aims to bridge this knowledge gap by presenting an in-depth analysis of trends, topics, and challenges in logging based on a dataset of 216,094 posts from Stack Overflow (SO), a popular Q\&A platform for developers. 
Method: We analyzed longitudinal trends by examining metadata related to users, questions, and tags associated with logging discussions. To identify prevalent discussion topics, we employed a Large Language Model (LLM)--based classification approach, based on a manually validated ground-truth sample. Topic popularity was assessed through average scores and views, while difficulty was measured using three community-driven metrics: the proportion of questions without accepted answers, the proportion of unanswered questions, and the median time to receive an accepted answer.
  Results: Our analysis identifies 11 distinct topics, with the top three (General Logging Practices, Error Handling and Debugging, and Logging Levels and Output) accounting for over 70\% of all logging-related discussions. Notably, Logging in Containerized Environments emerged as the most difficult topic: 64.9\% of its questions lack an accepted answer, and its median resolution time is among the highest. These findings highlight enduring practitioner struggles with logging in Docker or other containerized environments  and the integration of logging pipelines into orchestrators such as Kubernetes and cloud environments.
  Conclusion: This study sheds light on the practical challenges of logging and provides actionable insights for developers, framework vendors, researchers, and educators.

</details>


### [513] [AI-PROPELLER: Warehouse-Scale Interprocedural Code Layout Optimization with AlphaEvolve](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00131)
*Chaitanya Mamatha Ananda,Rajiv Gupta,Mircea Trofin,Aiden Grossman,Sriraman Tallam,Xinliang David Li,Amir Yazdanbakhsh*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI-PROPELLER 使用 Magellan 智能体工作流将 Propeller 编译器启发式方法演变为细粒度过程间优化器，通过真实硬件性能反馈实现代码布局优化，首次在工业级大规模应用上获得0.23%-1.6%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后链接优化器（如Propeller、BOLT）仅限于过程内优化技术，未能充分利用过程间代码布局的全局潜力。过程间布局因搜索空间组合爆炸和调用-返回语义建模困难而在实践中未得到验证。

Method: 提出Magellan智能体工作流，将Propeller的编译器启发式方法演变为细粒度过程间优化器，并通过进化循环微调策略超参数。在真实硬件上执行多种布局变体，测量实际性能计数器作为精确奖励信号。

Result: 在多个基准测试（包括大型仓库规模应用）上，相比最先进的FDO和PLO优化，实现了0.23%至1.6%的性能提升，对真实世界二进制而言意义重大。

Conclusion: 首次在工业环境下对大型仓库规模应用实现细粒度过程间代码布局优化，证明了该方法的有效性和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Post-link optimizers (PLOs) such as Propeller and BOLT have demonstrated that precise, profile-guided code layout can extract significant performance gains from heavily optimized binaries. However, these systems are currently restricted to intraprocedural techniques, leaving the global potential of interprocedural layout largely untapped. Interprocedural code layout is historically difficult due to a combinatorially intractable search space and complex call-return semantics that are challenging to model. Consequently, the performance potential of fine-grained interprocedural layout remains unproven in practice. AI-PROPELLER uses Magellan, an agentic workflow that evolves the compiler heuristic in Propeller into a fine-grained interprocedural optimizer and fine-tunes the resulting policy hyperparameters. To ensure high-fidelity, we move away from approximate static cost models and the agentic workflow generates multiple layout variants that are executed on actual hardware to measure real performance counters, providing a precise reward signal for the evolutionary loop. AI-PROPELLER has been evaluated on several benchmarks including large warehouse-scale applications and experiments show performance improvements of 0.23% to 1.6% optimized with state-of-the-art FDO and PLO which is significant for real-world binaries. This is the first time ever that large warehouse-scale applications in industrial settings have been optimized with fine-grained interprocedural code layout.

</details>


### [514] [Benchmarking Multimodal LLMs on Code Generation for Complex Interactive Webpages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00154)
*Fan Wu,Lishuai Dong,Cuiyun Gao,Yujia Chen,Yiming Huang,Yang Xiao,Qing Liao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: WebIGBench是首个评估多模态大模型生成交互式网页代码的基准，包含103个复杂网页和871个交互动作，并提出了新的自动化评估流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准仅评估静态网页代码生成的视觉保真度和代码结构，忽略了真实网页中的复杂交互行为（如点击、输入等）的一致性评估。

Method: 结合人工设计的交互路径与UI自动化，从真实网站收集103个复杂网页，覆盖5种交互动作类型（共871个动作），并设计新的自动化评估管线。

Result: 在多个代表性MLLM上的实验揭示了当前模型在交互式网页代码生成方面的性能边界。

Conclusion: WebIGBench填补了交互式网页代码生成评估的空白，为未来多模态大模型在动态网页开发中的应用提供了标准化测试平台。

Abstract: Recent advancements in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal reasoning and code generation, catalyzing a new paradigm for front-end development. In particular, these models can directly transform visual designs into executable code, significantly improving the efficiency and adaptability of web development. Modern web applications are dynamic and interactive, featuring frequent user-page interactions. However, existing benchmarks largely evaluate the code generation of static webpages, ignoring the complex interactive behaviors in real-world applications. Besides, their evaluation criteria remain confined to visual fidelity and code structure, overlooking the interaction consistency between the generated and the reference webpages. To address these limitations, we introduce WebIGBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate code generation for interactive webpages with complex interactions. By combining manually designed interaction paths with UI automation, we collected 103 complex webpages from real-world websites. This benchmark covers 5 popular interactive action types (e.g., click, input) involving 871 distinct interactive actions. Moreover, we propose a novel evaluation pipeline to address the gap in automated assessment of interactive actions. Extensive experiments on several representative MLLMs reveal the performance boundaries of current models in interactive webpage code generation using WebIGBench. The proposed benchmark is available at https://github.com/anoa12159-hue/WebIGBench_eval.

</details>


### [515] [Specification-Driven Development Benchmark: Security Knowledge Transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00167)
*Oleg Grynets,Andrii Salyk,Vasyl Lyashkevych,Oleh Kaskun,Danyil Zhuravchak*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向AI辅助的规格驱动开发的安全知识可操作化方法，通过多层规格安全模型和安全知识转换方法，将安全知识融入生成合约，实验表明该方法相比基线减少了28%的模态失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在AI辅助的规格驱动开发中，功能行为被明确描述，而安全行为仍然隐式或延后处理，导致生成系统满足可见功能需求但无法保证授权、输入验证、敏感数据处理等安全属性。

Method: 提出多层规格安全模型（Multilayer Specification Security Model）和安全知识转换方法（Security Knowledge Transition Method），通过可追踪的关系将系统实体、威胁、风险、需求、实施规则、控制、验证场景和证据整合，将业务和技术规格转化为经过验证的安全增强生成合约。

Result: 在隐藏Oracle研究和后端生成研究中，模态失败从基线的50次降至ASVS条件的42次，多层安全模型条件进一步降至36次；在业务逻辑和管理安全等应用特定类别中改进最为显著。

Conclusion: 将安全知识显式融入规格驱动开发流程能有效降低AI生成代码中的安全缺陷，多层安全模型比通用安全标准ASVS更能针对应用特定安全场景提供保护。

Abstract: AI-assisted software development is shifting from isolated code completion toward specification-driven generation, where business requirements, technical specifications, and acceptance criteria become operational input for LLM-based development agents. This shift creates a security problem: functional behavior is described explicitly, while security behavior remains implicit, generic, or postponed to post-generation review, causing generated systems to satisfy visible functional requirements while failing to preserve authorization rules, ownership boundaries, input validation, token rejection, sensitive data handling, and abuse-case semantics. This paper proposes a security knowledge operationalization approach for AI-assisted specification-driven development, combining two contributions: a Multilayer Specification Security Model that represents security knowledge through traceable relations between system entities, threats, risks, requirements, implementation rules, controls, verification scenarios, and evidence; and a Security Knowledge Transition Method that transforms business and technical specifications into a validated security-enriched generation contract. We evaluate the approach through two empirical studies: a hidden-oracle study assessing whether an LLM-based pipeline can derive a structured security model from system context, and a backend generation study under three conditions: no explicit security requirements, ASVS-conditioned generation, and Multilayer Security Model conditioning. Evaluated against a hidden 221-test black-box API suite, modal failures decreased from 50 in the baseline to 42 with ASVS and 36 with the Multilayer Security Model, with the strongest improvements in application-specific categories such as business logic and admin safety.

</details>


### [516] [How Generation Architecture Shapes Code Complexity in Multi-Agent LLM Systems: A Paired Study on HumanEval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00308)
*Nazmus Ashrafi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 多智能体LLM代码生成架构在功能正确性之外，还会显著影响代码的结构复杂度。六种架构可归为两个复杂度集群，差距达50-130%。分析师-编码器拆分增加复杂度，运行时调试器反而降低复杂度（在有分析师-编码器背景下），测试器则重新提升复杂度。更复杂的架构并未带来pass@1优势，精简架构在准确率上与之持平甚至更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究关注提示层级对代码复杂度的影响，但架构层级（多智能体编排）对代码结构复杂度的影响尚属空白。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统考察不同多智能体配置如何影响生成代码的结构复杂度。

Method: 对比六种多智能体配置（Basic、AC、ACT、Debugger、AC+Debugger、ACT+Debugger），使用GPT-4o系列两个模型，在164个HumanEval任务上进行1968次成对观测，采用五项RADON复杂度指标（SLOC、圈复杂度、Halstead Volume/Difficulty/Effort），并应用配对非参数统计流程（Friedman检验、Wilcoxon符号秩事后检验、Holm校正、Kendall's W和匹配对秩双列效应量）。

Result: 六种架构可归为两个不可区分的复杂度集群，差距50-130%，该划分在两个模型和两种条件下一致。分析师-编码器拆分增加复杂度；运行时调试器不增加复杂度，且在分析师-编码器背景下反而降低复杂度；测试器则重新提升复杂度。重复杂度集群的额外复杂度未带来pass@1优势。

Conclusion: LLM代码生成中的架构精细化应基于实际收益论证，而非默认假设更复杂的架构更优。精简架构在准确率上可匹配甚至超越复杂架构。

Abstract: Large-language-model code generation has shifted from single-shot prompting to multi-agent orchestrations - analyst, coder, tester, and debugger pipelines - and is evaluated almost exclusively on functional correctness. Whether these architectures also affect the structural complexity of the code they produce, and which orchestration layers carry the cost, remains largely unexamined: prior work has documented prompt-level effects on code complexity, but the architecture-level question is open. We compare six widely-used multi-agent configurations (Basic, AC, ACT, Debugger, AC+Debugger, ACT+Debugger) under two models from the GPT-4o family across all 164 HumanEval tasks - 1,968 paired observations - using the five RADON complexity metrics (SLOC, cyclomatic complexity, and Halstead Volume, Difficulty, and Effort).
